* Samarbeta med erfarna och engagerade kollegor i tvärfunktionella team
* Bidra till projekt som är viktiga för samhällskritisk infrastruktur
* Arbeta i en organisation som tillämpar moderna och agila arbetssätt där det är relevant
* Goda möjligheter till kompetensutveckling genom strukturerade utbildningar och lärandeprogram
* Möjlighet att utvecklas vidare inom teknik, projektledning eller internationella roller
* Tydliga karriärvägar och möjlighet till progression över tid
* Ett konkurrenskraftigt ersättnings- och förmånspaket i enlighet med kollektivavtal och lokala villkor


 Du kanske inte tänker på det varje dag.
   

  

 Men varje gång ett tåg fungerar som det ska, är det tack vare system som fungerar i varje detalj – och människor som ser till att de gör det.
   

  

 Och det kan vara du!
   

  

**Låter det här som din nästa utmaning?**
 Då ser vi fram emot att höra från dig.
   

  

**Viktigt att veta**
* Tjänsten inkluderar beredskap utanför ordinarie arbetstid
* Resor inom Sverige kan förekomma


 Alstom är en global arbetsgivare som värnar om mångfald och arbetar aktivt för en inkluderande arbetsplats där alla har möjlighet att utvecklas.

title: Säkerhetsadministratör – arbeta med informationshantering
description:
**Säkerhetsskyddad informationshantering, RK informationsförvaltning, Administrativa avdelningen, Förvaltningsavdelningen**
 Har du erfarenhet av arbete inom offentlig verksamhet med hantering av sekretessklassad eller säkerhetsskyddad information? Trivs du med att vara ansvarstagande och arbeta med flera kontaktytor? Vi söker nu en säkerhetsadministratör till sektionen Säkerhetsskyddad informationshantering och erbjuder en spännande roll mitt i händelsernas centrum.
   

  

**Din arbetsdag. Sveriges morgondag.**
 Som säkerhetsadministratör vid Förvaltningsavdelningens sektion för Säkerhetsskyddad Informationshantering har du en central roll i arbetet med intern och extern distribution av information. Du ansvarar för att vidareförmedla inkomna handlingar till departementen och hanterar dataflöden i ett flertal IT-system samt signalskyddssystem. Arbetet är ansvarsfullt och sker enligt fastställda rutiner för att säkerställa hög kvalitet i alla led. I din vardag ingår även administrativa uppgifter som diarieföring. Eftersom vår verksamhet är viktig dygnet runt innebär tjänsten ett varierat schema med pass för öppning och stängning samt beredskap under kvällar, nätter och helger.
   

  

 Informationsförmedlingen ingår i Regeringskansliets enhet för informationsförvaltning, där du arbetar tillsammans i en grupp på 12 personer.
   

  

 Läs mer om vår verksamhet på www.regeringen.se.
   

  

**Din bakgrund**
 För att vara aktuell för denna roll behöver du uppfylla alla skallkrav och gärna även de meriterande kriterierna.
   

  

**Krav:**
* Gymnasieexamen.
* Erfarenhet av arbete inom verksamhet med hantering av sekretessklassad och/eller säkerhetsskyddad information.
* Grundläggande kunskaper om säkerhetsskyddslagstiftningen.
* God kunskap om offentlighets- och sekretesslagen.
* God datorvana.
* Uttrycker sig väl i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska.


**Meriterande:**
* Relevant högskoleexamen.
* Signalskyddsutbildning.
* Erfarenhet av arbete med förmedling av skyddsvärd information inom offentlig sektor.
* Erfarenhet av diarieföring.
* Erfarenhet av arbete med internationella informationsflöden, t.ex. EU och/eller Nato.


**Dina egenskaper**
 Regeringskansliets medarbetarkriterier är helhet, utveckling, resultat. Alla som arbetar i Regeringskansliet behöver ha helhetssyn och samarbeta för verksamhetens bästa. Du förväntas bidra med ditt perspektiv och din kompetens samt vara öppen för andras. Du kommer med idéer och nya angreppssätt för att förbättra och utveckla verksamheten och din egen kompetens. Du är inriktad på resultat i ditt agerande och anpassar dig när behov och inriktning ändras.
   

  

 I denna roll behöver du även vara ansvarstagande och stabil med god samarbetsförmåga och serviceinriktad. Du arbetar noggrant och göra välgrundade avvägningar och beslut samt är flexibel i ditt arbetssätt.
   

  

 Stor vikt kommer att läggas vid dina personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Läs mer på Medarbetarskap och ledarskap i Regeringskansliet - Regeringen.se
   

  

**Övrigt**
 Annonsen avser en eller flera tillsvidareanställningar. Anställningen inleds med sex månaders provanställning. Tillträde snarast eller enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Schemalagd beredskapstid på kvällar och helger förekommer.
   

  

 Befattningen är placerad i säkerhetsklass och en säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll kommer att genomföras innan beslut om anställning fattas. Du måste vara svensk medborgare, men får gärna ha utländsk bakgrund.
   

  

**Är du intresserad?**
 Vill du veta mer om jobbet och vad vi erbjuder, kontakta Sektionschef Johan Eivergård på 073–0687179. Du är också välkommen att kontakta rekryteringsspecialist Albin Törnblad för frågor kring rekryteringsprocessen. Fackliga kontaktpersoner är Johan Strokirk för Saco och Jan Wahlström för ST. Du når samtliga via Regeringskansliets växel, 08-405 10 00. Vi tar gärna emot samtal från dig som är intresserad av jobbet men vi tackar nej till dig som säljer annonser och rekryteringstjänster.
   

  

 Välkommen att registrera din ansökan i vårt rekryteringsverktyg
 **senast den 9 juni 2026.**
 Regeringskansliets uppdrag är att stödja regeringen i dess arbete med att styra Sverige och förverkliga sin politik. Här arbetar 4 800 personer, varav 600 utomlands. Regeringskansliet välkomnar sökande med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter. Vi ser jämställdhet och mångfald som en styrka och tillgång och vi arbetar aktivt för att vara en arbetsplats fri från diskriminering. Förvaltningsavdelningen ansvarar för myndighetsövergripande frågor som förändrings- och förnyelsearbete, ekonomi, arbetsgivarfrågor, kompetensförsörjning, kommunikation, säkerhet, it, bibliotek, arkiv och registratur samt för den gemensamma servicen i Regeringskansliet.

title: IT Infrastructure Specialist - Nordea Life & Pension
description:
**Job ID: 3887**
 Are you passionate about technology and IT Operations? We are looking for an IT Infrastructure Specialist to manage both operational and strategic work to support and develop our IT environment.
   

  

 At Nordea, we know our customers’ needs are changing – and we’re deeply committed to meeting them with the financial solutions of tomorrow. We’re creating an agile environment where we’re harnessing the power of technology – one where you can make an impact. So bring your skills, ideas and unique background. With us, you’ll find plenty of opportunities to grow and make your mark on something bigger.
   

  

**About This Opportunity**
 Welcome to the NLPSE IT Operations Team. We are looking for an IT Infrastructure Specialist to manage both operational and strategic work to support and develop our IT environment. As IT Infrastructure Specialist you’ll play a valuable role in handle simple to complex incoming cases that require investigative work. This is an opportunity for you to join Nordea Life & Pensions Sweden own IT department. We are responsible for, and work as a natural partner with, all IT-related areas within the subsidiary and the business processes. You will join NLP SE where we are responsible for Nordea Life & Pension IT Operations from a company perspective and are attached to Nordea Central IT.
   

  

**What you’ll be doing:**
* Support Nordea Life & Pensions IT platform (Windows Servers, SQL Databases, ESP platform, java and windows application)
* Troubleshooting IT-related issues
* IT-related support for our business applications
* On-going operation, support and troubleshooting
* SQL Database troubleshooting from application perspective


 The role is based in Stockholm. Welcome to a team in a dynamic environment along with ten other colleagues (two on application support, seven on IT operations support and a team manager). Together we are responsible for Nordea Life & Pension IT Operations from a company perspective and are attached to Nordea Central IT. In the role as the IT Operation Specialist you will participate in the scheduled on-call support.
   

  

**Who You Are**
 Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the values that guide us in being at our best – and that we imagine you share with us. We are looking for a pro-active, energetic and result driven individual to take this role to the next level! You have a high focus on quality in both execution and delivery. You are good at planning and prioritizing your work in a structured way. You are driven by delivering first class service and always to do the utmost to resolve the user's case at any given time.
   

  

**To succeed in this role, we believe that you have:**
* Good knowledge of operations and support and have a genuine interest in new technology
* Windows server experience
* Fluency in written and spoken Swedish and English.
* Experience in Installation & Configuration and monitoring
* Great knowledge in general of IPC process (Incident, problem and change with Helix tool or likewise)
* Lumera application knowledge


**It is an advantage if you have experience in several of the following areas:**
* Tomcat, ESP platform or other application servers
* Databases, like Microsoft SQL
* AppDynamics, Splunk
* SQL
* Lumera knowledge from an Operations perspective
* Insurance knowledge and how Lumera application works


**What We Offer**
**People** 
 are driven by many different factors. For some, it’s to take their career to the next level. For others, it’s to break new ground within their area of expertise – in other words, with us, you will always move forward.
   

  

**A culture** 
 that fosters performance and growth in one of the largest Nordic banks, offering various opportunities to evolve, develop and learn from brilliant colleagues with diverse backgrounds in a vibrant working environment.
   

  

**Hybrid working model –** 
 we believe in the value of bringing people together and at the same time we embrace the freedom of flexibility.
   

  

**Diversity and inclusion** 
 are a natural part of our daily work. We know that an inclusive workplace is a sustainable one. We genuinely believe that our diverse backgrounds, experiences, characteristics and traits make us stronger together. Every day we strive to find new ways to improve diversity and inclusion within our community e.g. we have signed the European Diversity Charters in the countries where we operate to show our commitment and engage with others to continue learning and improving.
   

  

 If this sounds like you, get in touch!
   

  

**Next steps**
 Submit your application no later than 24/05/2026. For more information, you’re welcome to contact Head of IT Operations, Daniel Constantinescu at daniel.constantinescu @nordea.se.
   

  

 For union information, please contact Finansförbundet at finansforbundet@nordea.se or SACO at SacoNordea@nordea.com.

title: Product Owner Game Engine SDK
description:
**Company Overview**
 Metrea delivers effects-as-a-service to national security partners across five domains and more than a dozen mission areas. These include airborne ISR, electronic warfare, secure communications, aerial refuelling, special air missions, aerial firefighting, and advanced simulation. We own the whole stack: designing, building, and operating turnkey capabilities that give our partners decisive, asymmetric advantage against rapidly evolving threats.
   

  

 Our operating model is built around three interlocking pillars. The Support Groups provide a global shared-service – spanning people, finance, platform, operations, legal, and engagement. This frees up our Core Groups, who develop and own mission capabilities end-to-end, to focus entirely on delivery. The Market Groups apply a regional lens, ensuring that our agile and adaptable capabilities remain aligned to the wicked problems that matter most to our partners across the Americas, EMEA, and Asia-Pacific.
   

  

 At the heart of our model is a simple but powerful idea: be a true partner with skin in the game. Our partners need effects, not just equipment. By owning the full stack – from the lab to the field – we are able to drive a continuous cycle of innovation that keeps our partners ahead. It's a fast-moving, intellectually demanding environment where talented people are given real responsibility, work on problems that matter, and contribute to an enterprise that is growing quickly and deliberately.
   

  

 Headquartered in Washington, DC, with facilities across the United States, the United Kingdom, as well as Continental Europe and Asia-Pacific.
   

  

 Group Overview
   

  

 This role sits within the Digital and Synthetic Capability Unit (D&S) which is committed to providing mission-driven information solutions that seamlessly bridge the digital and physical realms. Leveraging cutting-edge technologies and advanced platforms, we empower operational readiness and elevate situational awareness across diverse domains—including air, maritime, and space.
   

  

 Position Summary
   

  

 In this role you will be driving the quality of our Core software development kits (SDKs) that encapsulate game engines, bleeding edge simulation and modern developer tools. You will understand from a product perspective why well-designed SDKs augment and accelerate development teams coupled with understanding the implications of working with modern, complex game engines. This will be achieved by combining a technical background with cross functional production experience that will enable you to balance implementation of long-term strategy with day-to-day delivery pressure. You will be providing agile direction to talented engineering teams whilst collaborating with the product lead in setting the future direction for the platform. You will own and drive the product development of the core SDK platform that is used by internal and external teams to build other simulation products on top of it. You will be successful if you can balance and leverage the affordances of game engine technology with the demands required for high fidelity simulation offered through a mature and extensive suite of developer tools.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Own and evolve the product vision, roadmap, and backlog for the SDK platform
* Work closely and actively engage with multiple development teams and subject matter experts to gather requirements and validate product direction
* Translate requirements into clear user stories and technical requirements for development teams
* Understand the implications and application of different agile frameworks like Scrum and Kanban
* Collaborate with developers, artists, designers, and simulation engineers working in game engine environments (e.g. Unreal Engine)
* Prioritize features that balance commercial impact, user feedback, and technical complexity
* Ensure product alignment with long term architecture goals, interoperability standards, and Defence compliance needs
* Drive user testing, acceptance criteria, and feedback sessions with end users and military stakeholders


 What You Bring
   

  

* Previous technical background as a developer in C++ and/or game engines
* Previous experience working with developer tools and SDKs is critical
* Practical experience of product development, release management, and stakeholder engagement
* 4+ years’ production experience is highly preferred, particularly with managing multiple highly technical teams
* Highly organised and proactive with the ability to own backlogs across multiple technical teams
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills with the ability to support the product lead with data on day-to-day delivery and product direction
* Experienced with agile development practices and project management tools (e.g., Jira, Confluence)
* Experience working in cross-functional teams with developers, artists, and designers


**In addition to the above, any of the following would be beneficial:**
* Experience with or a strong interest in simulation, training systems that utilise game engines are an advantage
* Familiarity with Unreal Engine


**Additional Eligibility Qualifications**
* Comfortable with Hybrid working
* Experience working with military or government organisations, products or services
* Willingness to travel, Metrea is an international organisation with offices and stakeholders in the US, UK and Europe


**Benefits**
* Friskvård of 5K annually
* Parental leave Metrea Management Limited.
* Occupational pension (swe. tjänstepension)
* 30 days of leave
* Bonus Scheme
* Personal development opportunities


 Work Authorization / Security Clearance
   

  

 The employee will have the legal right to work in the (relevant country) and will be able to produce right to work documentation.
   

  

 AAP/EEO Statement
   

  

 Metrea Simulations AB is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, colour, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or other characteristics protected by law.
   

  

 Position Type and Expected Hours of Work
   

  

 This is a full-time non-exempt position with typical working hours of Monday through Friday, 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. Hours and work shifts may change in accordance with department and business needs. Exempt Employees must have the ability to be on-call and available, as business needs require. Non-Exempt employees may be required to work over 40 hours per week with approval from the department manager.
   

  

 Work Location
   

  

 Stockholm
   

  

 Work Environment
   

  

 This job operates in an office setting.
   

  

 Travel
   

  

 Occasionally required.
   

  

 Our Firmware
   

  

 At Metrea, our single core value is Rooted in Humility, and our four cornerstone attributes are Entrepreneurial, Systematic, Discerning, and Over-Deliver. These form what we call our Teammate Firmware. Just like technical firmware connects software and hardware, our Firmware is the constant interface between our mission and our people. It defines how we show up, how we work together, and how we solve complex problems.
   

  

 Our team Firmware creates a web-like, hyper-collaborative, dynamically hierarchical way of working that helps us adapt quickly, communicate openly, and distribute decision-making to where expertise actually lives. It enables groups to self-organize around hard problems, shift fluidly as priorities evolve, and operate with the trust, curiosity, and discipline required in a complex mission space. This foundation allows us to deliver elegant, effective solutions and uphold our purpose: protecting our precious inheritance.

title: Computer vision Engineer
description:
**We don’t just build technology. We build hope for everyone dealing with cancer.**
**What You’ll Do At Elekta**
 Your team is part of an international program that consists of a diverse group of specialists in medical imaging, physics, embedded software, advanced algorithms, mechanical engineering, electronics, and more. We are an international organization and you will interact with people located at other sites and in different countries.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 You’ll be working as a software engineer in a team responsible end-to-end for selecting hardware and developing low-level software and complex algorithms for a part of our radiotherapy solutions. You will be contributing to the SW design, implementation and testing, as well as to other areas the team is responsible for. Your team is part of an agile program, working according to SAFe.
   

  

 Join us to make a significant impact in a fast-paced, innovative environment where your expertise is valued, and your ideas have a real influence on the direction of our products!
   

  

**The right stuff**
 We are looking for a creative and smart new colleague. You’re someone who thrives in an agile, cross-functional environment and is motivated by meaningful work. You’re a team player at heart - eager to collaborate, learn, and help others succeed. You value high-quality, maintainable code and take ownership of your contributions.
   

  

* A collaborative spirit with a proactive mindset
* Strong communication skills in a multicultural and distributed setting
* A passion for clean, efficient code and continuous learning
* Ability to work across disciplines and contribute to team-wide goals


**What You Bring**
 We believe you have:
   

  

* A master’s degree in engineering physics, electrical engineering, computer science, or equivalent
* Solid experience working as a software engineer in C++
* Experience with 3D reconstruction, registration or classical computer vision algorithms and technologies
* Broad and genuine interest in technology


 It is meriting if you have
   

  

* Interest in software design and architecture
* Experience of working in MedTech or some other regulated industry


*We encourage you to apply even if you don’t meet every requirement - your unique skills and experiences might be exactly what we’re looking for!*
**What You’ll Get**
 In this role, you will work for a higher purpose:
 **hope for everyone dealing with cancer** 
 , and for everyone - regardless of where they are in the world - to have access to the best cancer care. You’ll be part of a global community of experts, given the autonomy to grow, and supported in your professional development. Elekta offers competitive benefits tailored to your location and role.
   

  

 Note that the position is office-based with a requirement of at least four days per week in the Stockholm office.
   

  

**Hiring process**
 We look forward to hearing from you! Apply by submitting your application and résumé in English via the “Apply” button. Please note that we do not accept applications via e-mail.
   

  

**About Elekta**
 As a leader in precision radiation therapy, Elekta is committed to ensuring every patient has access to the best cancer care possible. Elekta is a proud innovator and supplier of equipment and software used to improve, prolong, and save the lives of people with cancer and brain disorders.
 **We don’t just build technology, we build hope.**
 Elekta is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, with a presence in more than 120 countries and listed on Nasdaq Stockholm. For more information, visit elekta.com or follow @Elekta on Twitter and on LinkedIn.

title: Technical Support Manager
description:
**We are hiring a Specialist Technical Support to join our team.**
**We are looking for you on a fixed-term contract as parental leave cover.**
**Let’s talk about the role:**
 The Technical Support Manager Sweden reports to the Nordics Technical Service Manager and is a key member of the Technical Services Department. The role is based on-site at the ResMed Swedish office in Kista and will support customers, internal teams, and distributors within the Swedish market.
   

  

**Position Description:**
 The primary purpose of this role is to provide high-quality technical and engineering support for ResMed products and 3pp products, both to customers and internal stakeholders. This includes ownership of customer queries, management of investigation of product failures, device upgrades, maintenance, testing, technical trainings and management of repairs. The Technical Services Manager also acts as the local QA/RA representative, ensuring regulatory compliance and device traceability throughout the product life cycle. Beyond the day-to-day operational responsibilities, this position plays a key role in representing the Swedish Technical Services function within
 **local, regional, and global meetings and projects** 
 . The successful candidate will actively participate in strategic and operational discussions, ensuring alignment with ResMed’s global service structure, processes, and long-term objectives. This includes contributing to continuous improvement initiatives, sharing local market insights, and supporting the implementation of new global service strategies in the Nordic region.
   

  

**Let’s talk about responsibilities:**
* Provide technical support to local customers via phone, email, and CRM tools (mandatory for tender participation).
* Manage troubleshooting, repair, returns, and replacement processes for sleep apnea devices, life support ventilators, and diagnostic devices, including non-serialized product handling.
* Deliver technical support to internal teams including sales, finance, and customer service.
* Act as the Local QA/RA SCHU representative, responsible for complaint handling, device traceability, and liaison with regulatory authorities and RCHU.
* Provide technical support to distributors in Sweden.
* Manage the aftersales online portal: create customer accounts and conduct user training sessions for hospital technical teams and distributors.
* Conduct technical training and manage re-certification processes for hospital staff (remote or on-site as required by tenders).
* Prepare and deliver technical documentation for tenders, including service manuals, quality certificates, and official tender forms in the local language.
* Manage loan devices, including shipment, return, and record-keeping.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives: report KPIs, update OKRs, improve Net Promoter Score (NPS), and communicate customer needs to the sales team.
* Coordinate logistics and customs clearance paperwork for service devices.
* Perform other duties and responsibilities as assigned.
* Participate in regional, European and global meetings with the global technical teams.


**Let’s talk about qualifications and experience:**
**Required:**
* University degree in applied sciences,engineering or biomedical science.
* Native Swedish language skills and business-level English.
* Knowledge of measurement units and electronic components.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook) and CRM tools.
* Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to maintain professionalism and interact effectively with customers and stakeholders at all levels.
* Ability to engage with senior internal and external personnel and drive resolutions that align with company goals and objectives.


**Preferred:**
* Experience working within the hospital or healthcare sector.
* Minimum 2 years’ experience in a similar technical service role using a CRM system (e.g., Salesforce).
* Knowledge of the Swedish healthcare system and/or experience managing relationships with healthcare professionals.
* Hands-on experience in technical repair and/or daily service center operations.
* Familiarity with 5S, Lean, or Six Sigma methodologies.
* Knowledge of an additional Nordic language (Finnish, Norwegian, Danish).
* Proactive and self-driven
* Customer- and business-oriented mindset
* Comfortable with digital communication tools (phone, Zoom, Teams).
* Highly organized and detail oriented.
* Eager to challenge themselves and grow.
* Strong team player with a collaborative approach.


**Additional information :**
* At ResMed, all employees benefit from a bonus plan, the percentage of which depends on your position within the organisation
* You also have access to a referral bonus and to ResMed's preferred shareholding programme
* Internal career opportunity - joining an international fast-pace and massively growing company


**OK, so what's next?**
 Joining us is more than saying “yes” to making the world a healthier place. It’s discovering a career that’s challenging, supportive and inspiring. Where a culture driven by excellence helps you not only meet your goals, but also create new ones. We focus on creating a diverse and inclusive culture, encouraging individual expression in the workplace and thrive on the innovative ideas this generates. If this sounds like the workplace for you, apply now.
   

  

 Joining us is more than saying “yes” to making the world a healthier place. It’s discovering a career that’s challenging, supportive and inspiring. Where a culture driven by excellence helps you not only meet your goals, but also create new ones. We focus on creating a diverse and inclusive culture, encouraging individual expression in the workplace and thrive on the innovative ideas this generates. If this sounds like the workplace for you, apply now! We commit to respond to every applicant.

title: Information Architect
description:
We’re looking for an
 **Information Architect** 
 to join us at Telia.
   

  

 I’m
 **Åsa Boffardi,** 
 Head of Business Intelligence, and I am searching for an Information Architect to join us at
 **Telia Sweden B2B.**
 In this role you will be a key interface between the business and IT. The role focuses on defining and governing business‑level information used across analytics, reporting, AI, and decision‑making, and driving adoption of the information model across processes, channels, and solutions.
 **It is not a technical IT Architect role and does not involve system design or implementation.**
**What you’ll do:**
* Create a structured information model and terminology that ensures one shared truth across the B2B organization.
* Create information transparency and enable data driven decision making.
* Consult with stakeholders throughout the organization to ensure alignment and prioritization across customer expectations, business needs and operational efficiency.
* Collaborate closely with business and IT stakeholders to support implementation and integration.


**What will help you thrive in this role:**
 You have strong business acumen and can create clarity in complex, ambiguous environments. You are a pragmatic problem-solver, comfortable taking ownership, challenging existing practices constructively, and balancing long‑term data integrity with short‑term business needs. You are a strong communicator with a drive to standardize, simplify, and drive change.
   

  

* Prior experience working as an Information Architect.
* Prior experience in information modelling from a business perspective.
* Ability to translate business needs into requirements on IT architecture and solutions.
* Strong stakeholder management and change management capabilities.
* Fluency in Swedish and English (both verbal and written).
* Experience from complex B2B environments involving CRM, analytics, or performance reporting (advantage).
* Experience defining and aligning shared “one truth” data models across teams (advantage).


**Join us to shape smarter living for people, businesses, and the planet**
 At Telia, we’re a team of 15 000 colleagues across the Nordics and Baltics, passionate about technology and connectivity. As a Leading Telecommunications Operator & Climate Leader, we drive change with large-scale, impactful projects while building a sustainable, inclusive world.
   

  

 Here, you can grow your skills, lead meaningful projects, and thrive in a supportive, diverse environment. Whether you’re taking your first step or your next, Telia is a place to grow, belong, and make a real impact.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.
   

  

**Ready to make better happen?**
 We look forward to receiving your application by
 **2026-05-26** 
 . If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our
 **Talent Acquisition Partner.** 
 Background and reference checks will be part of the process.
   

  

 Have any questions? Please reach out to our Åsa Boffardi at asa.boffardi@teliacompany.com
   

  

**Equal opportunities**
 At Telia, we recognize talent by professional skills and growth potential. We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status.
   

  

 Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where your uniqueness is our strength.
   

  

**Join us and let’s make better happen - together!**

title: Information Security Officer
description:
**WHO WE ARE** 





 At Trustly, we're building a smarter, faster, and more secure financial future by revolutionizing the world of payments. As a global leader in Open Banking Payments, we are establishing Pay by Bank as the new standard at checkout, providing unparalleled freedom, speed, and ease to millions of consumers and merchants worldwide.
 




  






 Our Ambition: To build the world’s most disruptive payment network and redefine what the payment experience should feel like.
 




  






 Trustly is a global team of innovators, collaborators, and doers.  If you are driven by a strong sense of purpose and thrive in a dynamic, entrepreneurial, and high-growth environment, join us and be part of a team that’s transforming the way the world pays.
 




  





  

**ABOUT THE TEAM** 
  


 The Security team is Trustly's first line of defence. We do the hands-on security work - running risk assessments, reviewing vendors, maintaining policies and procedures, driving business continuity and disaster recovery, and making sure security is embedded in how Trustly builds and operates its products. We work closely with engineering, legal, finance, risk & compliance, HR and senior leadership, and partner with the second line for governance and oversight.
 


  

**ABOUT THE ROLE** 
  


 We are looking for an experienced Information Security Officer to join the Information Security team, reporting to the Director of Security in Stockholm. The role sits in the first line of defence, meaning you will be directly responsible for executing and operating security activities - not just governing or overseeing them.
 


  


 You will work across the full breadth of the role — owning and driving security governance, risk management, third-party oversight, business continuity, compliance and awareness. You will be expected to work independently, influence decisions across teams, and improve how we operate. At the more senior end, you will help shape security strategy and act as stand-in for the Director of Security when needed.
 


  






  




**What you'll do** 
  

  
* Develop, maintain and communicate Trustly's information security framework (ISMS), including instructions and routines aligned with regulatory requirements and industry standards
  
* Lead information security risk assessments, define and track risk treatment plans, and keep the risk register current
  
* Assess the security posture of third-party vendors and partners during onboarding and through ongoing oversight, define contractual security requirements, and drive remediation of gaps
  
* Ensure business continuity, disaster recovery and crisis management capabilities meet regulatory requirements and are regularly tested
  
* Define and maintain security controls across areas such as access management, internal fraud prevention, monitoring and segregation of duties
  
* Ensure compliance with applicable regulatory requirements, contractual obligations and industry standards; coordinate and support internal and external audits and certifications
  
* Respond to customer due diligence requests, security questionnaires and supplier assessments
  
* Promote security awareness across the organisation through training, communication and guidance
  
* Manage the security incident process and the exception and risk acceptance process, ensuring deviations are documented and approved at the right level
  
* Act as stand-in for the Director of Security when required
  

  


  


  




**Who you are** 
  

  
* 5+ years of experience in information security, with a focus on governance, risk management or compliance - ideally in regulated financial services or payments
  
* Experience leading and building a team(s) and/or larger projects
  
* Strong working knowledge of ISO/IEC 27001
  
* Familiarity with frameworks such as NIST CSF will be considered as beneficial
  
* Practical experience translating regulatory requirements (e.g. any regulations and standards such as DORA, NIS 2, PSD2, EBA guidelines) into policy and process
  
* Proven experience with third-party risk management across the vendor lifecycle
  
* Excellent written and verbal communication - you can write a clear policy, present to an all-hands audience, and advise senior leadership with equal ease
  
* Comfortable driving cross-functional initiatives and influencing stakeholders at all levels
  
* If you hold one or more relevant certifications (active or expired) such as CISM, ISO 27001 Lead Implementer, CISA, CISSP or similar, this is considered beneficial
  
* Fluent in English, written and spoken. Swedish is a bonus but not a requirement
  

  


  





  




  


**Our Fantastic Benefits**

 (varies by location)
 




 🌴
 **20 to 30 days of holiday** 
 to support a healthy work-life balance
 



 🥳
 **Monthly team outing allowance** 
 to enjoy social events with your colleagues
 



 👶
 **Parental leave top-up** 
 additional support for new parents
 



 🥐
 **Daily breakfast and on-site perks** 
 to make your workday smoother
 



 💚
 **Well being support** 
 our health allowance covers gym memberships, massages, and much more to help you feel your best
 



**PLUS** 
 additional benefits designed to enhance your work-life experience!
 



  





**Shape Your Role and Make an Impact**




 Join a dynamic environment where you can take ownership, drive change, and continuously embrace new challenges. We’re looking for dedicated and highly motivated individuals who thrive in a fast-paced environment and enjoy collaborating across different areas of the organisation.
 



 If your skills and experience align with this role, we’d love to hear from you!
 **Apply now and submit your CV in English.** 



  


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Software Development Engineer - Sana
description:
**Your work days are brighter here.**
 We’re obsessed with making hard work pay off, for our people, our customers, and the world around us. As a Fortune 500 company and a leading AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, we’re shaping the future of work so teams can reach their potential and focus on what matters most. The minute you join, you’ll feel it. Not just in the products we build, but in how we show up for each other. Our culture is rooted in integrity, empathy, and shared enthusiasm. We’re in this together, tackling big challenges with bold ideas and genuine care. We look for curious minds and courageous collaborators who bring sun-drenched optimism and drive. Whether you're building smarter solutions, supporting customers, or creating a space where everyone belongs, you’ll do meaningful work with Workmates who’ve got your back. In return, we’ll give you the trust to take risks, the tools to grow, the skills to develop and the support of a company invested in you for the long haul. So, if you want to inspire a brighter work day for everyone, including yourself, you’ve found a match in Workday, and we hope to be a match for you too.
   

  

**About The Team**
 About Sana
   

  

 Sana is an AI lab building superintelligence for work. We believe organizations can accomplish their missions faster when teams can effortlessly access knowledge, automate repetitive work, and learn anything with the help of agentic AI. As part of Workday, we are committed to building AI that augments people - not replaces them.
   

  

 We bring this mission to life through two products. Sana Agents provide a seamless way to access all your company’s apps, knowledge, and data, enabling AI agents to do real work so teams can process and act on information at unprecedented scale. Sana Learn is an AI-powered learning hub that combines the simplicity of a modern learning platform with intelligent features like an AI tutor, automated content generation, and interactive apps, making knowledge not just accessible but actionable.
   

  

 We’re a talent-dense, product-obsessed team of engineers and designers from companies like Google, Spotify, Apple, and Databricks, united by deep technical excellence and rapid iteration. Our tools already help over a million people learn and work better across hundreds of leading enterprises - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

**About The Role**
**About the role**
 Ship customer-facing value quickly in small teams - owning everything from problem definition through UX, API, and instrumentation. You’ll work end-to-end to deliver features that delight users and move the needle for Sana and our customers.
   

  

**In this role, you will**
* Own features from design to deploy - frontend (React/TypeScript), backend (Node/TypeScript) and database (Postgres)
* Integrate with agent and retrieval APIs to deliver seamless product experiences
* Instrument products, run A/B tests, and iterate quickly with design and PM
* Make pragmatic trade-offs and thrive in ambiguous 0→1 product spaces
* Collaborate closely with stakeholders, users and teammates to define and solve the right problems


**About You**
**What success looks like**
* Features ship fast, delight users, and drive measurable impact
* End-to-end ownership is the norm - problems are solved, not handed off
* Product instrumentation and A/B tests inform every iteration
* You are a force multiplier for your squad, making everyone around you better
* Ambiguity is an opportunity, not a blocker


**Our tech stack**
 We build on a simple modern stack optimized for both humans and AI.
   

  

* Backend: TypeScript, Kotlin, Node.js
* Frontend: TypeScript, React, Tailwind
* Databases: Postgres, Redis
* Cloud infra: GCP/Kubernetes/Terraform


**Our Approach to Flexible Work**
 With Flex Work, we’re combining the best of both worlds: in-person time and remote. Our approach enables our teams to deepen connections, maintain a strong community, and do their best work. We know that flexibility can take shape in many ways, so rather than a number of required days in-office each week, we simply
 **spend at least half (50%) of our time each quarter in the office or in the field** 
 with our customers, prospects, and partners (depending on role). This means you'll have the freedom to create a flexible schedule that caters to your business, team, and personal needs, while being intentional to make the most of time spent together. Those in our remote "home office" roles also have the opportunity to come together in our offices for important moments that matter.
   

  

 At Workday, we are committed to providing an accessible and inclusive hiring experience where all candidates can fully demonstrate their skills. If you require assistance or an accommodation at any point, please email accommodations@workday.com.
   

  

**Are you being referred to one of our roles? If so, ask your connection at Workday about our Employee Referral process!**
 At Workday, we value our candidates’ privacy and data security. Workday will never ask candidates to apply to jobs through websites that are not Workday Careers.
   

  

 Please be aware of sites that may ask for you to input your data in connection with a job posting that appears to be from Workday but is not.
   

  

 In addition, Workday will never ask candidates to pay a recruiting fee, or pay for consulting or coaching services, in order to apply for a job at Workday.

title: Senior Consultant
description:
ERA Group, a global leader in cost management and business optimisation, is looking for an entrepreneurial Partner to join our international network of consultants.
 



  





 This is not a traditional consultancy role, it’s a chance to run your own practice within a global brand, with the freedom to shape your market, build your team, and grow your client base, while backed by ERA’s proven methodologies, tools, and worldwide community.
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 



* Lead cost optimisation, procurement, and performance improvement programmes across industries
* Build and grow your client portfolio through business development and long-term partnerships
* Take ownership of your practice’s strategic direction, go-to-market approach, and team leadership
* Work directly with C-level clients to deliver measurable savings and transformation



  





**What You Bring** 



* Extensive consulting or senior leadership experience in cost management, procurement, or performance improvement
* A strong track record of client acquisition and project delivery
* Deep expertise in one or more industries such as Pharma/Life Sciences, Energy/Utilities, Manufacturing, Consumer, or Logistics
* Confidence in engaging with CxO-level stakeholders and leveraging your professional network
* An entrepreneurial mindset with the ambition to grow a successful consulting practice



  





 This is the ideal next step if you’re seeking less bureaucracy, more independence, and the chance to build something of your own within a global consultancy platform.
 



  





 Please review our "Legal and Privacy Policy" for details on how we handle your data: https://eragroup.com/legal-and-privacy-policy/

title: Head of Accounting Europe
description:
**Join Emaldo as our new Head of Accounting Europe** 








 📍 Location: Stockholm (Sweden), or Ølstykke
 
 (
 
 Denmark
 
 )
 




 📅 Experience: 7+ years
 



 🧾 Focus areas: Leadership, Accounting & Controlling of all European based entities
 



 👤 Reporting to: Patrik Hjorth Danielsen, CFO
 







 Are you a strong accounting leader with a passion for structure, accuracy, and building scalable finance operations?
 







 Do you have solid hands-on accounting experience combined with the ability to lead, improve processes, and ensure high-quality financial reporting across multiple entities?
 







 Then you might be the Head of Accounting we’re looking for at Emaldo!
 







**About the Role** 




 As our Head of Accounting Europe, you will take full ownership of accounting operations across our current and future European entities.
 







 You will be responsible for ensuring high-quality financial reporting, compliance, and efficient processes across all entities, while also leading and developing our accounting function.
 







 This is a key leadership role where you will combine hands-on execution with strategic oversight - driving improvements, strengthening controls, and supporting the company’s continued growth.
 







 You will report directly to our CFO, Patrik Hjorth Danielsen, and work closely with stakeholders across the business.
 







 This is a great opportunity for someone who enjoys taking ownership and being part of a dynamic, international environment where things are evolving fast.
 







**What You’ll Do** 




 Your key responsibilities will include:
 


* Owning the full accounting function across European entities.
* Leading and developing accounting processes, controls, and systems.
* Ensuring accurate and timely monthly, quarterly, and annual closings.
* Managing year-end closing, annual financial statements, and audits.
* Overseeing payroll, reconciliations, and statutory reporting.
* Ensuring compliance with local GAAP and tax regulations.
* Preparing and reviewing management reports and supporting group consolidation.
* Supporting budgeting and forecasting processes.
* Driving process improvements and automation across finance operations.







**What We’re Looking For** 



* Relevant education in accounting, finance, or similar.
* Strong knowledge of accounting standards (IFRS and local gap).
* 7+ years of experience in accounting or finance roles.
* Proven experience in a senior or lead accounting position.
* Experience managing or mentoring team members is a plus.
* Experience with ERP systems, Business Central is a plus (we will do a transition during 2H 2026).
* Strong Excel and IT skills.
* Fluent in English.
* Structured, detail-oriented, and quality-driven.
* Strong analytical mindset with the ability to see the bigger picture.
* Comfortable working both hands-on and at a strategic level.







**Why Join Emaldo:** 




 At
 **Emaldo** 
 , you’ll join a purpose-driven, international team that’s shaping the future of home energy solutions. We offer:
 


* A chance to make real impact in the green energy transition.
* A growing, global company with career opportunities.
* Learning from experienced finance professionals while developing your own expertise.
* Flexible working hours and hybrid options.
* A collaborative, inclusive, and dynamic environment with flat organizational structure.
* Competitive salary based on qualifications and experience.



  









**About Emaldo:** 




 At
 **Emaldo** 
 , our mission is to deliver innovative, sustainable energy solutions for modern homes.
 



 We specialize in smart energy systems with battery storage - empowering homeowners to use clean energy efficiently, reduce CO₂ emissions, and enjoy reliable power without compromise.
 



 Being part of Emaldo means joining a passionate, forward-thinking team working together to make a meaningful difference in the world.
 







**A Message from Your Future Manager** 




 My name is Patrik, and I represent Emaldo.
 







 As a leader, I place strong emphasis on value-add, structure, clarity and transparent communication. I am committed to fostering a professional and trusting environment where individuals feel respected, supported and empowered to develop every day.
 







 In my role, I act as a strategic partner to the business, translating financial insight into actionable decisions that support our continued growth. As we embark on an ambitious green growth journey, I am looking for a colleague who can complement this approach and help ensure that we consistently deliver high-quality financial support to the organization.
 







 Within our finance team, we focus on building robust processes, sharing knowledge and maintaining operational excellence. At the same time, we value a positive and engaging work environment, where dedication and high performance go hand in hand with a strong team spirit and enjoyment in our work.
 







 If you are motivated by collaboration, accountability and contributing to a purpose-driven organization, you will find a strong fit with us at Emaldo.
 







 I look forward to welcoming you to our growing team.
 







 Ready to Make a Difference?
 



 Send your CV via the “Apply” button – focus on your experience in accounting, reporting and financial processes.
 







 📞 Questions?
 



 Contact Patrik Hjorth Danielsen, CFO, at pd@emaldo.com
 



 We believe in equal opportunities – whether you’re returning to the job market, changing industries, or simply looking for new challenges, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Service Desk‑tekniker
description:
Vill du arbeta nära användarna och vara en nyckelspelare i en verksamhet som bidrar till svensk tillväxt och samhällsnytta? Nu söker Svensk Exportkredit (SEK) en ServiceDesk‑tekniker som vill vara med och säkerställa en stabil, säker och professionell IT‑leverans. Hos oss får du en varierad roll i en miljö där service, samarbete och tekniskt djup är lika viktiga – och där du har goda möjligheter att utvecklas vidare inom IT.
 



  





  





**OM ROLLEN** 




 Som Service Desk‑tekniker på SEK är du en central del av IT Operations och första kontaktpunkt för våra användare. Du arbetar brett – från enklare ärenden till mer avancerad felsökning – och har en viktig roll i att skapa en smidig och trygg IT‑vardag. Rollen är praktisk och användarnära, och ställer krav på eget driv och teknisk nyfikenhet. Du förväntas ta ansvar för att felsöka, testa och förstå problem – och driva dina ärenden så långt som möjligt innan du vid behov involverar 2nd eller 3rd line
 



  





 Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:
 


* Ge 1st line support via telefon, e‑post, ärendehanteringssystem och personliga besök
* Felsöka och lösa IT‑relaterade problem samt vid behov eskalera vidare
* Arbeta med onboarding och offboarding (konton, klienter, mobiltelefoner)
* Hantera behörigheter och kontoadministration
* Supportera klientdatorer, mobiltelefoner och arbetsplatser
* Ge stöd kring konferensutrustning och mötesrum
* Ha kontakt med externa leverantörer vid behov



  





**OM TEAMET OCH VÅR ARBETSPLATS** 




 Du blir en del av ett ServiceDesk‑team som idag består av en handfull personer, som arbetar nära kollegor inom Infrastructure Services (2nd och 3rd line). Inom teamen hjälps ni åt, delar kunskap och samarbetar för att lösa både enklare och mer komplexa ärenden. På SEK arbetar vi i en bred teknisk miljö med hög kompetens samlad inhouse. Här ges du goda möjligheter att arbeta nära olika specialistområden och bygga en djupare förståelse för helheten, i en verksamhet med höga krav på säkerhet och struktur, och där vi arbetar enligt etablerade arbetssätt och tydliga rutiner.
 



  





 Vårt kontor ligger i centrala Stockholm. Vi värdesätter samarbete på plats, med möjlighet till visst distansarbete när arbetet tillåter.
 



  





**OM DIG** 




 Vi söker dig som har några års erfarenhet av arbete inom ServiceDesk eller IT‑support, och som är trygg i att självständigt driva ärenden från start till mål. Du har ett genuint teknikintresse och tycker om att förstå hur saker fungerar på djupet, och du motiveras av att felsöka, testa och hitta lösningar. Du trivs i en roll med många kontaktytor där du möter användare i olika situationer, och kan kombinera servicekänsla med ett strukturerat arbetssätt.
 



  





 Vi ser gärna att du har:
 


* Teknisk gymnasieutbildning eller motsvrande
* Några års erfarenhet av arbete inom ServiceDesk eller IT‑support
* Erfarenhet av Microsofts klientplattform, exempelvis Windows 11 och Microsoft 365
* Erfarenhet av identitetshantering, exempelvis Active Directory och/eller Azure AD
* Erfarenhet av klienthantering, exempelvis via Intune
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift



  





  





 Det är meriterande om du dessutom har erfarenhet av:
 


* Ärendehanteringssystem, exempelvis ServiceNow
* Arbete i miljöer med höga krav på säkerhet och efterlevnad



  





**ANSÖKAN** 




 Välkommen med din ansökan! Bifoga ditt CV och svara på våra urvalsfrågor – något personligt brev behövs inte. Sista ansökningsdag är den 14 juni. Urval sker löpande, så skicka gärna in din ansökan så snart som möjligt.
 



  





 För frågor om tjänsten, kontakta ansvarig chef Erik Berlin (Service Manager IT Operations), erik.berlin@sek.se. För frågor om rekryteringsprocessen, kontakta Agnes Munter (Rekryteringsspecialist), agnes.munter@sek.se.

title: Embedded Software Engineer
description:
We are looking for a
 **driven Embedded Software Engineer** 
 to join our team in Stockholm. In this role, you will contribute to the development of high-quality embedded systems, working on real-time and resource-constrained applications. You’ll be part of a collaborative environment where your expertise in software design and development will help deliver innovative solutions for high-tech, automotive, or defence projects.
 



**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Develop embedded software for real-time and resource-constrained systems
* Work with C/C++ and Python to implement reliable software solutions
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams on design, testing, and documentation
* Contribute to system integration and verification activities



  





 We are looking for you who have:
 


* **Bachelor’s or Master’s degree** 
 in Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Embedded Systems, or a related field
* Minimum 4
 **years of experience** 
 in embedded software development
* Strong programming skills in
 **C/C++**
* Experience with
 **Python**
* Professional working proficiency in
 **English**



  





 It would be a great plus if you have:
 


* Experience with
 **Java or MATLAB**
* Background in
 **Swedish high-tech electronics** 
 ,
 **defence** 
 , or
 **automotive industries**
* Knowledge of
 **functional safety** 
 , standards, or regulated environments
* Proficiency in
 **Swedish**



  





*Don’t wait to apply — we’re actively reviewing candidates as applications come in.* 




  





**What we offer you?** 




 Every employee is equally valuable in the success of ALTEN! We believe in growing together by offering opportunities, development and togetherness.
 



 ALTEN operates in several different industries, having a wide variety of assignments, coaching managers and training through ALTEN Academy, which means that it will always be possible to develop at ALTEN. Your wishes will guide your way forward.
 



 As a consultant, you will get the genuine team feeling at your assignment but also a wonderful togetherness at ALTEN. Through our different internal networks, such as Women@ALTEN and ALTEN Sports you will get the opportunity to drive topics and activities that are close to your heart. At ALTEN, we think it's important to have a balance between work and spare time, which is why we offer three extra days off a year. We have a collective agreement and offer benefits like pension, insurances and wellness grants.
 



  





**About ALTEN** 




 ALTEN is one of Europe’s largest technology and IT consulting companies with over 57,000 employees in nearly 30 countries. Our engineers carry out complex and highly technical projects throughout the value chain of the most prestigious companies in all sectors, such as Automotive, Defense, Energy & Environment, Industry, Public services & Government and Life Sciences. In Sweden, we are about 1300 committed employees with 9 offices in 9 cities - from Lund in the south to Skellefteå in the north.
 



 For the fifth year in a row, ALTEN has been named one of Sweden's most attractive employers by Karriärföretagen, an award for employers that offer unique career and development opportunities.
 



 Welcome to read more about us at alten.se

title: Sektionschef – Arkiv, utveckling och förvaltning Regeringskansliet
description:
**RK Informationsförvaltning, Förvaltningsavdelningen**
 Vill du leda och utveckla Regeringskansliets arkivverksamhet och bidra till rättssäker hantering av allmänna handlingar? Hos oss får du kombinera operativt ledarskap med strategisk utveckling av arbetssätt, digitala stöd och styrning – i en miljö med höga krav på kvalitet, säkerhet och service.
   

  

**Din arbetsdag. Sveriges morgondag.**
 Arbetet som chef för sektionen arkiv, utveckling och förvaltning på Regeringskansliet innebär att du planerar, följer upp, samordnar och företräder verksamheten. Du ansvarar för den dagliga driften av verksamheten, samt leder och driver utvecklingen inom sektionens verksamhetsområde. Rollen som sektionschef omfattar personalansvar (ca 12 medarbetare) vilket bl.a. innebär att hålla planerings-, uppföljnings- och lönesamtal samt göra utvecklingsplaner för medarbetarna. Du har budgetansvar och följer löpande upp det ekonomiska utfallet, gör prognos och säkerställer att resultatet följer enhetens samlade budget. Som sektionschef ingår du i enhetens ledningsgrupp där du bidrar till enhetens gemensamma mål och utveckling.
   

  

 Sektionen ansvarar för Regeringskansliets arkivverksamhet. I detta ingår bland annat vård och förvaltning av arkivbestånden, upprättande av styrdokument på området, uppmärksamma och driva utvecklingsinsatser samt ge råd och stöd till myndigheten, utlandsmyndigheterna och kommittéer. Sektionen har också ansvar för tillsyn över utlandsmyndigheternas arkiv och diarieföring. Sektionen ansvarar för den verksamhetsnära förvaltningen och utvecklingen av verksamhetsområdets IT-stöd.
   

  

 Läs mer om vår verksamhet på www.regeringen.se.
   

  

**Din bakgrund**
 Vi söker dig som har högskoleexamen i arkiv- och informationsvetenskap eller annan jämförlig utbildning som arbetsgivaren bedömer relevant. Du har flerårig erfarenhet av arbete som chef med ansvar för personal, budget och arbetsmiljö inom arkiv- och/eller registraturverksamhet i offentlig sektor. Du har gedigen erfarenhet av digital informationshantering med särskilt fokus på arkiv- och registraturprocesser samt dokumenterad vana av att arbeta med förändringsledning och verksamhetsutveckling. Rollen kräver mycket god kunskap om den lagstiftning som reglerar allmänna handlingar, arkivhandlingar samt offentlighet och sekretess. Vidare har du strategisk kompetens inom informationsförvaltning, exempelvis när det gäller styrning av arkivbildning, klassificeringsstrukturer och framtagande av styrdokument. Du har även kunskap om och erfarenhet av informationssäkerhet kopplad till allmänna handlingar, med särskilt fokus på hantering av skyddsvärd information.
   

  

 Det är meriterande om du har genomgått relevanta ledarskapsutbildningar samt har utbildning inom projektledning. Det är även meriterande om du har erfarenhet av att arbeta som projektledare och har deltagit i eller ansvarat för utveckling och förvaltning av IT‑stöd, gärna i en verksamhetsnära och komplex organisation.
   

  

 Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och goda kunskaper i engelska, i tal och skrift, är ett krav.
   

  

**Dina egenskaper**
 Som chef på Regeringskansliet har du helhetssyn och kommunicerar övergripande mål, involverar andra tidigt och främjar samarbete för en enhetlig ledning. Du driver utveckling av verksamhet och arbetsmiljö, leder förändring med mod och uppmuntrar lärande och initiativ till utveckling, samtidigt som du utvecklar din egen kompetens och ditt ledarskap. Du har fokus på resultat genom att prioritera och fatt beslut, visar tillit till medarbetares kompetens genom att stötta och coacha samt hanterar problem i tid. I denna roll värdesätter vi särskilt att du är trygg och stabil samt att din samarbetsförmåga är stark. Du bygger förtroendefulla relationer, samarbetar effektivt över organisatoriska gränser och hanterar olikheter och meningsskiljaktigheter på ett konstruktivt sätt.
   

  

 Läs mer på: Medarbetarskap och ledarskap i Regeringskansliet - Regeringen.se
   

  

**Övrigt**
 Tillsvidareanställning (med sex månaders inledande provanställning) samt ett tidsbegränsat förordnande som chef. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse. Befattningen är placerad i säkerhetsklass och en säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll kommer att genomföras innan beslut om anställning fattas. Du måste vara svensk medborgare, men får gärna ha utländsk bakgrund
   

  

**Är du intresserad?**
 Vill du veta mer om jobbet och vad vi erbjuder, kontakta enhetschef Jenny Savonen. Du är också välkommen att kontakta rekryteringsspecialist Siri Hågefalk. Fackliga kontaktpersoner är Johan Strokirk för Saco och Jan Wahlström för ST. Du når samtliga via Regeringskansliets växel, 08-405 10 00. Vi tar gärna emot samtal från dig som är intresserad av jobbet men vi tackar nej till dig som säljer annonser och rekryteringstjänster.
   

  

 Välkommen att registrera din ansökan i vårt rekryteringsverktyg
 **senast den 2:a juni 2026.**
 I ansökningsformuläret ingår urvalsfrågor kopplade till skallkrav och meriter. Du lämnar korta, verifierbara uppgifter (t.ex. examen, arbetsgivare och tidsperiod). Det tar cirka 5–10 minuter och underlättar en effektiv och rättssäker urvalsprocess enligt LOA.
   

  

 Regeringskansliets uppdrag är att stödja regeringen i dess arbete med att styra Sverige och förverkliga sin politik. Här arbetar 4 800 personer, varav 600 utomlands. Regeringskansliet välkomnar sökande med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter. Vi ser jämställdhet och mångfald som en styrka och tillgång och vi arbetar aktivt för att vara en arbetsplats fri från diskriminering. Förvaltningsavdelningen ansvarar för myndighetsövergripande frågor som förändrings- och förnyelsearbete, ekonomi, arbetsgivarfrågor, kompetensförsörjning, kommunikation, säkerhet, it, bibliotek, arkiv och registratur samt för den gemensamma servicen i Regeringskansliet.

title: Systemadministratör
description:
*Sveriges Skorstensfejaremästares Riksförbund (SSR) är en medlemsägd bransch- och arbetsgivarorganisation för Sveriges sotningsföretag och har cirka 125 anslutna medlemsföretag över hela landet.* 




  





*Våra medlemmar arbetar på uppdrag av kommunerna med sotning och brandskyddskontroll enligt Lagen om skydd mot olyckor (LSO). Sedan starten 1897 har SSR arbetat för ett tryggare samhälle utan eldstadsrelaterade bränder och för en stark, kompetent och hållbar bransch.* 




*Vi har som uppgift att stödja medlemsföretagens verksamheter med råd, stöd och utbildning i olika former. Läs gärna mer på www.sverigessotare.se* 




  





 På vårt kansli i centrala Stockholm är vi ett mindre team som arbetar nära varandra med stort engagemang och hög servicekänsla. Nu förstärker vi organisationen med ytterligare en medarbetare då vi befinner oss i ett större utvecklingsprojekt samtidigt som en av våra erfarna kollegor kommer att gå i pension. Det innebär att du får en gedigen introduktion och möjlighet att växa in i rollen med gott stöd.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 I rollen som systemadministratör arbetar du med support, administration och datahantering kopplat till vårt verksamhetssystem Ritz, ett system som används av medlemsföretagen för bland annat planering, fakturering, ombokningar, klarmarkeringar och protokollhantering. Du blir, tillsammans med närmaste kollegor en viktig kontaktperson för medlemsföretagens administratörer och även företagsledare.
 



  





 I dina arbetsuppgifter ingår bland annat:
 


* Teknisk support till medlemsföretagen via telefon och mejl
* Felsökning och hjälp i samband med exempelvis fakturering eller informationssökning
* Rensning och uppdatering av data i systemet
* Framtagning av rapporter
* Datamigrering i samband med nya upphandlingar, exempelvis import av adresser och registeruppgifter från Excel till Ritz



  





 Eftersom vi är en mindre organisation kan arbetsuppgifterna variera över tid beroende på verksamhetens behov och din bakgrund. Det kan till exempel handla om att hjälpa till med hemsida, administration eller enklare ekonomiuppgifter.
 



  





 Tjänsten utgår från vårt kontor i centrala Stockholm. Arbetstiderna är 08.00–17.00 med viss flexibilitet.
 



  





**Vem vi söker** 




 Det här är rollen för dig som är trygg, noggrann och serviceinriktad och som trivs i en roll där du får hjälpa andra, skapa ordning och se till att allt fungerar som det ska. Du gillar att arbeta strukturerat, har ett öga för detaljer och tycker om att kombinera teknik, administration och support.
 



  





 Du har:
 


* Gymnasieutbildning eller motsvarande
* God IT-teknisk förståelse
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Excel
* Erfarenhet av eller förståelse för SQL-databaser
* Goda kunskaper i svenska, både i tal och skrift



  





 Kanske arbetar du idag inom skorstensfejarbranschen, där erfarenhet, både administrativ och praktisk värdesätts. Eller så har du tidigare arbetat inom helpdesk, systemadministration eller i en administrativ roll inom liknande verksamhet.
 



  





 Som person är du nyfiken, engagerad och tycker om att förstå hur saker fungerar, både i systemen och i verksamheten. När tempot varierar behåller du lugnet och arbetar vidare med fokus på kvalitet och service. Eftersom vi är en mindre organisation är samarbete en viktig del av vardagen. Därför tror vi att du är prestigelös, flexibel och gärna hjälper till där det behövs. Du bidrar med positiv energi och tycker om att skapa goda relationer med både kollegor och medlemsföretag.
 



  





**Ansökan** 




 Vi samarbetar med Consensus och frågor besvaras av Lena Ahlin, 070-374 34 94. Registrera din ansökan på www.consensus.nu så snart som möjligt, dock senast den 31 maj.
 



  





 Välkommen!

title: Head of Development & Automation | Customer Service
description:
Att kundmötet har en central plats i kundresan är en självklarhet för oss på Tre. Vi är cirka 200 medarbetare som varje dag utgör frontlinjen för våra 2 miljoner kunder – och som spelar en avgörande roll för hur Tre upplevs, i varje kontakt.
 



  





 Nu står Customer Operations inför nästa steg i vår utveckling, där digitalisering, AI och automation är nycklar för att skapa enklare, smartare och mer effektiva kundupplevelser. Vi har redan kommit långt på vår resa och står nu inför nästa fas. För att fortsätta driva utveckling och automation söker vi en Head of Development & Automation.
 



  





**Som Head of Development & Automation...** 




  





 ...har du det övergripande ansvaret för att utveckla hur kundservice på Tre arbetar med teknik, AI och automation. Med ett starkt kund‑ och affärsfokus leder du arbetet med att förbättra kundupplevelsen, öka graden av self‑service och minska beroendet av assisterade kontakter genom smart deflection, förbättrade verktyg och effektivare processer. Målet är att förbättra serviceupplevelsen för våra kunder och användare.
 



  





 I din roll ansvarar du för den långsiktiga strategin, prioriteringen och genomförandet av utvecklings‑ och automationsinitiativ inom customer operations. En central del av uppdraget är att fånga behov från kunder, kundserviceledare och medarbetare, översätta dem till tydliga krav och säkerställa att lösningar implementeras med hög kvalitet och skapar verkligt värde – både för kund och verksamhet.
 



  





 Du leder ett CoE med specialister och en Team Manager. Tillsammans driver ni initiativ för att utveckla och optimera våra self‑service‑kanaler, såsom community, chatbots, voicebots och interna stödsystem som help center och contact plattformar. Rollen är en nyckelposition i Tres pågående digitala transformation och innebär ett nära samarbete med flera delar av organisationen, bland annat IT, Product, Network och Comms.
 



  





 Du ingår i Customer Service ledningsgrupp och rapporterar till Chief Customer Service Officer.
 



  





**Och som ledare på Tre…** 




  





 … kommer du att få leva upp till vår målsättning att ditt arbetslivs bästa chef, är den har du på Tre. Det innebär att din ledarroll på Tre innehåller både utveckling, coachning och möjligheten att skapa trygga team som tillsammans utmanar både dig som chef och vår affär.
 



  





 Du är en modig ledare som vågar testa nytt, som inte är rädd för att göra fel – men som samtidigt har förmågan att sätta en långsiktig riktning så att utvecklingen får effekt och inte stannar vid kortsiktiga piloter. Ditt uppdrag är att möjliggöra för ditt team att bli sitt bästa jag, att våga utmana och att tillsammans utvecklas och nå nya nivåer.
 



  





**Du kommer se fram emot att** 



* axla ett strategiskt viktigt uppdrag i hjärtat av Customer Services utvecklingsresa
* driva AI‑ och automationsinitiativ som skapar konkret effekt i form av förbättrad kundupplevelse, ökad self‑service och minskade volymer
* leda och utveckla ett kompetent team i en miljö präglad av förändring och högt tempo
* vara en del av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser enligt Great Place To Work samt att vi är stolt samarbetspartner till Women in Tech och Tjejer Kodar



 ,
 



**Nog om oss, mer om dig** 




 Vi tror att du har dokumenterad ledarerfarenhet och har drivit digitalisering, automation och utvecklingsinitiativ i en kundnära verksamhet, gärna inom customer operations. Genom tidigare erfarenhet av agil produktutveckling, exempelvis som produktägare, liksom bred kunskap om SaaS-system har du förmåga att driva transformation genom produktutveckling. Du är van vid att ta datadrivna beslut med insiktsdrivna affärsmodeller och är duktig på att sälja in dina idéer. Du bör ha erfarenhet av konvertering, gärna från arbete inom e-handel, och kunskap om AI och digital utveckling/webbutveckling. Du är van att arbeta i större eller medelstora organisationer med komplexa beroenden, och trivs i samspel med IT och andra specialistfunktioner.
 



  





 Du har en god teknisk förståelse för hur verksamheten får ut verkligt värde av AI och automation, kombinerat med förmågan att alltid sätta kund‑ och verksamhetsperspektivet i fokus. Har du erfarenhet av Agentisk AI är det ett extra plus. Som person är du kommunikativ, strukturerad och förändringsbenägen. Eftersom du gjort det här i några år så tror vi att du är en fena på stakeholder management, med mycket god förmåga att skapa förtroende och få med dig organisationen på resan framåt. Slutligen behärskar du svenska och engelska obehindrat.
 



  





**Din ansökan** 




 Vi tar emot ansökningar via denna annons och kommer hålla intervjuer löpande. Personligt brev behövs inte, men vi vill gärna att du bifogar CV och svarar på de frågor vi ställt nedan i samband med att du söker. Vi använder tester för att säkra objektiva bedömningar i samband med urval. Tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Bakgrundskontroll görs på slutkandidat.
 



  





**Varmt välkommen till Tre!**

title: System Manager Abasec
description:
*Nordnet is a leading pan-Nordic digital platform for savings and investments. Ever since our start in 1996, our purpose has been to democratize savings and investments. Through passion, simplicity, and transparency, we challenge traditional ways in the financial industry, and give private savers access to the same information, tools and services as professionals. Our ambition is to inspire, encourage and enable people to take their savings to the next level, no matter who they are.*
**This is part of the role**
 We are looking for a highly engaged Nordnet employee as system manager for AbaSec. You will be part of the Tech organization and report to the IT Operations Manager for system management, within the Change & System Management department.
   

  

 You will be one of three system managers for AbaSec and operate on an operative and tactical level, whilst also supporting the system owner on a strategical level.
   

  

 You will collaborate with a large number of stakeholders from almost all departments within Nordnet including product owners, business analysts, engineers, and operational departments
 **.**
 On a daily basis, you will work with system management including development, user management, support, maintenance, and act as the primary contact both internally and to our third-party supplier.
   

  

 On top of that, you will help contribute to the department's overall goals which are to increase the scalability at Nordnet and cut costs. The time spent between system management and other projects will vary over time, depending on the Abasec roadmap, your interest and your personal development.
   

  

**The Role Includes**
* Lead and coordinate development projects in and around AbaSec.
* Capture and meet the demands and requirements together with stakeholders and business owners
* Coordinate with supporting and interacting systems
* Coordinate change activities and development issues
* Manage the relationship with the vendors on an operative and tactical level
* Financial follow-up


**This is you**
 We believe that you are ready to take the next step in your career and wish to develop further. You are careful with details and at the same time easily able to see the larger picture in a process or in an area of work. Social skills together with a technical interest will be the key to your success since you will be working ”in the middle” of things and have contacts both with internal users and external parties.
   

  

 You have a high drive together with a high commitment and you are comfortable with working independently, in an environment where priorities change. Making fast decisions comes natural to you. In addition to this, you have a high learning ability and you are very curious to learn deeply about the technical side of Nordnet, how things connect, and how data hangs together.
   

  

**To succeed in the role, we see that you have experience of**
* Work independently and drive your own initiatives
* Have a deep and broad knowledge of bank back-end processes
* Knowledge in AbaSec or similar systems
* Effective in stakeholder management
* Knowledge in T-SQL is a merit


**This is us**
 We value experimentation and continuous improvement. With an impartial approach, we welcome new ideas to boost our progress. Sharing knowledge and learning from our setbacks is part of the game. We have the courage to ask questions and admit that we do not have the answer, all the time. We believe that straightforward and transparent communication build trust and inclusion.
   

  

 Culture is built and cared for, each day by everyone. We’re proud of ours. Having a flat organization where anyone can talk to anyone creates a warm and friendly atmosphere worth protecting. We believe in a culture where every effort counts and where everyone is being recognized. A culture embracing our core values – passion, simplicity and transparency on all levels, no matter who you are or what you do.
   

  

**Questions & Application**
 Please note that we do only accept applications through our recruitment system, hence no email applications will be considered.
   

  

 If you have questions, please contact Lovisa Malmberg, Talent Acquisition Partner, lovisa.malmberg@nordnet.se.
   

  

 We also want to inform you that Nordnet conducts mandatory credit and background checks, as well as drug testing as part of our recruitment process.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application!

title: Futures Designer (Strategy: Innovation)
description:
**Job Description**

**WHAT YOU'll DO**
  

 As a Senior Futures Designer, you’ll bring future possibilities to life by turning signals, insights, and foresight work into tangible outputs. Working hands-on, you’ll make abstract ideas concrete — helping teams explore what could be, challenge assumptions, and make more informed decisions.
   

  





 You will:
   

  

 • Translate emerging insights, trends, and foresight directions into speculative concepts, artefacts, and prototypes
   

  

 • Design future-oriented experiences, systems, and narratives that explore possible scenarios
   

  

 • Create provocative concepts that expand thinking and challenge the status quo
   

  

 • Build tangible representations of future opportunities through visuals, prototypes, and story-driven artefacts
   

  

 • Develop compelling storytelling that communicates complex and ambiguous ideas clearly
   

  

 • Collaborate across teams to shape exploration directions and opportunity spaces
   

  

 • Contribute to workshops, concept sprints, and broader exploration initiatives
   

  

 • Support leadership conversations with engaging, thought-provoking outputs
   

  

 • Collaborate closely with innovation, futures, and strategy colleagues to materialise future opportunity spaces and exploration themes
   

  





 You’ll also contribute to building long-term futures capabilities and new ways of exploring possible futures across the organisation.
   

  





**WHO YOU'LL WORK WITH**
  

 You’ll be part of the Innovation & Exploration team — a central function shaping and driving H&M Group’s innovation portfolio. The team explores emerging signals, technologies, and strategic themes, translating them into initiatives that can scale across the business or unlock new opportunities.
