In addition to our great culture, you get to work with the latest cutting-edge techniques, full ownership, and last but not least a bunch of great competent colleagues to learn from!
   

  

 One Last Thing
   

  

 This is a full-time, permanent position based in our headquarters in Stockholm. We believe our culture thrives when we work together, which is why we have an office-first approach. To balance this with some flexibility, we have the option of working remotely one day per week. We review applications on a rolling basis and while the start date is flexible, the right candidate can join us immediately.
   

  

*Qred celebrates diversity and does not discriminate based on ethnicity, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability status, or any other applicable characteristics protected by law.*
 Qred is an international FinTech scale-up that specializes in digital financing solutions for small businesses, with operations in the Nordics, Benelux, Germany and Brazil. We are passionate about helping small businesses thrive and grow, by providing them with business loans and credit cards. Right now we’re in an exciting phase of our journey that focuses on growth through smart product development and technology fueled by international expansion.

title: Senior Systems Engingeer
description:
**As a Systems Engineer in our IT department, you’re helping build the digital backbone that powers Epidemic Sound’s global operations. You’ll design, implement, and scale secure, reliable, and automated systems that enable our teams and creators to move fast and innovate without friction.**
 We don’t just “manage tickets” — we’re solving frictionless scale through Okta, Terraform, and AI-driven automation. Your role is to ensure our SaaS ecosystem is fast, secure, scalable and reliable.
   

  

 This is a
 **1-year parental leave cover (vikariat)** 
 with the opportunity to work in a fast-moving, high-impact environment.
   

  

**The Impact**
* Identity & Access Management: Design, implement, and maintain IAM solutions (primarily Okta), enforcing access control policies, MFA, and SSO across the organization. Partner with Cybersecurity to keep us aligned with security standards and best practices.
* SaaS Platform Administration: Own key SaaS platforms including Google Workspace and the Atlassian Suite. Manage licensing, procurement, renewals, cost optimization and handle escalated end-user cases when they come your way.
* Infrastructure as Code & Automation: Build and maintain Terraform templates for provisioning cloud resources, and develop scripts and API integrations (Python, GAM, Bash) to eliminate repetitive work and streamline how IT operates.
* MDM & Device Management: Deploy and manage Mobile Device Management solutions to secure, monitor, and enforce policies across endpoints.
* Documentation, Collaboration & Continuity: Translate business needs into technical solutions alongside IT Support and Enterprise Security. Document configurations and processes, and support backups and disaster recovery planning.


**How You Think & Build**
 You’re a builder who puts users first, making technical decisions based on real needs in a fast-moving, high-growth environment. You bring:
   

  

* Strong background in IAM principles including access control, user provisioning, and SSO with hands-on Okta experience
* Proven experience administering Google Workspace and Atlassian Suite in an enterprise environment
* Experience with SaaS administration, licensing management, and procurement
* Proficiency with scripting and command-line tools (Python, GAM, PowerShell, or Bash)
* Familiarity with automation and API integrations to optimize workflows
* Excellent communication skills and comfortable engaging both technical and non-technical stakeholders


**Bonus**
* Terraform or other Infrastructure as Code tooling
* MDM platforms (e.g. Kandji) and device security management
* Networking fundamentals: firewalls, VPNs, network architecture
* Google Workspace Professional Certification or equivalent


**What You Get**
* Build infrastructure that empowers thousands of colleagues and reaches millions of creators.
* Collaborate globally in a high-talent, high-collaboration team.
* Enjoy market leader stability with scale-up dynamism and autonomy.


 Ready to shape the future of creative tech? Apply now and let the world feel your work.

title: Senior Distributed Systems Engineer - Remote Work
description:
At BairesDev®, we've been leading the way in technology projects for over 15 years. We deliver cutting-edge solutions to giants like Google and the most innovative startups in Silicon Valley.
 



 Our diverse 4,000+ team, composed of the world's Top 1% of tech talent, works remotely on roles that drive significant impact worldwide.
 



 When you apply for this position, you're taking the first step in a process that goes beyond the ordinary. We aim to align your passions and skills with our vacancies, setting you on a path to exceptional career development and success.
 



  





 We’re looking for a Senior Distributed Systems Engineer who understands the mechanics of how large-scale data processing systems actually work. You write Java or Scala, you’ve worked on stream or batch processing infrastructure, and you know how to reason about what happens when distributed systems are under load. You’ll be contributing to open source data platform technology that leading enterprises rely on to process and move critical data — work that rewards both systems thinking and careful engineering.
 



  





 What You’ll Do:
 



  





 - Design and implement distributed system components in Java or Scala for large-scale data processing infrastructure.
 



 - Work on stream and batch processing systems, ensuring they move data reliably and efficiently at scale.
 



 - Apply distributed systems principles to solve problems around fault tolerance, consistency, and throughput.
 



 - Leverage JVM performance knowledge to diagnose and address processing bottlenecks in production.
 



 - Collaborate with data and platform engineering teams to deliver distributed solutions that meet real-world requirements.
 



 - Contribute to code reviews, engineering standards, and technical discussions across the team.
 



  





 What We Are Looking For:
 



  





 - 5+ years of experience in IT roles.
 



 - 3+ years of experience building distributed systems with Java or Scala as the primary language.
 



 - Strong foundation in distributed data processing design and operation.
 



 - Experience with stream or batch processing frameworks and large-scale pipeline infrastructure.
 



 - Solid understanding of JVM performance fundamentals.
 



 - Open source contribution experience is a plus.
 



 - Advanced proficiency in English.
 



  





 How we do make your work (and your life) easier:
 



  





 - Remote Work.
 



 - Excellent compensation in USD or your local currency if preferred
 



 - Hardware and software setup for you to work from home.
 



 - Flexible hours: create your own schedule.
 



 - Paid parental leaves, vacations, and national holidays.
 



 - Innovative and multicultural work environment: collaborate and learn from the global Top 1% of talent.
 



 - Supportive environment with mentorship, promotions, skill development, and diverse growth opportunities.
 



  





 Join a global team where your unique talents can truly thrive and make a significant impact!
 



  





 Apply now!

title: Associate TOC Engineer
description:
Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 150,000 businesses — including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others — rely on Sinch’s Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.


Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.


At Sinch we “Dream Big”, “Win Together”, “Keep it simple”, and “Make it Happen”. These values are our foundation!


**DESCRIPTION**

We are looking for an Associate TOC Engineer to join our Technical Operations Center team in Kalmar. In this role, you will focus on incident management, ensuring smooth operations with internal systems, and providing critical support in resolving technical issues. Additionally, you will play a key role in supporting our operator and provider partners to maintain high-quality service delivery.


We tackle every challenge together as a team, sharing the workload no matter how complex it gets! With our 24/7 operations, we are dedicated to resolving incidents swiftly and keeping business disruptions to an absolute minimum. To help us maintain this high standard of service, your day-to-day responsibilities will include:


* Collaborate with internal teams to ensure smooth resolution of issues.
* Conduct in-depth troubleshooting at both the software and network layers to identify and resolve technical problems.
* Act as Incident Manager for our core services, ensuring timely resolutions and minimizing system downtime.
* Monitor internal alerts and ensure incidents are managed and escalated as needed.
* Document and track alerts and incidents for future improvements.
* Use insights from resolved incidents to drive ongoing system improvements and optimization. to ensure smooth resolution of issues.

**REQUIREMENTS**

Sinch is a tech company through and through where great ideas are listened to and often implemented - we want you to feel part of the bigger picture!


This role is full of challenges and offers plenty of opportunities to grow. To thrive here, you’ll need a curious mindset and a passion for learning. A “can-do” attitude will help you turn obstacles into opportunities and keep you moving forward.


* **Education** : A Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related technical field (or equivalent professional experience).
* **Communication** : Excellent written and verbal English communication skills, with the ability to explain technical issues clearly to both internal teams and external partners.
* **Problem-Solving** : Strong analytical skills and a methodical approach to troubleshooting software or system alerts.
* **Composure** : The ability to stay calm and focused in a high-pressure environment, especially when managing multiple tasks or urgent incidents.
* **Flexibility** : Ability to work in a 24/7 shift rotation, including nights and weekends.
* **Location** : Able to work onsite at our office in Kalmar, Sweden.

In addition to the above, it is a strong advantage if you have:


* Hands-on experience with incident management and platform monitoring.
* Understanding of the TCP/IP protocol suite.
* Experience collaborating effectively with internal teams and stakeholders, demonstrating accountability and the ability to take ownership of issues.
* Knowledge with UNIX and Linux systems.
* Background in telecoms and wireless communication.
* Understanding of mobile communications standards like GSM and 4G.
* Basic SQL skills.

Our corporate language is English, please submit your application in English


**OUR HIRING PROCESS**

We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.


We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/.


No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!
company_description: We help companies to communicate with customers via messaging, voice and video using multiple channels. Simplifying life by bringing all people and businesses together using technology is our purpose.

title: DIGITAL ANALYST
description:
**Company description:**  

Scandinavian Airlines System SAS
  
**Job description:** Digital Analyst – E-commerce performance
  
Scandinavian Airlines (SAS) is looking for a Digital Analyst to strengthen our Digital Sales organization and support the continuous optimization of our e-commerce performance. As part of SAS’s broader digital transformation, this role will play a key part in enabling a more data-driven, insight-led commercial organization.
  
  

Challenges you will work on Turning large volumes of digital and e‑commerce data into clear, actionable insights that support day‑to‑day decision making
  
Understanding and optimizing complex customer journeys across multiple touchpoints and channels
  
Ensuring high-quality tracking and data reliability across digital platforms, in collaboration with product, digital, and IT teams
  
Balancing ad‑hoc insight requests with recurring reporting needs in a fast-paced environment
  
Supporting teams in becoming more data self-sufficient through improved dashboards and reporting solutions
  
Helping stakeholders interpret performance correctly and avoid misreading metrics or attribution results
  
Working in a test‑and‑learn culture where experimentation, iteration, and learning from failures are encouraged
  
Exploring how AI and automation can streamline recurring reporting and free up time for higher-value analysis
  
  

**Key Responsibilities:**  

Analyze e‑commerce performance with a focus on conversion rate (CR) and cost per acquisition (CPA)
  
Deliver regular reports and ad‑hoc analyses to e‑commerce managers and other stakeholders
  
Conduct funnel, journey, and behavioral analyses to identify optimization opportunities
  
Support campaign and attribution analysis together with paid media and performance teams
  
Enable and improve self-service reporting using Google Analytics and related tools
  
Verify, implement, and troubleshoot tracking using Google Tag Manager
  
Support setup, analysis, and follow‑up of A/B tests and experiments
  
Collaborate closely with e‑commerce, product, digital, and IT teams to align measurement and insights with business needs
  
Contribute to maintaining and evolving existing KPIs, and support the definition of new ones when needed
  
Identify and implement opportunities to automate recurring reports and data workflows, reducing manual effort across the team Explore and test AI-assisted tools and methods to enhance analysis, reporting efficiency, and insight generation
  
The Team
  
You’ll join a growing Digital Sales team within eCommerce, responsible for driving digital revenue through performance marketing, optimization of our web and app channels, SEO/SEM, and data-driven analytics. We work closely with Digital/IT, Brand & Marketing, Partnerships, Inflight, and Analytics, and the wider Commercial organization to deliver aligned, high-impact initiatives.
  
To be successful, we believe you have Experience working hands-on with Google Analytics and a good understanding of core e‑commerce metrics
  
The ability to analyze data and translate it into clear insights that support business decisions
  
Basic experience with SQL and a willingness to continue developing your technical skills
  
Hands-on experience with A/B testing and an understanding of experimentation principles
  
Confidence working with tracking and tagging, especially using Google Tag Manager
  
A pragmatic, problem‑solving mindset and enjoyment in digging into details when needed
  
Strong collaboration skills and the ability to work with multiple stakeholders across different teams
  
Openness to feedback, learning, and experimenting in a fast-paced, “fail fast” environment
  
Good communication skills, enabling you to explain data and insights to both technical and non-technical audiences
  
Exposure to BI or visualization tools such as Looker, Power BI, or similar
  
  

**It’s a plus if you also have:**  

Experience working with BigQuery or other cloud-based data warehouses
  
Familiarity with experimentation or CRO tools (e.g. Optimizely, VWO, or similar)
  
Basic knowledge of Python or R for data analysis or automation
  
Experience working with attribution models or media performance analysis
  
Previous experience in e‑commerce, travel, or large-scale digital environments
  
Interest in continuously improving how data, tracking, and insights are used across teams
  
Experience using AI tools to supported data analysis, documentation, or reporting workflows
  
Interests in automation of data pipelines or report generation using Python, SQL scheduling, or BI tool features
  
  

**Additional information Deadline for application:** 29/05/2026. Please send us your CV as soon as possible, as interviews are conducted continuously, and the position may be filled before the application deadline. Note that we are not able to handle any applications that are sent by email, due to GDPR regulations.
  
**Desired start date:** As soon as possible.
  
**Position:** Fulltime (100%) starting with a 6-month probation period.
  
This position is based in Frösundavik, Solna (Stockholm), and you will be expected to work onsite. Remote work may also be an option, depending on the agreement made with your manager.

title: System Engineer till Kafka‑plattformen
description:
Vi söker dig som vill arbeta med Folksams Kafka‑plattform och vara med och bygga en stabil grund för händelsedriven arkitektur i stor skala. Hos oss på Folksam får du arbeta med Kafka på riktigt – inte bara använda det, utan bygga och förvalta en plattform som andra team kan lita på.
  
I rollen arbetar du hands‑on med vår Kafka‑baserade plattform och bidrar till att den är stabil, skalbar och redo för verksamhetskritiska flöden. Fokus är plattform, kvalitet och hållbarhet – som grund för värdeskapande funktionalitet i hela applikationslandskapet.
  
Hos oss arbetar du i trivsamma lokaler vid Skanstull på Södermalm och blir en del av en samlad IT‑enhet med över 700 engagerade kollegor. Tillsammans driver vi en digitaliseringsresa där kundnära lösningar står i centrum och där målet är att göra verklig skillnad för våra miljontals kunder. Vi erbjuder dig möjligheten att arbeta med teknik som är både verksamhetskritisk och långsiktig. Hos oss får du trygghet, balans och långsiktighet. Vi erbjuder konkurrenskraftiga förmåner såsom tjänstepension, omfattande försäkringsskydd, semester och friskvårdsbidrag. Läs mer om våra förmåner https://www.folksam.se/jobb-och-karriar/att-jobba-har/dina-formaner
  
Det här gör du som System Engineer på Folksam
  
  

**Som System Engineer kommer du att arbeta med:**  

Kafka och eventdriven arkitektur i enterprise‑miljö
  
Java‑utveckling av plattformsnära komponenter och tjänster
  
Prestanda‑ och lasttester med K6 för att säkerställa att lösningarna håller även under belastning
  
  

Du blir en del av vårt team på 14 medarbetare, som bland annat ansvarar för Folksams gemensamma eventplattform, och arbetar nära både utvecklingsteam och andra plattformsfunktioner. Vi är en del av Plattform & DX, där vi arbetar med utvecklar- och eventplattformar, CIAM och Contentful, med ett tydligt fokus att underlätta för Folksams utvecklare.
  
  

**Så här beskriver John kulturen och arbetssättet i teamet:**  

"Alla är otroligt kompetenta och hjälpsamma, och stämningen är familjär. Kulturen är öppen och stöttande. Jag uppskattar att det inte är någon "micro management". Vi har tydliga mål och en övergripande plan, och samtidigt frihet att lösa uppgifterna på bästa sätt. Behöver man hjälp, finns det alltid någon att fråga. Vi kommer snabbt framåt och stressnivån är låg."
  
Blir du nyfiken på att veta mer hur John upplever att jobba på Folksam, läs mer https://www.folksam.se/jobb-och-karriar/yrken-och-karriarvagar/mot-nagra-av-oss/it-och-systemutveckling/systemengineer.
  
Är du den vi söker?
  
Vi söker dig som har en stark teknisk grund och gillar att kombinera utveckling med drift. Du är strukturerad, initiativrik och trivs med att samarbeta. Din förmåga att snabbt sätta dig in i nya tekniker gör dig till en viktig del av vårt arbete.
  
Vi ser att du har minst tre års relevant erfarenhet inom systemutveckling eller plattformshantering. Du har också erfarenhet av:
  
Java och relevanta webbramverk som Spring Boot
  
Kafka och eventdriven arkitektur
  
OpenShift och operator-konfiguration
  
  

**Det är meriterande om du har:**  

Erfarenhet av Red Hat-ekosystemet och dess komponenter
  
Publika molntjänster (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud)
  
Authentication, Authorization och RBAC
  
GitLab CI/CD
  
  

Som person är du självgående och driver ditt arbete framåt och uppnår resultat. Du har en god förmåga att samarbeta och utveckla lösningar tillsammans med andra. Vidare bidrar du till en öppen och prestigelös kultur där vi frågar, delar med oss, firar framsteg – och lär av våra misstag. Du tror på teamets kraft, men tar också ansvar för din egen utveckling och leverans.
  
Här kan du göra skillnad
  
Välkommen till Folksam – här driver du viktiga frågor framåt. Från de avgörande detaljerna till de stora perspektiven, med fokus på att förenkla våra kunders vardag. Det gör att du bidrar till något större, oavsett roll. Här finns det många roliga, utvecklande jobb och du har goda chanser till en spännande karriär.
  
Vi tror på ett hållbart arbetsliv och jobbar aktivt med inkludering och mångfald. Våra moderna kontor bjuder in till samarbete och lärande, här får vi saker att hända! Du har flexibiliteten att kunna varva arbete på kontoret med att jobba hemifrån, utifrån verksamhetens behov.
  
Läs mer och se filmer om livet hos oss på https://www.folksam.se/jobb-och-karriar
  
Så söker du jobbet
  
Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag, men senast 31 maj 2026. Vi kommer att genomföra löpande urval till intervju under ansökningstiden.
  
För mer information eller frågor om tjänsten, vänligen kontakta avdelningschef Harald Lönnbro, 073-332 61 46.
  
**Fackliga representanter:** Forena Morgan Svensson 073-423 59 12, Akademikerföreningen Per Hansson 070-831 60 67 och Handels Mikael A Carlsson 070-831 51 32.
  
Kundägda Folksamgruppen erbjuder sedan 1908 försäkringar och sparande som ger trygghet i livets alla skeden. Vi gör det enklare för våra fyra miljoner kunder att känna sig trygga i en hållbar värld genom rätt försäkringar, rätt sparande och rätt hjälp när något händer.

title: Consultant Manager Cybersecurity
description:
We are looking for a Consultant Manager to join us at Telia Cygate.
  

  

Are you ready to lead and develop a regional consulting team, turn challenges into opportunities, and create value for both customers and employees? Are you an experienced leader with a focus on cybersecurity and leadership team collaboration? Then this could be your next opportunity!


My name is **Patrik Lännerberg** , and I lead **Region East at Telia Cygate** , with responsibility for our consulting and sales teams in the Greater Stockholm area. We are experiencing strong momentum in our security business and are therefore now looking for a **Consulting Manager with a focus on our core area: Cybersecurity** .  

  



  

**What you’ll do:**  



As a Consultant Manager in Cybersecurity, you will be part of the region’s leadership team and work closely with the Regional Manager, Sales Manager, and other Consulting Managers to further develop your business area, unlock opportunities, and increase the capacity of our regional consulting teams.  

  



As a Consulant Manager, you are responsible for market awareness within Cyber Security, networking, sales, and driving our business forward while creating value for your area and your consultants. You support and drive sales dialogues, upcoming tenders, and business discussions, and collaborate both regionally and nationally on various key initiatives.  

  



You will have personnel responsibility for a highly skilled and engaged consulting team. We place great emphasis on personal development, and you will work with individual development plans for consultants as well as ensure competence development activities and training.  



  

**Examples of areas of responsibility:**

* Strategic competence supply
* Employee development
* Responsible for forecasting, sales, and budget for the business area
* Actively drive and support sales in upcoming as well as ongoing business dialogues and procurements
* Responsible for the development of services and solutions regionally in collaboration with sales, consultants, customers, and partners

**What will help you thrive in this role:**  



We are looking for someone who is a natural leader with strong people skills and who has experience leading teams in change, with a focus on sales, coaching, training, and inspiring activities. As a person, you are confident, business-oriented, and passionate about people and IT security. In the management team, you see the bigger picture and are prepared to contribute to our overall development.  

  



**Your experience:**

* Experience leading and being responsible for areas within Cybersecurity/IT security.
* You are an experienced leader with very strong references.
* You have experience leading teams and services within Cybersecurity/IT security with a focus on coaching, training, and inspiring activities.
* You are used to working close to the business with service development, budgeting, and procurements.
* You have the ability to translate strategy into tactical initiatives for your business area.
* Previous experience working with B2B sales in an IT company is considered highly meritorious.
Fluency in Swedish and English is required.  
* 

  

**Why Telia Cygate?**  



At Telia Cygate, we’re not only experts in networks, security, and various types of cloud solutions – we’re also a team that believes work should be fun! As part of Telia Company, we have the strength to create real impact on a large scale, contribute to societal value, and help our customers navigate the world of digitalization. And we always do it with warmth, care, and a smile. Here, it’s our ideas and diverse perspectives that make us strong, and together we ensure that the world of technology becomes a place where everyone feels good – and where you belong.


Your development matters to us. We encourage continuous learning and make sure that you and your interests are in focus. We know that people are the heart of our company, which is why we value joy, creativity, and different perspectives in everything we do.


Welcome to grow together with us – where we make technology human and create real impact!


**Telia Cygate** **is proud to be certificated as** **Great** **Place to** **Work!**

With us, people are at the center – here you get the chance to grow, be challenged, and thrive together with dedicated colleagues. We are building a culture where security, togetherness, and opportunities go hand in hand. Do you want to be part of the journey? Welcome to a workplace that truly lives up to its name.


**What we offer**

When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.


**Interested? Apply!**

We look forward to receiving your application by **2026-06-14.** Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!


Location: Solna


If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our **Talent Acquisition Partner.**  

  

Background and reference checks will be part of the process.


Want to know more about this role? Please reach out to Patrik Länneberg at patrik.lannerberg@cygate.se


We kindly ask recruitment agencies and external vendors not to contact us regarding this position.


**Equal opportunities**

At Telia, we recognize talent by professional skills and growth potential. We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status.
  

Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where your uniqueness is our strength.


**Welcome to Telia** **Cygate** **–** **Home of** **Experts**
company_addresses:
Telia Company
Mall of Scandinavia
Solna
Stockholm
Sverige
company_description: Our 21,000 talented colleagues serve millions of customers every day in one of the world’s most connected regions.

title: Senior AI Engineer
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Products & Systems Engineering
* ID 480727-en\_US

At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.


The AI Engineering department at Capgemini Engineering designs and delivers AI/ML solutions to optimize engineering workflows. Our mission is to enable clients with intelligent systems that improve processes, decision-making, and growth opportunities.


We collaborate across Capgemini to provide end-to-end AI capabilities, from data strategy and model development to scalable deployment and continuous improvement. This ensures our solutions are robust, ethical, business-aligned, and scalable.

  

Your role

  

We are seeking skilled and motivated Senior AI Engineers interested in AI solution architecture, development, and deployment. You will design and deliver advanced AI solutions for clients across Sweden and the Nordics, combining AI/ML expertise with business understanding to build scalable, efficient architectures and workflows.


This role blends hands-on engineering with solution design and process optimization. Work includes client project delivery, internal presales and solutioning activities, collaborating with Solution Architects and the Head of AI Engineering.


We offer training, upskilling, and mentoring and welcome candidates who may have less experience but strong skills, mindset, and ambition.

 *In your role you will play a key role in:*

  

* Design and architect end-to-end AI/ML solutions to solve complex client problems and optimize engineering workflows.

  

* Work with clients and stakeholders to translate business needs into technical AI specifications.

  

* Lead hands-on development and deployment of scalable, reliable AI models and platforms.

  

* Drive process optimization, automation, and technology selection while contributing to reusable assets and best practices.

  

* Support team growth and business development through mentoring, staying current on AI trends, participating in presales, and ensuring ethical, compliant AI solutions.

  

Your profile

  

* 8+ years of experience across industries (e.g., Automotive, Manufacturing, Defense, Life Sciences, Telecom, Retail, Finance) with a Master’s or PhD in AI, Computer Science, Data Science, or a related STEM field

  

* Strong expertise in AI solution architecture and process redesign, ideally within industrial environments

  

* Expertise in Python with hands-on experience in AI/ML frameworks and libraries such as PyTrch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, and LangChain

  

* Solid understanding of data and cloud platforms, including Databricks and Snowflake, as well as Azure, AWS, or GCP and their AI/ML services

  

* Experience of MLOps and end-to-end model lifecycle, combined with a proactive, strategic mindset and strong problem-solving, communication, and leadership skills (English fluency required; Swedish is a plus)

Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.
company_description: Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value.

title: Sales Coordinator till Business Sales Support
description:
Vill du bli en del av ett team som får saker att hända – varje dag?
  
Hos oss på Tre är Business Sales Support en viktig del av företagsaffären, där vi supporterar våra säljteam med snabb, professionell och lösningsorienterad support.
  
  

Om rollen
  
  

Som Sales Coordinator hos oss ingår du i ett sammansvetsat team som varje dag ser till att säljarna kan fokusera på det de gör bäst – att skapa affärer. Din roll är att supportera våra interna företagssäljare och återförsäljare och ge dem det administrativa stödet de behöver för att lyckas.
  
  

Du hanterar säljsupportärenden som kreditupplysningar, nummerporteringar och enklare felsökningar och har daglig kontakt med interna och externa parter via mejl och telefon. Det är en stor efterfrågan på vår support och det går bra för Tre Företag och vi växer vilket gör det viktigt att du kan arbeta strukturerat och effektivt även när tempot dagligen är högt.
  
  

Du kan se fram emot att
  
  

Tillhöra ett team där man stöttar varandra, presterar ihop och har roligt på vägen.
  
Utvecklas i en miljö där initiativ, engagemang och lösningsfokus värderas högt.
  
Ingå i en lärande kultur där vi tillsammans strävar mot utveckling.
  
Att vara en del av en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser.
  
Några av våra medarbetare
  
Julia Maxén
  
Gruppchef
  
"Jag vill att mitt team ska få de bästa förutsättningarna för att göra sitt jobb på bästa sätt. Det är så vi utvecklar oss som team, men även utvecklar Tre framåt."
  
Henrik Sundvall
  
Digital projektledare
  
"Det absolut bästa med att vara projektledare på Tre är jag får jobba brett med kollegor från alla delar av organisationen och få lära mig nya saker varje dag. Jag har friheten att vara mig själv – och bli uppskattad för det!"
  
Jayasri Battola
  
Utvecklare
  
"The great work culture and the technology made me choose Tre. Working alongside great people in mixed team setups, with both experienced and new talents, along with the latest and greatest tools and technologies like Cloud and Azure."
  
  

Vem är du
  
  

Du trivs i en miljö där det händer mycket och där tempot är högt. Att hantera många ärenden samtidigt ser du inte som ett problem – tvärtom ger det dig energi. Du är nyfiken och gillar att förstå helheten, men vet också när det är dags att ta snabba beslut och gå vidare för att hålla flödet igång.
  
  

Du har en god känsla för vad som är mest prioriterat här och nu, och du kan anpassa dig när förutsättningarna ändras. Samarbete och kommunikation kommer naturligt för dig, och du vet att resultatet blir som bäst när teamet jobbar tillsammans.
  
  

Vi ser gärna att du har erfarenhet från tidigare koordinatorroller samt ett starkt servicefokus. Erfarenhet av arbete inom B2B är meriterande. Gymnasieutbildning är ett krav. Du behärskar både svenska och engelska flytande i tal och skrift, med särskilt god förmåga att uttrycka dig i skriftlig kommunikation.
  
  

Välkommen med din ansökan
  
  

Vi tar emot ansökningar via denna annons och kommer hålla intervjuer löpande. Personligt brev behövs inte, men vi vill gärna att du bifogar CV och svarar på de frågor vi ställt nedan i samband med att du söker. Vi använder tester för att säkra objektiva bedömningar i samband med urval. Tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Bakgrundskontroll görs på slutkandidat.
  
  

Vi har riktigt bra förmåner
  
  

Friskvårdsbidrag, föräldrarlön, pension & försäkringar enligt kollektivavtal
  
  

Flexibla helgdagar och sex dagar extra ledigt per år
  
  

Hundzon & gym i 3huset
  
  

Subventionerad lunch
  
  

Förmånliga rabatter på cyklar, kollektivtrafik och elbilar
  
  

Generösa bonusmodeller eller provisioner
  
  

Vi drivs av att hela tiden försöka göra saker bättre, på nya och annorlunda sätt. Vi ser oss själva som en avgörande del av Sveriges samhällsstruktur, eftersom vi vet att pålitlig uppkoppling är en viktig grundsten i dagens digitala värld.
  
  

Tre föddes som utmanare och är en organisation i ständig rörelse. Vi strävar efter att vara i framkant i allt vi gör. Vi är övertygade om att det är människorna och kulturen på Tre som är avgörande för vår utveckling.
  
  

När du startar din resa på Tre finns det oändliga möjligheter att växa och utvecklas med oss.
  
  

WE THINK LIKE CHALLENGERS - I en föränderlig värld, är vi på Tre nyfikna och ständigt öppna för nya lösningar. På Tre anpassar vi vägen framåt allt eftersom vi provar och lär oss vad som funkar bäst.
  
  

WE WORK LIKE CHAMPIONS - På Tre gör vi alltid vårt bästa. Vi känner ägandeskap för vår uppgift, sätter tydliga mål och håller fokus på det som gör mest nytta för affären.
  
  

WE ACT LIKE BUDDIES - På Tre är vi schyssta kollegor. Vi samarbetar med varandra över team och funktioner, vi bollar idéer, ger och tar emot feedback.
  
  

Enable "functional cookies" to watch the video
  
  

2003
  
Tre först i Sverige med videosamtal och strömning av mobil video. Att se personen som du ringer upp i ögonen är en helt ny upplevelse vid den här tidpunkten.
  
  

2006
  
Tre lanserar mobilt bredband som tredje operatör i världen. Under de kommande fem åren vinner Tre pris för Sveriges snabbaste mobila bredband.
  
  

2013
  
Tre’s systerbolag Hallon startas med en vision att vara den enkla mobiloperatören utan onödigt krångel.
  
  

2019
  
Ett händelserikt år! 3Världen lanseras som innebär att kunder kan surfa i 80 länder till samma pris som inom Sverige. Därefter lanseras 3Samla som gör att alla kunder kan lägga till fler användare till sitt abonnemang och sist men inte minst är Tre först i Sverige med ett lansera ett publikt 5G-nät.
  
  

2025
  
Tele2 Arena byter från 1 januari namn till 3Arena. Med vår starka passion för innovation, uppkoppling och upplevelser ska vi medverka till arenans och områdets utveckling.

title: Team Manager Customer Relations & Admin Support till Tre
description:
Vill du leda två team som arbetar med några av kundserviceorganisationens mest komplexa och affärskritiska frågor? Trivs du i en roll där ledarskap, förbättringsarbete och kundfokus går hand i hand? Då kan det här vara rollen för dig.
  
  

Om rollen
  
I rollen som Team Manager ansvarar du för två specialistteam inom kundserviceorganisationen med totalt 12 medarbetare. Teamen arbetar med våra mest komplexa kundärenden och hanterar bland annat reklamationsärenden, dataskyddsincidenter samt skriftlig kundkommunikation via chatt och mejl. Rollen innebär fullt personal och resultatansvar.
  
  

Som ledare ansvarar du för att leda, coacha och utveckla dina medarbetare genom ett nära och engagerat ledarskap. Du arbetar aktivt med medarbetarsamtal, coachning, uppföljning och teamutveckling. Även om medarbetarna sitter på hög specialistkompetens söker vi dig som kan bidra med vägledning och utveckling inom exempelvis konsumenträtt och dataskyddsfrågor.
  
  

Rollen innebär också ett stort fokus på förbättringsarbete och utveckling av arbetssätt och processer. Du driver utvecklingen framåt genom att identifiera förbättringsområden, effektivisera administrativa flöden och bidra till smartare och mer hållbara arbetssätt för både kunder och medarbetare. Du fungerar som kundens röst i organisationen och arbetar aktivt för att sprida kundinsikter inom Tre.
  
  

**Du kan se fram emot att:**  

Ha en viktig roll i en organisation där kundupplevelsen står i centrum och där utveckling, innovation och samarbete är en naturlig del av vardagen.
  
Möjlighet att påverka, utveckla och göra skillnad – både för kunderna och för teamet du leder.
  
Ha en plats på en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser (jajamen, flera år i rad har vi blivit utnämnda till Great place to work)
  
Några av våra medarbetare
  
Julia Maxén
  
Gruppchef
  
"Jag vill att mitt team ska få de bästa förutsättningarna för att göra sitt jobb på bästa sätt. Det är så vi utvecklar oss som team, men även utvecklar Tre framåt."
  
Henrik Sundvall
  
Digital projektledare
  
"Det absolut bästa med att vara projektledare på Tre är jag får jobba brett med kollegor från alla delar av organisationen och få lära mig nya saker varje dag. Jag har friheten att vara mig själv – och bli uppskattad för det!"
  
Jayasri Battola
  
Utvecklare
  
"The great work culture and the technology made me choose Tre. Working alongside great people in mixed team setups, with both experienced and new talents, along with the latest and greatest tools and technologies like Cloud and Azure."
  
  

Vem är du?
  
  

Vi söker dig som har tidigare ledarerfarenhet inom kundservice och som är van vid att arbeta i en verksamhet där tempot är högt och förändring är en naturlig del av vardagen. Du kommunicerar obehindrat på svenska och engelska. Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av arbete med konsumenträtt och dataskyddsfrågor, liksom erfarenhet av skriftlig kundkommunikation och system som Zendesk.
  
  

För att lyckas i rollen behöver du trivas i en bred och varierad vardag där du ständigt prioriterar mellan olika frågor och snabbt kan växla fokus när verksamheten kräver det. Du behöver vara trygg i att fatta affärsmässiga beslut och kunna göra bedömningar i komplexa situationer, exempelvis kring vilka ärenden som ska drivas vidare och när det är rätt att agera annorlunda. Rollen kräver hög grad av självständighet och en god förmåga att hålla ihop helheten samtidigt som du har koll på detaljerna.
  
  

Som person tror vi att du är strukturerad, affärsmedveten och förbättringsdriven. Du har ett starkt självledarskap, god samarbetsförmåga och ett naturligt driv att utveckla både människor och arbetssätt. Du är nyfiken på förändring och ser möjligheter i den tekniska utveckling som påverkar framtidens kundservice.
  
  

Vi har riktigt bra förmåner
  
  

Friskvårdsbidrag, föräldrarlön, pension & försäkringar enligt kollektivavtal
  
  

Flexibla helgdagar och sex dagar extra ledigt per år
  
  

Hundzon & gym i 3huset
  
  

Subventionerad lunch
  
  

Förmånliga rabatter på cyklar, kollektivtrafik och elbilar
  
  

Generösa bonusmodeller eller provisioner
  
  

Vi drivs av att hela tiden försöka göra saker bättre, på nya och annorlunda sätt. Vi ser oss själva som en avgörande del av Sveriges samhällsstruktur, eftersom vi vet att pålitlig uppkoppling är en viktig grundsten i dagens digitala värld.
  
  

Tre föddes som utmanare och är en organisation i ständig rörelse. Vi strävar efter att vara i framkant i allt vi gör. Vi är övertygade om att det är människorna och kulturen på Tre som är avgörande för vår utveckling.
  
  

När du startar din resa på Tre finns det oändliga möjligheter att växa och utvecklas med oss.
  
  

WE THINK LIKE CHALLENGERS - I en föränderlig värld, är vi på Tre nyfikna och ständigt öppna för nya lösningar. På Tre anpassar vi vägen framåt allt eftersom vi provar och lär oss vad som funkar bäst.
  
  

WE WORK LIKE CHAMPIONS - På Tre gör vi alltid vårt bästa. Vi känner ägandeskap för vår uppgift, sätter tydliga mål och håller fokus på det som gör mest nytta för affären.
  
  

WE ACT LIKE BUDDIES - På Tre är vi schyssta kollegor. Vi samarbetar med varandra över team och funktioner, vi bollar idéer, ger och tar emot feedback.
  
  

Enable "functional cookies" to watch the video
  
  

2003
  
Tre först i Sverige med videosamtal och strömning av mobil video. Att se personen som du ringer upp i ögonen är en helt ny upplevelse vid den här tidpunkten.
  
  

2006
  
Tre lanserar mobilt bredband som tredje operatör i världen. Under de kommande fem åren vinner Tre pris för Sveriges snabbaste mobila bredband.
  
  

2013
  
Tre’s systerbolag Hallon startas med en vision att vara den enkla mobiloperatören utan onödigt krångel.
  
  

2019
  
Ett händelserikt år! 3Världen lanseras som innebär att kunder kan surfa i 80 länder till samma pris som inom Sverige. Därefter lanseras 3Samla som gör att alla kunder kan lägga till fler användare till sitt abonnemang och sist men inte minst är Tre först i Sverige med ett lansera ett publikt 5G-nät.
  
  

2025
  
Tele2 Arena byter från 1 januari namn till 3Arena. Med vår starka passion för innovation, uppkoppling och upplevelser ska vi medverka till arenans och områdets utveckling.

title: Technology Product Manager
description:
**About the Role**
------------------


Wolters Kluwer is seeking a Lead Technology Product Manager to take end-to-end ownership of strategically important products across Scandinavia. In this senior role, you will combine deep customer understanding, strong commercial judgment, and technology insights to drive product success in a cloud- and AI-driven environment. You will operate with significant autonomy and accountability while collaborating closely with business, technology, and European stakeholders.

**Your Mission**
----------------


You will ensure that assigned products deliver strong customer value, market fit, and commercial success. You will guide products from strategy and roadmap definition through launch and continuous improvement, while actively removing obstacles and driving alignment across organizations.

**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

* Act as the primary connection point between business and Product Management
* Own product vision, strategy, roadmaps, and prioritization across Scandinavia
* Lead cross-Scandinavian product portfolio areas
* Explore business development opportunities within our core strategic markets
* Own commercial success and market fit of assigned products
* Prepare and present business cases for strategic and investment decisions
* Manage partner products and strategic partnerships
* Collaborate closely with software development teams in an Agile environment
* Support marketing, sales, and customer success in go-to-market and onboarding activities

**What You Bring**
------------------

* Proven experience as a senior Product Manager in a software or SaaS organization
* Strong business acumen and commercial mindset
* Industry knowledge within accounting, tax advisory, and practice management
* Solid understanding of cloud technologies, AI-driven solutions, and modern development practices
* Experience working in Agile environments; SAFe experience is an advantage
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills
* Willingness to travel regularly within Scandinavia
* Fluent in English; Scandinavian language skills are a plus

**Why Wolters Kluwer**
----------------------


You will join a global knowledge and technology leader while working in a role with significant regional influence. This position offers the opportunity to shape the future of digital accounting and advisory solutions across Scandinavia and to work with experienced professionals on market-leading cloud platforms

**Our Interview Practices**
---------------------------

*To maintain a fair and genuine hiring process, we kindly ask that all candidates participate in interviews without the assistance of AI tools or external prompts. Our interview process is designed to assess your individual skills, experiences, and communication style. We value authenticity and want to ensure we’re getting to know you—not a digital assistant. To help maintain this integrity, we ask to remove virtual backgrounds and include in-person interviews in our hiring process. Please note that use of AI-generated responses or third-party support during interviews will be grounds for disqualification from the recruitment process.*

*Applicants may be required to appear onsite at a Wolters Kluwer office as part of the recruitment process.*
company_description: Join us, at Wolters Kluwer, and be part of a dynamic global technology company that makes a difference every day.

title: Cloud & Infrastructure Architect
description:
#### **Location**

Sweden, Stockholm, Norway, Oslo
#### **Apply by**

2026-06-19
  
### **Role Overview**


As a **Cloud & Infrastructure Architect**, you will be responsible for shaping, governing and evolving Strawberry’s digital foundation across cloud and infrastructure platforms. You will lead the architectural direction for our multi-cloud environment spanning GCP, AWS and Azure, while driving the transition away from remaining on-premise environments.


The role combines strategic leadership with hands-on technical guidance. You will define the target direction for our cloud providers and infrastructure landscape while working closely with product and technology teams to ensure scalable, secure and efficient solutions.  

  

You will drive operational excellence through cloud-native principles, infrastructure automation and DevFinOps practices, ensuring that our platforms remain reliable, cost-efficient and aligned with business growth.

### **Key Responsibilities**

* **Multi-Cloud Governance:** Define and execute a unified infrastructure strategy across GCP, Azure, and AWS. Act as the technical authority for in-house GCP/AWS management while providing strategic oversight for Azure (managed by a CSP).
* **Infrastructure Lifecycle:** Lead the roadmap for on-premise decommissioning. Perform cost/benefit analyses to decide between asset retention and cloud migration.
* **Product Partnership:** Collaborate directly with product and tech teams to architect cloud native solutions, ensuring new initiatives are born in the cloud with best-practice architecture.
* **Drive DevFinOps & Automation:** Implement infrastructure automation (IaC) and integrate financial accountability into the engineering culture to optimize cloud spend.
* **Security & Compliance:** Design secure cloud and infrastructure architectures across multi-cloud environments. Define and maintain security standards, hardening guidelines, and architectural principles to ensure secure-by-default platforms. Perform security architecture reviews and collaborate with the Tech Security team to ensure secure and compliant platforms.
* **Vendor & Stakeholder Management:** Manage high-level relationships with external service providers (CSPs) and internal leadership to align infrastructure capabilities with business growth.

### **Mandates & Authority**

* **Strategic Execution:** Authority to implement the overarching cloud and infrastructure roadmap across all platforms.
* **Operational Standards:** Mandate to establish and enforce best practices, naming conventions, security guardrails, and architectural patterns across the organization.
* **Resource Optimization:** Accountability for the performance, cost-efficiency, and successful deployment of all cloud and residual on-premise components.

### **Qualifications**

* **Experience:** 5+ years in Cloud Architecture or senior infrastructure roles, with experience from hybrid and multi-cloud environments.
* **Multi-Cloud Mastery:** Deep hands-on experience with **GCP** and **AWS**. Solid architectural knowledge of **Azure** (even if managed via a third party).
* **Security & Governance:** Strong understanding of cloud security architecture, infrastructure hardening, IAM, governance, and secure-by-design principles across multi-cloud environments, including familiarity with frameworks and regulations such as ISO 27001, NIST, and GDPR.
* **Legacy-to-Cloud Transition:** Proven track record of managing data center decommissioning and migrating legacy workloads to SaaS or cloud platforms.
* **Financial Acumen:** Strong understanding of cloud unit economics and FinOps, balancing operational excellence, cost efficiency and business value.
* **Communication:**Ability to translate complex technical debt and architectural concepts into business value for stakeholders and product owners.
* **Education:** Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related technical field.

### **What We Offer:**

* **Real Impact:** Be a part of a dynamic transformation and contribute directly to our success story.
* **Empowerment:** Work in a flat organization with trust, autonomy, and the opportunity to make a real difference.
* **Growth & Development:** Access professional development opportunities to enhance your skills and advance your career.
* **Fun & Community:** Enjoy a vibrant work environment with plenty of social events and team-building activities**.**
* **Fantastic Perks:** Benefit from great employee discounts, including staff and friends & family rates at our hotels.
* **Flexible Work:** Enjoy the best of both worlds with our hybrid model, with three days of in-person collaboration at our Oslo or Stockholm HQ.
company_description: We are Strawberry. With over 225 hotels, 120 restaurants, 20 spas and more, we create thousands of experiences every day. Join a world of experiences!

title: SUPPORT ASSISTANT – TEST NETWORK TEAM
description:
SUPPORT ASSISTANT – TEST NETWORK TEAM  

Location: Sweden, Stockholm


The CSG Assure team develops advanced telecom testing software solutions used by mobile operators across the globe, including leading operators like AT&T, Tata, Orange.


CSG Assure is an artificial test traffic generation platform consisting of a central cloud-based application and a test network of over 1 000 test probes in 200 countries simulating mobile users globally.


We are looking for a Support Assistant to join our test network management team. This is an entry‑level role and a great opportunity for someone at the beginning of their career who wants hands‑on experience in technical operations, customer support and service provider coordination.


You will work closely with more experienced colleagues and gradually take on more responsibility as you learn our systems, services, and processes.


Key Responsibilities  

* Daily monitoring of test network devices, troubleshooting of issues
* Cooperation over email and phone with our hosting partners across the globe
* Preparation of hardware and shipping with customs clearance procedures
* Ensure that testing SIM cards are active and topped up
* Handle customer and internal support tickets

Required Skills  

* High School / Upper Secondary School Diploma
* Curious, service‑minded, eager to learn
* Ability to work with a mix of technical and administrative tasks


- Structured, reliable and able to work independently- General interest in IT, networks, telecom  

* Good general troubleshooting skills
* Good written and verbal communication skills in English

Why should you apply?  

* Join a dynamic organization providing solutions to world-leading communication service providers
* Real responsibility from day one, with room to grow
* Exposure to telecom, IT operations, and international services
* Be part of a collaborative, innovative, international team

CSGer Perks & Benefits  

* Employee Belonging Groups
* Healthcare: Medical, and Vision
* Paid Vacation, Volunteer, and Holiday Time Off

And so much more!  



  

Key Words: Telecom software, Mobile networks, Support analyst, Support assistant, Operations support, Incident handling, Coordination


Please submit your application at csgi.com/careers. Applications will be accepted for at least 5 days from original posting date.

**Position Pay Range:**

*This range represents the low and high end of the salary range for this position. Actual salaries will vary based on factors including but not limited to geographical location and experience.*


kr254,609.35-kr407,366.44
This role is eligible for a bonus opportunity.

**Location(s):**


SE.Stockholm.Office**Accommodation:**


If you would like to be considered for employment opportunities with CSG and need special assistance due to a disability or accommodation for a disability throughout any aspect of the application process, please call us at +1 (402) 431-7440 or email us at accommodations@csgi.com. CSG provides accommodations for persons with disabilities in employment, including during the hiring process and any interview and/or testing processes.


**Our Guiding Principles:**

**Impact:** Always help and empower others, whether they’re colleagues or customers. When our employees set their minds to something, great things happen.

**Integrity:** Do what’s right for our customers and our people while being authentic. We treat everyone with trust and respect—that’s just who we are.

**Inspiration:** Be bold in the way you think and passionate about the work you do. Test out innovative ideas without the fear of failure.

**Our Story:**
--------------


CSG empowers companies to build unforgettable experiences, making it easier for people and businesses to connect with, use and pay for the services they value most. For over 40 years, CSG's technologies and people have helped some of the world's most recognizable brands solve their toughest business challenges and evolve to meet the demands of today's digital economy.


By channeling the power of all, we make ordinary customer and employee experiences extraordinary. Our people [CSGers] are fearlessly committed and connected, high on integrity and low on ego, making us the easiest company to do business with and the best place to work. We power a culture of integrity, innovation, and impact across our locations, representing the most authentic version of ourselves to build a better future together. That's just who we are.

*Learn more about CSG Inclusion & Impact here.*
company_description: By channeling the power of all, we make ordinary customer and employee experiences extraordinary.

title: Account Executive
description:
Overview:  

This is more than a job. It’s a chance to build, grow, and make a real impact! Join our team as our new **Senior Account Executive for the Nordics Region** (Sweden, Norway, Denmark, Finland) to sign new logos and grow relationships with existing partners and customers.
Responsibilities:
* **Revenue achievement**
* Setting and implementing
* + Strategic plans to address named customer needs
	+ Tactical sales plans to work on key client projects and to close deals on time
	+ Forecast
* Building full Axway customers approach including Sales, Services, Presales and Support
* Achieving quarterly and yearly License, Cloud and Services revenue
* Working to sign new logos and to generate new opportunities through the development of a solid partner’s ecosystem and marketing initiatives
* **Customer Relationships**
* Become a trusted adviser of key execs in the account
* Bring a vision into the accounts, to meet exec and to contribute to customer digital transformation
* Leverage insight of business issues and industry trends
* Build network of stakeholders at all level and establish strong & sustainable relationships with key executives and decision makers in strategic accounts
* Develop a strong customer satisfaction culture
* Qualify the landscape of partners within the account, software vendors and other technology vendors
* **Partner Relationships**
* Create and maintain productive relationships with key partners in territory
* Collaborate with partners to create and review joint pipeline of opportunities, and establish a success plan on deals


Qualifications:  

* Strong, dynamic, determined and customer-oriented personality with power of endurance
* Hunter, always willing to extend his footprint and to grow the revenue
* Strong general business culture (industry trends, enterprise organization, dept role...)
* Passionate about developing long-term & high-level customer & partner relations
* Expert to achieve revenue goals with a rigor based on measurable and ambition indicators (Excellent in Execution)
* Ability to work as a sales leader to motivate and engage Axway presales, services, marketing, partner and support teams in customers projects.
* Ability to work with a large ecosystem of partners, ISV...
* Enjoy working in trust and autonomy with a high-level sense of ethic & responsibility.
* Capacity for teamwork and to inspire positive behaviors
* Excellent communication skills (oral & written)
* Degree level or equivalent: Master in business administration, Engineering, Business Informatics or similar
* 5+ years’ experience in B2B Software Solution Sales to Large Enterprises is mandatory
* Experiences in on premise & Cloud/SaaS based software solutions sales, ERP and business application and/or Middleware sector
* Good English language skills

 **Company Overview**


Axway has been shaping the future of enterprise integration for over 25 years. We are recognized as global industry leaders, helping organizations drive digital transformation with secure, mission-critical software that powers impactful business outcomes.


As part of **74Software**, we’re backed by a group of leading software companies delivering mission-critical solutions worldwide. Our focus is on delivering long-term value, leveraging cutting-edge technology, and fostering strong client partnerships. Join us and be part of a collaborative, forward-thinking team shaping the future of enterprise integration solutions. **Why Axway?**


At Axway, we believe we’re better together. We celebrate diverse perspectives and experiences, knowing our people are our greatest strength. Join us and be part of a team where you can thrive, grow, and make an impact.  

We offer benefits that support your health, growth, and lifestyle, so you can thrive at work and beyond, including health coverage, retirement plans, paid time off, flexible work, career development, competitive pay, and global culture perks.

**Equal Opportunity Employer**


We are committed to providing equal opportunities and ensuring a fair and inclusive recruitment process. We do not discriminate on the basis of age, disability, gender, sexual orientation, race, religion, or any other protected characteristic.

 **#LI-AM1**

title: Test Engineer - Tieto Caretech (m/f/d)
description:
Luleå, Sweden


* Full-time
* Application and Product Development
* Hybrid
* Tieto Caretech

  
Job Description **At Tieto Caretech you’ll get a chance to provide patients and end users with purposeful technology and product offerings that help them in their life. If that sounds interesting, please keep on reading.**  



**About us**


Through advanced, intuitive technology, Tieto Caretech reduces administrative work, improves decision-making, and strengthens safety and quality in health and social care. With the Lifecare software portfolio we enable health and social care professionals to focus on what matters most: people.  



We are a global team of professionals working on providing products and services to different sectors from intensive care to laboratory and social care. In addition to working closely with our customers, we also have our own products that we build and develop for various fields in society. From enabling healthcare professionals to spend more valuable time with their patients to providing data for professional athletes to achieve even better results, we make all that possible. With us you can be part of advancing societies through purposeful technology and make your mark on the health and wellbeing of people.  



**About the role**


In the Orbit team, we develop the leading operating room planning system in the Nordics. Our team consists of developers, colleagues in test/support, project managers, technicians and product owner.


We are a close-knit team characterized by a democratic spirit, strong customer relationships, and a collaborative working environment. While each employee enjoys a high degree of autonomy, support from the team is always close at hand.


You will work closely with the test lead and development team to identify test areas, define test scenarios, analyse results, and evaluate system quality. Collaboration and continuous dialogue with developers are key parts of the role.  



**In this role you will**

* Test the Orbit application to ensure it is stable and bug-free
* Identify test areas and define relevant test scenarios
* Analyse test results and evaluate product quality
* Collaborate closely with developers and other stakeholders
* Contribute to documentation and reporting in Swedish and English

  

**We are looking for someone with**

* Experience working with support and testing of IT systems
* Good knowledge of Microsoft products and a solid understanding of how applications work
* Fluency in Swedish and English, both written and spoken
* A service-oriented mindset, positive attitude, and strong quality focus
* Ability to work both independently and as part of a team

  

**It would be beneficial if you also**

* Have formal education in software testing
* Have experience from the healthcare sector


Most importantly, you have a strong passion and genuine interest in testing.

 **What’s in it for you?**

With us you will be part of the important and meaningful work of developing healthcare for all of us. You have an important mission to make a difference that really matters. In addition, as a company we offer you professional growth, open and friendly culture, and an outstanding work-life balance! We believe that our organizational culture is an important part of enabling you to be successful. We provide a flexible hybrid work model as part of our culture and way of working.


Finally, we also believe in curiosity and learning as a lifestyle. We want to encourage you to keep up that curiosity and deepen your knowledge on topics you’re interested in. For example, we host a ‘Keep Learning Week’ twice a year, a week where everyone at Tieto has the possibility to join different training courses in a truly global setting.  



**Could you be our new colleague?**


We look forward to hearing from you! We will fill the position as soon as we find the right person, so we encourage you to apply today. If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact the hiring manager annika.nivestam@tieto.com

 *We perform background checks on all final candidates.*

*Tieto declines calls from recruitment companies.*

  

Additional Information  

At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.


Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)


  
**We are Tieto - A leading software and technology consulting company**


We provide customers across different industries with mission-critical solutions through our specialized software businesses Tieto Caretech, Tieto Banktech and Tieto Indtech as well as Tieto Tech Consulting business.


Our around 14 000 talented vertical software, design, cloud and AI experts are dedicated to empowering our customers to succeed and innovate with latest technology.


Tieto’s annual revenue is approximately EUR 2 billion. The company’s shares are listed on the NASDAQ exchange in Helsinki and Stockholm, as well as on Oslo Børs.
company_description: Join our team to create purposeful technology that reinvents the world. For good.

* Analyse test results and evaluate product quality
* Collaborate closely with developers and other stakeholders
* Contribute to documentation and reporting in Swedish and English

  

**We are looking for someone with**

* Experience working with support and testing of IT systems
* Good knowledge of Microsoft products and a solid understanding of how applications work
* Fluency in Swedish and English, both written and spoken
* A service-oriented mindset, positive attitude, and strong quality focus
* Ability to work both independently and as part of a team

  

**It would be beneficial if you also**

* Have formal education in software testing
* Have experience from the healthcare sector


Most importantly, you have a strong passion and genuine interest in testing.

 **What’s in it for you?**

With us you will be part of the important and meaningful work of developing healthcare for all of us. You have an important mission to make a difference that really matters. In addition, as a company we offer you professional growth, open and friendly culture, and an outstanding work-life balance! We believe that our organizational culture is an important part of enabling you to be successful. We provide a flexible hybrid work model as part of our culture and way of working.


Finally, we also believe in curiosity and learning as a lifestyle. We want to encourage you to keep up that curiosity and deepen your knowledge on topics you’re interested in. For example, we host a ‘Keep Learning Week’ twice a year, a week where everyone at Tieto has the possibility to join different training courses in a truly global setting.  



**Could you be our new colleague?**


We look forward to hearing from you! We will fill the position as soon as we find the right person, so we encourage you to apply today. If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact the hiring manager annika.nivestam@tieto.com

 *We perform background checks on all final candidates.*

*Tieto declines calls from recruitment companies.*

  

Additional Information  

At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.


Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)


  
**We are Tieto - A leading software and technology consulting company**


We provide customers across different industries with mission-critical solutions through our specialized software businesses Tieto Caretech, Tieto Banktech and Tieto Indtech as well as Tieto Tech Consulting business.


Our around 14 000 talented vertical software, design, cloud and AI experts are dedicated to empowering our customers to succeed and innovate with latest technology.


Tieto’s annual revenue is approximately EUR 2 billion. The company’s shares are listed on the NASDAQ exchange in Helsinki and Stockholm, as well as on Oslo Børs.
