title: Associate TOC Engineer
description:
Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 150,000 businesses — including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others — rely on Sinch’s Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.


Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.


At Sinch we “Dream Big”, “Win Together”, “Keep it simple”, and “Make it Happen”. These values are our foundation!


**DESCRIPTION**

We are looking for an Associate TOC Engineer to join our Technical Operations Center team in Kalmar. In this role, you will focus on incident management, ensuring smooth operations with internal systems, and providing critical support in resolving technical issues. Additionally, you will play a key role in supporting our operator and provider partners to maintain high-quality service delivery.


We tackle every challenge together as a team, sharing the workload no matter how complex it gets! With our 24/7 operations, we are dedicated to resolving incidents swiftly and keeping business disruptions to an absolute minimum. To help us maintain this high standard of service, your day-to-day responsibilities will include:


* Collaborate with internal teams to ensure smooth resolution of issues.
* Conduct in-depth troubleshooting at both the software and network layers to identify and resolve technical problems.
* Act as Incident Manager for our core services, ensuring timely resolutions and minimizing system downtime.
* Monitor internal alerts and ensure incidents are managed and escalated as needed.
* Document and track alerts and incidents for future improvements.
* Use insights from resolved incidents to drive ongoing system improvements and optimization. to ensure smooth resolution of issues.

**REQUIREMENTS**

Sinch is a tech company through and through where great ideas are listened to and often implemented - we want you to feel part of the bigger picture!


This role is full of challenges and offers plenty of opportunities to grow. To thrive here, you’ll need a curious mindset and a passion for learning. A “can-do” attitude will help you turn obstacles into opportunities and keep you moving forward.


* **Education** : A Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related technical field (or equivalent professional experience).
* **Communication** : Excellent written and verbal English communication skills, with the ability to explain technical issues clearly to both internal teams and external partners.
* **Problem-Solving** : Strong analytical skills and a methodical approach to troubleshooting software or system alerts.
* **Composure** : The ability to stay calm and focused in a high-pressure environment, especially when managing multiple tasks or urgent incidents.
* **Flexibility** : Ability to work in a 24/7 shift rotation, including nights and weekends.
* **Location** : Able to work onsite at our office in Kalmar, Sweden.

In addition to the above, it is a strong advantage if you have:


* Hands-on experience with incident management and platform monitoring.
* Understanding of the TCP/IP protocol suite.
* Experience collaborating effectively with internal teams and stakeholders, demonstrating accountability and the ability to take ownership of issues.
* Knowledge with UNIX and Linux systems.
* Background in telecoms and wireless communication.
* Understanding of mobile communications standards like GSM and 4G.
* Basic SQL skills.

Our corporate language is English, please submit your application in English


**OUR HIRING PROCESS**

We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.


We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/.


No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!
company_description: We help companies to communicate with customers via messaging, voice and video using multiple channels. Simplifying life by bringing all people and businesses together using technology is our purpose.

title: Vertical Account Manager-Indirect Sales (Siemens Buildings), Södra Svealand
description:
Siemens Smart Infrastructure Buildings | Eastern Sweden (Southern Svealand)


Do you want to own and develop defined industry verticals within smart buildings while working through a strong partner ecosystem? At Siemens Smart Infrastructure, we connect energy, buildings, and people through market‑leading technology. We are now looking for a Vertical Account Manager to drive growth within selected building‑related industry verticals through indirect sales.

 **Your role – vertical ownership through partners**


As a Vertical Account Manager in indirect sales, you have end‑to‑end responsibility for defined industry verticals (e.g. commercial real estate, public sector, infrastructure) within the Buildings portfolio. You drive growth by developing partners, influencing specifications, and ensuring Siemens solutions are the preferred choice within your vertical markets.


You do not sell directly to end customers. Instead, you enable success through Solution Partners, consultants, and distributors, acting as the commercial owner of your verticals.


You will:

* Own and develop assigned industry verticals within Smart Infrastructure Buildings
* Define and execute vertical strategies together with partners and internal stakeholders
* Develop and manage relationships with Solution Partners, consultants, and distributors in Eastern Sweden
* Drive demand by influencing specifications and design choices within your verticals
* Own the indirect sales pipeline within your vertical scope, from opportunity identification to contract
* Develop commercial offerings, pricing strategies, and support partner‑led negotiations
* Work with forecasts, budgets, and performance tracking in CRM systems
* Act as a trusted vertical advisor, providing market insight, solution expertise, and business guidance

 **What you bring**


You are commercially driven and comfortable owning a market or industry scope. You thrive in partner‑led, specification‑driven environments and understand how value is created by enabling others.


We see that you have:

* Several years of B2B experience in indirect sales, partner management, or vertical sales
* Experience from buildings‑related verticals such as real estate, public sector or infrastructure
* Interest in building automation, fire & security, energy solutions or similar technical areas
* Understanding of consultative, specification‑based selling
* Experience working with digital and cloud‑based solutions
* A valid B driver’s license
* Excellent Swedish and English, spoken and written

 **What we offer**

* Clear vertical ownership with strong mandate and impact
* Flexible working conditions supporting work‑life balance
* Wellness allowance of SEK 5,000 and occupational healthcare
* Bonus program and individual development opportunities
* Inclusive, collaborative culture and access to market‑leading technology

 **Interested? Apply today but no later than 8th of June, 2026.**


For questions about the position, please contact Rickard Börjesson at rickard.borjesson@siemens.com

  

For questions about the recruitment process, please contact Kit Jensen at kit.jensen@siemens.com.

  

For contact with a union representative, please email Facket.se@siemens.com.

 **Background Checks**


As part of our recruitment process, we conduct background checks in accordance with applicable legislation and the requirements of the role. These may include reference checks, Damex verification, credit reports, and, where relevant, excerpts from criminal records. The purpose is to ensure a safe and reliable working environment and recruitment aligned with the role’s responsibilities.

 **About Siemens**


Siemens is a global technology company with over 351,000 employees worldwide – approximately 4,200 of them in Sweden. We are leaders in electrification, digitalization, and automation, with the ambition to become climate neutral by 2030. With us, you will help shape the society of tomorrow.

  

In this recruitment, we kindly but firmly decline all contact regarding advertising and recruitment support.
company_description: We are a leading technology company - focused on industry, infrastructure, transport, and healthcare - that transforms the everyday of billions of people.

title: Reservations Sales Agent till Nobis Hotel Stockholm
description:
**Nobis Hotel Stockholm**  

Välkommen till Nobis Hotel Stockholm, en plats för nöjessökande finsmakare och medvetna resenärer.  

Hotellet är beläget i hjärtat av Stockholm i en historisk byggnad med  

kulturskyddad originalinteriör från sent 1800-tal.
  

  

Hotellet som är medlem i Design Hotels omfattar 201 rum, Restaurang NOI, bistro Bino, Guldbaren och den makalösa Loungen med 28 meter högt i tak. Inredningen är utformad i samarbete med den berömda och mångfaldigt prisbelönta arkitektur- och designstudion Claesson, Koivisto Rune.

  

**Är detta du?**

  



Gillar du försäljning och service, uppskattar ett högt tempo och är redo för en ny utmaning? Då kan detta vara rätt tjänst för dig!



Du bidrar med positiv energi, är kreativ och flexibel samt har en stark förmåga att hitta lösningar som passar kunden. Du har inställningen att ”inget är omöjligt” och trivs i en snabb och dynamisk miljö där dagarna kan variera.



Du är en lagspelare som uppfattas som tillgänglig och stöttande av dina kollegor. Du har mycket god kommunikations- och organisationsförmåga samt en stark affärsdrivkraft.



Det är meriterande men inget krav om du har erfarenhet från hotell-, konferens- eller eventbranschen samt kunskap i bokningssystemet Cloud.

  


**Hur ser din dag ut?**

  



Som Reservations Sales Agent har du, tillsammans med bokningsteamet, ansvar för hotellets försäljnings- och eventverksamhet. Du tar emot förfrågningar, tar fram offerter, genomför bokningar och ansvarar för den detaljerade planeringen inför event. Du följer kunden genom hela processen – från första offert till ankomst och vidare överlämning till Front of House-teamet.



Du arbetar aktivt med att sälja Nobis Hotel Stockholms kreativa ytor, visar lokaler och hotellrum samt välkomnar kunder till möten och site visits. Du samarbetar tätt med reception och restaurang för att säkerställa en helhetsupplevelse där gästen får en smidig och minnesvärd vistelse från start till mål.

  



Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:


* Hantera inkommande förfrågningar och guida kunder genom hela säl och bokningsprocessen.
* Genomföra behovsanalyser för att säkerställa att kundens önskemål matchas med rätt lösning och erbjudande.
* Samarbeta nära hotellets avdelningar för att säkerställa en sömlös planering och genomförande av event och vistelser.
* Arbeta tätt tillsammans med Revenue-avdelningen för att optimera prissättning och säljstrategier.

  


**Varför välja Nobis Hospitality Group?**

  



Hos oss får du mer än bara ett jobb – du blir en del av en inspirerande miljö där du har möjlighet att utvecklas både personligt och professionellt. Vi värdesätter engagemang, kreativitet och passion för service och försäljning, och erbjuder en arbetsplats där ingen dag är den andra lik.



Vi erbjuder:


* En dynamisk och stimulerande arbetsmiljö med högt tempo och varierande arbetsdagar.
* Personalrabatter samt förmånliga Friends & Family-priser på våra 10 hotell i Sverige, Danmark och Palma.
* Design Hotels personalpris vid resor utanför Sverige.
* Två kostnadsfria hotellnätter inklusive middag varje år.
* 20 % rabatt på mat och dryck på samtliga restauranger och barer inom koncernen.
* Förmånlig rabatt på SATS träningskort.

  



Tjänsten är heltid (100 %), med tillträde omgående enligt överenskommelse. Lön enligt överenskommelse.



Ansökan skickas till: caroline.kjellberg@nobishotel.com

  

Vi går igenom ansökningarna löpande och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum.

  



Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: Cloud & Infrastructure Architect
description:
We are Strawberry. With over 245 hotels, 120 restaurants, 20 spas and more, we create thousands of experiences every day. With urban Comfort Hotel®, warm Quality Hotel™, stylish Clarion Hotel® and cosy Home Hotel and more than 40 unique independent hotels, our guests can pick and choose. Our team of 20,000 passionate individuals from more than 120 countries is what makes us grow! Strawberry is built on our core values: energy, courage and enthusiasm.### **Role Overview**


As a **Cloud & Infrastructure Architect**, you will be responsible for shaping, governing and evolving Strawberry’s digital foundation across cloud and infrastructure platforms. You will lead the architectural direction for our multi-cloud environment spanning GCP, AWS and Azure, while driving the transition away from remaining on-premise environments.


The role combines strategic leadership with hands-on technical guidance. You will define the target direction for our cloud providers and infrastructure landscape while working closely with product and technology teams to ensure scalable, secure and efficient solutions.  

  

You will drive operational excellence through cloud-native principles, infrastructure automation and DevFinOps practices, ensuring that our platforms remain reliable, cost-efficient and aligned with business growth.

### **Key Responsibilities**

* **Multi-Cloud Governance:** Define and execute a unified infrastructure strategy across GCP, Azure, and AWS. Act as the technical authority for in-house GCP/AWS management while providing strategic oversight for Azure (managed by a CSP).
* **Infrastructure Lifecycle:** Lead the roadmap for on-premise decommissioning. Perform cost/benefit analyses to decide between asset retention and cloud migration.
* **Product Partnership:** Collaborate directly with product and tech teams to architect cloud native solutions, ensuring new initiatives are born in the cloud with best-practice architecture.
* **Drive DevFinOps & Automation:** Implement infrastructure automation (IaC) and integrate financial accountability into the engineering culture to optimize cloud spend.
* **Security & Compliance:** Design secure cloud and infrastructure architectures across multi-cloud environments. Define and maintain security standards, hardening guidelines, and architectural principles to ensure secure-by-default platforms. Perform security architecture reviews and collaborate with the Tech Security team to ensure secure and compliant platforms.
* **Vendor & Stakeholder Management:** Manage high-level relationships with external service providers (CSPs) and internal leadership to align infrastructure capabilities with business growth.

### **Mandates & Authority**

* **Strategic Execution:** Authority to implement the overarching cloud and infrastructure roadmap across all platforms.
* **Operational Standards:** Mandate to establish and enforce best practices, naming conventions, security guardrails, and architectural patterns across the organization.
* **Resource Optimization:** Accountability for the performance, cost-efficiency, and successful deployment of all cloud and residual on-premise components.

### **Qualifications**

* **Experience:** 5+ years in Cloud Architecture or senior infrastructure roles, with experience from hybrid and multi-cloud environments.
* **Multi-Cloud Mastery:** Deep hands-on experience with **GCP** and **AWS**. Solid architectural knowledge of **Azure** (even if managed via a third party).
* **Security & Governance:** Strong understanding of cloud security architecture, infrastructure hardening, IAM, governance, and secure-by-design principles across multi-cloud environments, including familiarity with frameworks and regulations such as ISO 27001, NIST, and GDPR.
* **Legacy-to-Cloud Transition:** Proven track record of managing data center decommissioning and migrating legacy workloads to SaaS or cloud platforms.
* **Financial Acumen:** Strong understanding of cloud unit economics and FinOps, balancing operational excellence, cost efficiency and business value.
* **Communication:**Ability to translate complex technical debt and architectural concepts into business value for stakeholders and product owners.
* **Education:** Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related technical field.

### **What We Offer:**

* **Real Impact:** Be a part of a dynamic transformation and contribute directly to our success story.
* **Empowerment:** Work in a flat organization with trust, autonomy, and the opportunity to make a real difference.
* **Growth & Development:** Access professional development opportunities to enhance your skills and advance your career.
* **Fun & Community:** Enjoy a vibrant work environment with plenty of social events and team-building activities**.**
* **Fantastic Perks:** Benefit from great employee discounts, including staff and friends & family rates at our hotels.
* **Flexible Work:** Enjoy the best of both worlds with our hybrid model, with three days of in-person collaboration at our Oslo or Stockholm HQ.
company_description: We are Strawberry. With over 225 hotels, 120 restaurants, 20 spas and more, we create thousands of experiences every day. Join a world of experiences!

title: SAP Logistics Consultant
description:
Are you ready for the next step in your SAP career? Do you want to work in a flexible environment with exciting assignments. We are now looking for an SAP Logistics Consultant who wants to help shape the solutions of the future. Welcome to CGI!

**Your future duties and responsibilities**


As an SAP Logistics Consultant, you will play a key role in our deliveries to clients across various industries such as Retail, Manufacturing, and Distribution.
  

  

Your responsibilities will include:  

  

* Designing and developing SAP architecture for logistics solutions, primarily within SAP S/4HANA, EWM, and TM.
* Participating in pre-studies, requirements analysis, and solution design together with clients and project teams.
* Ensuring integration between SAP logistics modules and other systems.
* Providing advisory services and acting as an expert in SAP logistics for both projects and application management.
* Driving process improvements and innovation using SAP’s latest technologies.


Our clients are at different stages of their S/4HANA journey from planning to full implementation and you will play a central role in guiding them through this transformation.**Required qualifications to be successful in this role**

* Solid experience with SAP logistics modules (e.g., MM, WM, EWM, TM) and a strong understanding of supply chain processes.
* Proven experience in architecture and design within SAP environments, preferably in S/4HANA.
* Ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions.
* Strong communication skills and experience working in complex project environments.
* Experience with integrations, cloud solutions, and SAP BTP is a plus.
* Fluency in Swedish and English, both spoken and written.

  

You are great at building strong relationships and quickly understanding new situations. You enjoy working with others, are attentive and supportive, and like to challenge yourself. With both an analytical mindset and creative problem-solving skills, you handle complex tasks with precision and confidence.  

  

#LI-CGISWEDEN5**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**  

  

Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…  

  

You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.  

  

Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.  

  

You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
  

  

Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

title: Product Manager, Ecosystem Integration
description:
**An Amazing Career Opportunity for an Product Manager, Ecosystem Integration!**
**Location:** Stockholm, Sweden
**Job ID: 48207**  



We are seeking an Ecosystem Strategy and Portfolio Manager to define and drive the evolution of HID reader platforms to connect, align, and integrate across these environments. This role sits at the intersection of Product Management, Sales, Platform Architecture, and Engineering, with strong exposure to external partners and ecosystem stakeholders.

HID’s IDT Reader Business Unit is consolidating multiple legacy portfolios into a unified platform strategy across embedded modules, desktop readers, mobile devices, and associated software and cloud services.  



As this portfolio evolves, ensuring seamless interoperability across both internal platforms and the broader identity ecosystem is critical.
This includes defining and driving how Reader BU platforms are aligned with and integrate seamlessly into adjacent systems such as credentials, controllers, authentication providers, and partner platforms, working closely with other Business Units, and Global Engineering teams to align requirements, architectures, and integration models.  



The position requires a combination of industry understanding, business planning, technical depth, strategic thinking, and cross-functional influence to federate multiple product lines into a consistent and scalable integration model. It plays a key role in driving platform convergence by ensuring integration, reuse, and ecosystem requirements are built into future platform architectures from the outset. The objective is to ensure HID platforms are easy to integrate, consistent to deploy, and built on shared, scalable foundations.  


**Who are we?**

HID powers the trusted identities of the world’s people, places, and things, allowing people to transact safely, work productively and travel freely.

We are a high-tech software company headquartered in Austin, TX, with over 4,500 worldwide employees. Check us out here: www.hidglobal.com and https://youtu.be/23km5H4K9Eo  


**Identification Technologies (IDT):**

IDT is creating trusted identities for IoT applications through Smart Components and Enabling Services.

HID’s Identification Technologies powers the trusted identities of the world’s people, places and things through smart components and cloud services. We make it possible for people and organizations to transact safely, work productively, and travel freely. Our contactless identification and sensing (RFID, NFC, and BLE) components and solution enabling technologies address the dynamic requirements across multiple industries to wirelessly connect, identify, collect and manage data quickly and accurately across virtually any IoT application.  


**Essential Duties :**
* Define and drive how Reader BU platforms are aligned with and integrate into internal systems and adjacent ecosystems.
* Develop business cases for new platform or integration investments.
* Influence future platform definitions by ensuring integration, interoperability, reuse, and ecosystem requirements are built in from the outset.
* Align product managers, platform architects, and engineering teams around common integration principles, standards, and priorities.
* Work closely with Global Engineering leadership to align on architectural decisions, integration frameworks, and platform priorities.
* Define cross-platform requirements early to prevent fragmentation and ensure consistency across product lines.
* Define and drive shared cross-platform roadmap priorities to ensure reuse, consistency, and convergence across Reader BU platforms.
* Drive reuse of common components, services, and integration frameworks across platforms, reducing duplication and accelerating time to market.
* Work with close colleagues to establish a coherent model for how devices, firmware, SDKs, APIs, and cloud services interact across platforms.
* Ensure a consistent and scalable developer and integration experience across all reader platforms.
* Define how Reader BU platforms integrate with external ecosystems, partners, and enterprise architectures.
* Act as the central point of coordination for cross-product and cross-BU integration topics and dependencies.
* Define monetization strategies for integration capabilities, including APIs, services, and ecosystem participation.
* Contribute to relevant industry standards bodies and alliances to ensure alignment and interoperability of Reader BU platforms.
* Maintain a strong understanding of technology trends, competitive ecosystems, and evolving integration models.
* Gather customer, partner, and field feedback to identify integration gaps and prioritize improvements.
* Manage integration capabilities across their full lifecycle, from concept through delivery and continuous improvement.
* Support go-to-market activities with clear positioning, messaging, and enablement around integration capabilities.

  


**Essential Qualifications**
* Experience in RFID, identification technologies, or adjacent domains.
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or related technical field; equivalent experience considered.
* Strong experience in system integration, APIs, SDKs, or platform-based product environments.
* Familiarity with enterprise architectures, IoT ecosystems, and multi-product platform environments.
* Understanding of device security, credential management, secure elements, and authentication frameworks.
* Knowledge of PKI, key management, or IoT security models is a strong plus.
* Experience working with or contributing to industry standards and ecosystem alliances is preferred.
* Proven ability to influence across global, cross-functional teams without direct authority.
* Comfortable operating at both strategic and detailed technical levels.
* Experience working in agile development environments (SAFe is a plus).

  


**What we can offer you:**
* Competitive salary and rewards package.
* Competitive benefits and annual leave offering, allowing for work-life balance.
* A vibrant, welcoming & inclusive culture.
* Extensive career development opportunities and resources to maximize your potential.
* To be a part of a global organization that is pioneering the hardware, software and services that allow people to confidently navigate the physical and digital worlds.

  


**Why apply?**
* **Empowerment:** You’ll work as part of a global team in a flexible work environment, learning and enhancing your expertise. We welcome an opportunity to meet you and learn about your unique talents, skills, and experiences. You don’t need to check all the boxes. If you have most of the skills and experience, we want you to apply.
* **Innovation:** You embrace challenges and want to drive change. We are open to ideas, including flexible work arrangements, job sharing or part-time job seekers.
* **Integrity:** You are results-orientated, reliable, and straightforward and value being treated accordingly. We want all our employees to be themselves, to feel appreciated and accepted.

  



HID does not accept unsolicited resumes from headhunters, recruitment agencies, or fee-based recruitment services. We are not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes.  



HID is committed to building a diverse, equitable, and inclusive workforce that reflects the global communities we serve. As an equal opportunity employer, we welcome applications from individuals of all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We evaluate applicants without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, disability, age, veteran status, or any other legally protected characteristic. Our goal is to create a workplace that empowers everyone to thrive and be their authentic selves, fostering an environment of mutual respect and inclusivity. If you have a disability and require assistance or accommodation to participate in the application process or to perform essential job functions, please contact accommodations-ext@hidglobal.com.  



Please be aware that our recruitment process may include the use of AI-powered tools to assist in screening applicant resumes. These tools help us efficiently identify candidates whose qualifications and skills align with the job description. We use AI in a responsible manner and in accordance with applicable data privacy laws and regulations. Importantly, all applicants are reviewed by our Talent Acquisition team. AI is used to support, not replace, human judgment in the evaluation process.  


**We make it easier for people to get where they want to go!**  

On an average day, think of how many times you tap, twist, tag, push or swipe to get access, find information, connect with others or track something. HID technology is behind billions of interactions, in more than 100 countries. We help you create a verified, trusted identity that can get you where you need to go – without having to think about it.  

  

When you join our HID team, you’ll also be part of the ASSA ABLOY Group, the global leader in access solutions. You’ll have 63,000 colleagues in more than 70 different countries. We empower our people to build their career around their aspirations and our ambitions – supporting them with regular feedback, training, and development opportunities. Our colleagues think broadly about where they can make the most impact, and we encourage them to grow their role locally, regionally, or even internationally. As we welcome new people on board, it’s important to us to have diverse, inclusive teams, and we value different perspectives and experiences.

 #LI-HIDGlobal
company_description: Let’s create a safer and more open world – together!

title: Experienced Engineer, Lund
description:
**Job Title**
-------------


Experienced Engineer, Lund**Job Description**
-------------------

*Innovate at the forefront of our market - join us in a role where your engineering prowess meets real-world challenges!* *We are now looking for an* *Experienced Engineer* *who is ready to take the next step and help us shape the future together.*

**Who is your future team?**

Software Services partner with Sales regions, customers, and partners to co-create and deploy the customized software solutions. Through our Professional Services, we innovate and validate applications that push the boundaries of what our products can achieve.


Our agile, technology-agnostic approach ensures we're always at the forefront, responding to market demands and pioneering new opportunities.

**What you’ll do here as Software Engineer?**


You'll partner closely with customers and partners, navigating every project phase from initial requirements gathering to capability mapping. You'll develop custom solutions pieces that expand Axis operational scope. Working hand-in-hand with Professional Services, you are a vital force, directly fueling innovation through deep market collaboration.


Your responsibilities will for example include:

* Understanding the customers’ requirements and translating them into solutions.
* Running technical workshops or onboarding sessions.
* Work in teams of 1 to 4 engineers to implement the solution.
* Build integrations with (internal and/or external) APIs, databases, or third-party systems.
* Potentially be involved in the final deployment phase with customer visits.

**Who are we looking for/Who are you?**


We're looking for a versatile software engineer with a diverse experience of software development, confident in navigating solutions from embedded systems to Cloud environments. Candidates typically hold a degree in Computer Science or a similar field, complemented by at least 2 years of relevant professional experience.

**We'd love to hear that you have/are:**

* You are curious and dare to explore new technologies.
* You enjoy interacting with customers (mostly in English).
* Knowledge about our APIs and SDK (VAPIX, ACAP, ACS) is highly valued.
* Bonus points for experiences with Computer Vision.

**What Axis has to offer**


We are a world leader in network video, where cutting-edge technology meets global impact. Here, you’ll contribute to meaningful projects that shape the future of security and surveillance — developing solutions used worldwide. As a fast-growing company, we offer exciting career opportunities. You’ll grow professionally through continuous learning, supported by a collaborative team that values creativity, innovation, and work-life balance.

*Our Lund HQ Campus, including the impressive Grenden building, offers a dynamic environment with spaces crafted to encourage collaboration, whether through informal “**fika**” chats, formal meetings,* *or after-hours activities.* *Check it out:* *Axis HQ*


Your well-being matters to us. We offer a range of benefits, including a company bonus, Friday cake, wellness allowance, health insurance — and even your own Axis bicycle.


To learn more about Axis, our innovative products, solutions, and vibrant company culture, explore:  

Life at Axis blog  

Engineering at Axis blog  

Innovation at Axis

**Ready to Act?**


Do you want to explore the future with us? We go through applications continuously so don’t wait – send in your application today!


In case of questions, please reach out to recruiting manager Cédric Penalvert at +46708850979.

**Type of Employment**
----------------------


Permanent Employment**Posting End Date**
--------------------


2026-06-05*Certain roles at Axis require background checks, which means applicable verifications will be done in these recruitments.* *Notice will be provided before we take any action.*

**About Axis Communications**
-----------------------------


We enable a smarter, safer world by creating innovative solutions for improving security and business performance. As a network technology company and industry leader, we offer solutions in video surveillance, access control, intercom, and audio systems, enhanced by intelligent analytics applications.


With around 6000 committed employees in over 50 countries, we collaborate with partners worldwide. Together, we thrive in our friendly, open, and collaborative culture and inspire each other to think beyond the expected. United by our commitment to inclusion, diversity, and sustainability, we consistently seek to develop our skills and way of working.

**Let´s create a smarter, safer world**

For more information about Axis, please visit our website www.axis.com.


Listen to Get To Know Axis – Podcast

title: Vice President, Research & Development (Hardware & Software)
description:
### **JOB DESCRIPTION**



**Company Story**



Sigma Connectivity is a global tech house with all the resources needed to bring a product to market under one roof. We believe in investing in knowledge and education, making a positive impact on society and shaping a brighter future for all.



Through our core values, at Sigma Connectivity we create an environment that fosters growth, creativity, and collaboration. Our company culture promotes the freedom to explore new ideas and push the boundaries of what is possible.



Working with us means you will be working in an international environment with a diverse and inclusive atmosphere. We operate globally from 12 sites and have expert teams in North America, Sweden, Germany, Denmark, United Kingdom and Poland.



**Role purpose**



The Vice President of R&D leads the company’s **hardware and software development organization**, ensuring high‑quality customer delivery while building long‑term technical capability and organizational strength. The role owns R&D strategy, execution, and people leadership in a consultancy environment where flexibility, technical excellence, and customer trust are critical.



What you will be a part of:



This is a chance to be part of a skilled, hard-working and helpful team in an open-minded environment! Our approach is based on our core value: “You never work alone!” meaning that everyone should be successful in their work.



You will lead a dynamic team of managers with responsibility for areas like PCB Design, Android Device Software development, Edge Device Development, Radio and Antenna development, etc.



Your team is in our HQ in Lund. You will work with different projects closely together with the team members and various stakeholders within the organization, as well as customers. As a leader, you will drive and motivate a highly experienced team, and you will encourage them to take personal responsibility. You define individual and organization goals for all team members and support them to succeed in their daily work.



You will report to the CEO and be a member of the Senior leadership team, you work strategically together with your fellow colleagues.



The main tasks are:



Working together with Sales across Market Units to build strong customer and partner relationships.



Be part of Customer discussions, Quotation work and Project steering group to secure quality of delivery including accurate Quotations. Be part of pricing discussions with sales organization.



Responsible for Budget and Gross Margin for R&D.



Ability to provide strategic input for overall R&D development department to engineers, Sales and Senior Managers.



Manage line activities including performance management, salary reviews, competence and development.



Responsible for Recruiting and Building High performance teams.



Together with colleagues, set and drive long term strategic goals for the organization (eg AR/VR) and engage with partners.



Approximately 20 travelling days per year, mostly within Sweden and Europe is part of the job.



**Key outcomes**



* Strong Customer relationship and efficiently winning new business
* Strong gross margin and building high performing team.
* Building growth culture with high engagement from all employees.
* Clear technical direction and continuous modernization of development practices
* Strong leadership scalable and flexible engineering organization
* Effective use of labs and verification capabilities as a differentiator.


**Responsibilities**



**Strategy and capability development**



* Define and execute R&D strategy across hardware and software, aligned with company objectives
* Build long‑term technical capabilities in core domains such as embedded systems, connectivity, cloud, mobile platforms, electronics, antenna/RF, and verification
* Ensure software and hardware offerings are clearly positioned and well understood internally and externally


**Delivery and execution**



* Own technical delivery across customer engagements, ensuring quality, scope control, and customer satisfaction by working closely with Project Management Office.
* Oversee staffing, utilization, and capacity planning across hardware and software teams
* Drive structured collaboration between hardware and software organizations


**Engineering excellence**



* Promote strong engineering standards, architecture, and best practices and work with the PMO to constantly improve our development processes
* Sponsor modernization initiatives including tooling, automation, and improved development workflows
* Drive responsible adoption of modern development tools (including AI‑supported development where approved)


**Partnerships and cross‑functional alignment**



* Work closely with Sales, Business Development, the project Management Office (PMO) and Partnerships to align technical capabilities with market demand
* Support strategic partner initiatives and technology collaborations
* Collaborate with labs and industrialization leadership to strengthen end‑to‑end delivery


**People leadership**



* Lead and develop engineering managers and senior technical leaders
* Build a culture of trust, accountability, and continuous improvement
* Drive recruitment and competence development in line with current and future demand


**Communication**



* Communicate R&D priorities, progress, and risks clearly to management team and the wider organization
* Provide structured R&D updates and contribute to organizational alignment


**Skills and experience**



**Required**



* Masters degree in Computer science or electronics or any other relevant field.
* 10+ years of experience in relevant industries.
* Senior leadership experience across **hardware and software development**
* Strong technical background with the ability to guide senior engineers and managers
* Experience working in an **engineering consultancy or services environment**
* Proven ability to scale teams, lead leaders, and balance short‑term delivery with long‑term capability
* Excellent communication skills with both technical and non‑technical stakeholders
* Experience with connected devices, verification labs, compliance, and industrialization
* Exposure to modern development tooling and platform ecosystems


**Leadership style**



* Clear and decisive, with calm leadership in complex situations
* Customer‑focused while protecting long‑term organizational health
* Values collaboration, transparency, and ownership
* Thinks end‑to‑end across hardware, software, and delivery

### **MORE INFORMATION**



For more information please contact



Bhavin Patel,  

+46 761442573  

Bhavin.Patel@sigmaconnectivity.se



* #### **POSITION**


Vice President, Research & Development (Hardware & Software)
* #### **COMPANY**


Sigma Connectivity Group
* #### **LOCATION**


Sweden
* #### **PUBLICATION DATE**


2026-05-19
* #### **CONTACT**


Bhavin Patel, Bhavin.Patel@sigmaconnectivity.se, +46761442573

title: Senior Systems Engingeer
description:
**As a Systems Engineer in our IT department, you’re helping build the digital backbone that powers Epidemic Sound’s global operations. You’ll design, implement, and scale secure, reliable, and automated systems that enable our teams and creators to move fast and innovate without friction.**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


We don’t just “manage tickets” — we’re solving frictionless scale through Okta, Terraform, and AI-driven automation. Your role is to ensure our SaaS ecosystem is fast, secure, scalable and reliable.


This is a **1-year parental leave cover (vikariat)** with the opportunity to work in a fast-moving, high-impact environment.

**The Impact**
--------------

* Identity & Access Management: Design, implement, and maintain IAM solutions (primarily Okta), enforcing access control policies, MFA, and SSO across the organization. Partner with Cybersecurity to keep us aligned with security standards and best practices.
* SaaS Platform Administration: Own key SaaS platforms including Google Workspace and the Atlassian Suite. Manage licensing, procurement, renewals, cost optimization and handle escalated end-user cases when they come your way.
* Infrastructure as Code & Automation: Build and maintain Terraform templates for provisioning cloud resources, and develop scripts and API integrations (Python, GAM, Bash) to eliminate repetitive work and streamline how IT operates.
* MDM & Device Management: Deploy and manage Mobile Device Management solutions to secure, monitor, and enforce policies across endpoints.
* Documentation, Collaboration & Continuity: Translate business needs into technical solutions alongside IT Support and Enterprise Security. Document configurations and processes, and support backups and disaster recovery planning.

**How You Think & Build**
-------------------------


You’re a builder who puts users first, making technical decisions based on real needs in a fast-moving, high-growth environment. You bring:

* Strong background in IAM principles including access control, user provisioning, and SSO with hands-on Okta experience
* Proven experience administering Google Workspace and Atlassian Suite in an enterprise environment
* Experience with SaaS administration, licensing management, and procurement
* Proficiency with scripting and command-line tools (Python, GAM, PowerShell, or Bash)
* Familiarity with automation and API integrations to optimize workflows
* Excellent communication skills and comfortable engaging both technical and non-technical stakeholders

### **Bonus**

* Terraform or other Infrastructure as Code tooling
* MDM platforms (e.g. Kandji) and device security management
* Networking fundamentals: firewalls, VPNs, network architecture
* Google Workspace Professional Certification or equivalent

**What You Get**
----------------

* Build infrastructure that empowers thousands of colleagues and reaches millions of creators.
* Collaborate globally in a high-talent, high-collaboration team.
* Enjoy market leader stability with scale-up dynamism and autonomy.


Ready to shape the future of creative tech? Apply now and let the world feel your work.

title: Sustainability & Quality Digital transformation specialist & AI solutions
description:
At Electrolux Professional Group we hire to meet needs beyond tomorrow


**UNLOCK YOUR POTENTIAL**At Electrolux Professional Group, we believe potential powers progress. We’re not searching for perfection—we’re looking for people with the right mindset. If you're curious, resilient, and ready to grow, you'll find the space to lead, innovate, and together with us Meet the needs beyond tomorrow! Read more about us here: https://www.electroluxprofessionalgroup.com/en/join-us/
**SUSTAINABILITY & QUALITY DIGITAL TRANSFORMATION SPECIALIST & AI SOLUTIONS**  

As part of the Sustainability & Quality Group Team, this role drives data science, AI, and digital innovation initiatives to improve decision-making, process efficiency, data quality, and compliance across the organization. The position focuses on identifying, developing, and deploying advanced analytics and machine learning solutions, while supporting digital transformation and intelligent workflow redesign in collaboration with business and IT stakeholders.  



**WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING**

* **Digital Platforms Evolution & Process Innovation -** Analyze, improve, and evolve Sustainability & Quality management system platforms (Qlik Sense, Position Green, SharePoint, QA Matrix) by identifying opportunities for advanced analytics, AI-enabled capabilities. Develop, support data-driven solutions using Python and Oracle Cloud to improve data quality, process efficiency, and decision-making aligned with Group Digital Transformation strategies.
* **Digital Projects Implementation & Change Management -** Drive Quality & Sustainability cross‑functional digital projects, ensuring process changes, risk mitigation, and harmonized integration across Group, Business Areas, and Sites.
* **AI & Advanced Quality Analytics Development -** Contribute to the design and deployment of AI-based solutions, including predictive analytics, early‑warning systems, and data‑driven quality insights.
* **Adoption, Training & Digital Culture -** Support local sites in adopting new digital solutions and promoting a culture of innovation through training, micro‑learning content, in close collaboration with Group IT.
* **Governance, Compliance & Best Practices -** Benchmark digital best practices, monitor digital strategy effectiveness, and ensure full compliance with Group data governance and security requirements.

Reporting to Head of Group Quality (part of the Group Sustainability and Quality)  

  



**WHAT’S NEEDED FOR YOU TO THRIVE**

* University degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Engineering, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related technical discipline.
* Proven experience in data science, advanced analytics or digital transformation within industrial environments, including the evaluation of digital solutions and the redesign of manual processes into structured digital workflows.
* Proficiency in Python for data analysis, data processing, automation, machine learning, and AI solution development
* Experience with Oracle Cloud and cloud-based technologies for developing, integrating, or supporting scalable data-driven solutions.
* Strong capabilities in data analytics, modeling, processing and interpretation, with the ability to transform complex data into actionable business tasks.
* Good understanding of machine learning and AI concepts, including predictive analytics, anomaly detection and intelligent automation;
* Experience working with data platforms, dashboards and digital tools, with the ability to assess, improve, and evolve data-driven systems and processes.
* Demonstrated ability to collaborate with IT and cross-functional teams, with sensitivity to different digital maturity levels across multiple sites.
* Experience leading cross-functional projects in complex, multinational organizations is a strong plus.
* Excellent communication skills, with the ability to translate complex technical concepts, analytical findings, and AI-related insights into clear, accessible messages for non-technical stakeholders.
* Willingness to travel internationally and ability to work in multicultural environments.
* Fluency in English, both written and spoken.

**OUR CULTURE IN 4 WORDS**Be Customer Obsessed. Build Trust. Be Bold. Act Sustainably.
(We’re building it every day — and we’d love your help.)  

  

**WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU**Trust, ownership, and the opportunity to grow
 * Be part of a company grounded in customer focus, sustainability leadership, innovation, and social impact. We aim to Meet Needs Beyond Tomorrow
* The possibility to work hybrid and build a flexible worklife balance
* Be part of an industry shift that makes a difference — in how people live, cook, clean, care, and serve
* Plus: country-specific perks and benefits designed to support your well-being.

  
**Electrolux Professional Group - meeting needs beyond tomorrow**

Electrolux Professional Group is the sustainability leader in our industry and one of the leading global providers of food service, beverage, and laundry solutions for professional users. Our innovative products and worldwide service network make our customers’ work-life easier, more profitable – and truly sustainable every day. Our solutions and products are sold in over 110 countries. In 2025, the Electrolux Professional Group had global sales of SEK 12.2bn and approximately 4,300 employees. Electrolux Professional’s B-shares are listed at Nasdaq Stockholm. For more information, visit https://www.electroluxprofessionalgroup.com

title: Mjukvarutestare mot Android
description:
Vilka är vi?
  
Som anställd hos oss på Infotiv är du del av en gemenskap som präglas av öppenhet och god sammanhållning där vi stöttar och hjälper varandra.Våra ledord "varmt hjärta och skarp hjärna" är värderingar som genomsyrar hela företaget, vårt arbetssätt, vårt ledarskap och vår arbetsmiljö. Det varma hjärtat står för empati, tillit och samarbete, och det är viktigt för oss att du som medarbetare känner dig uppskattad, sedd och lyssnad på. Den skarpa hjärnan står för kompetens och innovation, och vi värdesätter varje individs förmågor och kompetens genom att uppmuntra nytänkande, kreativitet och initiativtagande. Tillsammans är vi Infotiv.
  
Vi är anslutna till Almega och erbjuder kollektivavtal som ger dig trygghet och säkerhet i anställningen. Våra goda kundrelationer gör att vi kan ha en långsiktig strategi, där du kan utvecklas genom rätt uppdrag och med rätt kompetensutveckling. Hos oss kan du både testa nya saker och utvecklas samtidigt som du kan känna dig trygg i din anställning.
  
Din framtida utmaning
  
Som en del av vårt dedikerade testteam spelar du en nyckelroll i att säkra kvaliteten på våra avancerade Android-baserade smartphones. Här får du kombinera teknisk höjd med ett skarpt öga för detaljer i en miljö där din insats gör verklig skillnad.
  
Några exempel på arbetsuppgifter
  
  

**Kreativ testdesign:** Du designar och utvecklar både manuella och automatiserade testfall. Du ser till att våra smartphones prövas mot verkliga scenarier för att garantera högsta stabilitet.
  
  

**Kvalitetssäkring i framkant:** Du exekverar tester och ansvarar för träffsäker rapportering i våra test management-system och Jira. Din analys blir direkt avgörande för produktens färdigställande.
  
  

**Tekniskt ekosystem:** Du underhåller och optimerar våra testmiljöer. Det innebär att du rör dig vant mellan allt från IP-nätverkskomponenter till moderna Cloud-tjänster.
  
  

**Lagspel och samarbete:** Du jobbar tätt ihop med våra mjukvaruutvecklare i en prestigelös miljö. Tillsammans med dina kollegor i testteamet drivs ni framåt av vår testledare för att nå gemensamma mål.
  
  

Krav
  
  

Minst 3 års erfarenhet av mjukvarutestning
  
God kunskap och erfarenhet av testning av Android
  
**Programmeringsvana i:** Java
  
Python
  
  

Flytande svenska i tal och skrift
  
Goda kunskaper i engelska
  
Personliga egenskaperSjälvständig men stark lagspelare
  
Positiv, drivande och kvalitetsmedveten
  
Bidrar till ett gott teamklimat
  
  

**Meriterande:**  

Erfarenhet från telekombranschen
  
End‑to‑End‑verifiering av komplexa system
  
ISTQB‑certifiering
  
Erfarenhet av WiFi och cellulära system (3G / 4G / 5G)
  
  

Ansökan
  
Vill du bli en del av gemenskapen på Infotiv? Vi letar alltid efter nya stjärnor och ser fram emot att lära känna dig! Vi är nyfikna på:
  
  

**Din resa:** Vad har du gjort tidigare och vad drömmer du om att göra hos oss?
  
  

**Personen bakom CV:** t: Vem är du när arbetsdagen är slut?
  
  

**Din personlighet:** Berätta gärna vad som gör just dig till en bra kollega.
  
  

Vänta inte med din ansökan – vi träffar kandidater löpande och tjänsten kan tillsättas snabbt.Observera att vi som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess genomför drogtest samt säkerhetsprövning vid behov.
  
Vi hoppas att du vill växa och utvecklas tillsammans med oss!

title: Implementation Specialist inom Exchange
description:
Vi på Iver brinner för innovationer och god laganda, vi är särskilt intresserad av dig som gillar att tänka nytt och dela med dig av dina tankar. Vi söker en Implementation Specialist inom Exchange som vill vara med och leverera moderna och stabila lösningar i komplexa kundmiljöer. Är du vår nya kollega?
  
We empower our Nordic society Iver är en ledande nordisk helhetsleverantör av molnbaserade IT-tjänster med spetskompetens inom drift, cybersäkerhet, cloud och innovation. Våra tjänster är kritiska inte bara för våra kunder utan för digitaliseringen av samhället i stort. Med huvudkontor i Stockholm verkar Iver främst i Norden med en agenda att fortsätta expandera. Iver omsätter drygt 3 miljarder SEK och har cirka 1 300 anställda som arbetar på ett av våra 23 kontor i Norden.
  
Din roll på Iver Som Implementation Specialist inom Exchange blir du en viktig del av vårt specialistteam som ansvarar för implementation, migrering och vidareutveckling av moderna meddelandeplattformar hos våra kunder. Du arbetar nära arkitekter, projektledare och andra tekniska specialister i komplexa IT-miljöer där kvalitet, stabilitet och teknisk höjd är centralt.
  
Rollen passar dig som trivs i tekniskt avancerade projekt och vill kombinera djup specialistkompetens med stort eget ansvar i leveranser mot kund.
  
Exempel på arbetsuppgifter
  
  

Planera och genomföra implementationer och tekniska projekt inom Exchange
  
  

Driva migreringar och förändringsprojekt inom Exchange och hybridmiljöer
  
  

Ansvara för teknisk leverans och säkerställa kvalitet i implementationer
  
  

Utföra avancerad felsökning inom Exchange och mailflöden
  
  

Bidra med tekniskt mentorskap och kompetensdelning inom teamet
  
  

Delta i framtagning av tekniska lösningsförslag tillsammans med arkitekter och kunder
  
  

Det som gör rollen unik Hos oss får du arbeta nära våra arkitekter i projekt där du ansvarar för att omsätta lösningsdesign till fungerande implementationer i kundernas IT-miljöer. Du blir en del av ett specialistteam med hög teknisk kompetens och får möjlighet att arbeta med komplexa leveranser hos kunder med varierande miljöer och behov.
  
Vad erbjuder vi dig? På Iver får du möjlighet att arbeta med den senaste tekniken och vara med på en spännande tillväxtresa. Vi är inkluderande och strävar efter ett genuint samarbete mot gemensamma mål. Inom Iver finns stora möjligheter till utveckling och vi finns här för att inspirera dig till att nå dina yrkesmässiga mål. Vi står bakom dig när du vill lära dig mer inom ditt specialområde, ledarskap eller nya områden. Hos Iver är du också en del av ett ambitiöst och innovativt företag, vilket innebär att förbättra, testa, utvärdera och våga ändra hur vi gör saker är viktiga ingredienser för att vi ska utvecklas.
  
Vi på Iver ger samma löfte till våra kollegor som till våra kunder. Löftet är att alltid vara ”beside you”, ”behind you” och ”before you”. Vi kallar det för "The Iver way".
  
**Förmåner hos oss:** Kollektivavtal & trygga villkor Hybridarbete Friskvårdsbidrag Terminalglasögon ⏳ Tidsbank – 24 h extra ledighet/år Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring Tjänstepension (ITP) & flexpension
  
Vem söker vi? Vi söker dig som har flera års erfarenhet av implementation, migrering och drift inom Exchange-miljöer och som trivs i en specialistroll med stort tekniskt ansvar. Du är van att arbeta självgående i projektleveranser, känner dig trygg i dialogen med både kunder och tekniska team och uppskattar komplex problemlösning i affärskritiska miljöer. Du känner dig trygg i att kommunicera med kunder och kollegor på både svenska och engelska, både muntligt och skriftligt.
  
**För att lyckas i rollen ser vi gärna att du har erfarenhet av:**
  
  

Exchange On-Premises
  
  

Hybridlösningar mellan Exchange och Microsoft 365
  
  

Avancerad felsökning inom exempelvis SMTP, Autodiscover och mail routing
  
  

Att ta fram, presentera och förklara tekniska lösningsförslag i kunddialoger
  
  

Teknisk implementation och migrering i större eller komplexa miljöer
  
  

**Meriterande:** Certifieringar inom Exchange och Microsoft 365.
  
**Placeringsort:** Iver finns på 23 orter i Norden. För denna roll ser vi att du utgår från vårt kontor i Malmö, Göteborg eller Stockholm.
  
**Övrig information:** Vi har kunder inom alla branscher och sektorer inklusive säkerhetsklassad verksamhet, därför genomför vi bakgrundskontroller i samtliga av våra rekryteringsprocesser.
  
Sök till oss! Urval sker löpande, tjänsten kan tillsättas före sista ansökningsdag. Iver eftersträvar en jämn könsfördelning och värdesätter etnisk och kulturell mångfald.
  
**Sista ansökningsdag:** 2026-06-19
  
**Start:** Enligt överenskommelse
  
Välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Marcus Mathiasson, marcus.mathiasson@iver.se eller TA-Partner, linnea.blomgren@iver.se vid frågor eller funderingar kring tjänsten.
  
Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: English and Spanish speaking Account Manager to Linköping
description:
About this position
  
TaxiCaller is looking to expand our sales them with an Account Mangager who will primarily work with our leads and customers in North America.
  
TaxiCaller has a strong inbound strategy, and you will mostly work with assigned qualified leads, but you will also work with outbound sales, e.g. cold calling.
  
A lead is a taxi company (or other kinds of transportation companies) who is looking to upgrade their dispatch system.
  
You will work with the full sales cycle from first demo to a closed deal. After the deal is closed you as an account manager will work together with our excellent support team to make sure we keep our great customer retention.
  
The sales will mainly be done via web meetings and phone, so travelling will not be required for this position.
  
It is a very developing job in an international environment where you will interact with a lot of people every day.
  
  

About you
  
We are looking for a person who has excellent skills in closing sales.
  
* You should have a proven track record with a couple of years’ experience in B2B sales.
* Good track record in cold calling and outbound sales.
* You need to be fluent in English and Spanish with no accent.
* You need to have a good drive and be able to work independently.
* You have good analytical skills and you are pedagogical.


You don't have to be able to speak Swedish, since TaxiCaller is a true international company with colleagues and customers from all over the world.
  
  

**We see it as positive if:**  

* You also speak a third language, e.g. French.
* You have previous experience in working with international SaaS sales.


About TaxiCaller
  
TaxiCaller was founded in 2011 and has developed a cloud-based taxi dispatch system with support for iPhone and Android apps which quickly reached international success and is currently used by taxi companies throughout the world. TaxiCaller's dispatch system is groundbreaking because we use the latest technology in both web solutions and smartphones. We are experiencing strong demand for our product and because of that we need to strengthen our sales department.

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
description:
**Build the practice, not just the model.**
-------------------------------------------


Imagine not just building advanced ML solutions, but seeing them drive real business impact across global brands like Polestar and Samsung. At Curamando, you won’t be coding in a silo. You’ll connect the dots between deep technical work and strategic business goals, ensuring what you build truly makes a difference. This is your chance to step into a role where you’ll mentor a talented team, collaborate with experts across diverse domains, and gain the organizational context that many ML roles lack.


We’re looking for a Senior ML Engineer who wants to help build that practice with us, not just deliver projects within it.

**What this role actually is.**
-------------------------------


You’ll be our lead ML engineer, and you’ll be one of the people shaping what we offer, how we sell it, and how we develop the next layer of ML talent at Curamando. That’s not a footnote. It’s a big part of the job.


Our work is applied and embedded. We don’t ship models over a wall. We sit inside our clients teams and help drive the transformation with them. You will work alongside our change consultants who lead the transformation while you build the AI & ML that puts the strategy into motion.

**What you’ll do.**
-------------------

* **Lead the engineering work.** Design, build, and ship ML solutions for our clients, from first scoping conversations through production. Pick the right tool for the job, not the most exciting one.
* **Build the offering.** You'll play a crucial part in shaping what Curamando's AI and ML offerings look like, methodology and points of view. The pace of change is relentless, so we need someone curious by nature, who reads, experiments, and tells signal from hype to keep the offering sharp.
* **Mentor the team.** You’ll be the most senior ML voice in the room. Coach more junior engineers and analysts on solution architecture, code quality, and structured thinking. That work matters as much as the code you write.
* **Collaborate across Eidra.** This isn’t a Curamando-only role. You’ll work closely with other parts of Eidra enabling their offering with AI and ML. We genuinely believe in cross-collaboration, and the relationships you build and the work you share across the collective are core to how we grow this practice.
* **Sit close to the business.** Join sales conversations with our commercial team, and help translate client needs into real engagements. Push back when something doesn’t make sense.

**Who we think will love this role.**
-------------------------------------


You have a strong core in traditional ML, supervised learning, feature engineering, model evaluation and MLOps. You’ve also worked with LLMs, agents, and RAG enough to know where they shine and where they don’t.


Pragmatism is your default mode. You’ve shipped models in environments that weren’t perfect, with data that wasn’t clean, on timelines that weren’t generous, and you got something useful into production anyway.


Applied AI in growth, marketing, sales, commerce, and operations is genuinely interesting to you. The mission here is to make AI useful inside real organizations, not to always advance the state of the art AI.

**What we’d expect you to bring.**
----------------------------------

* Hands-on experience across the ML lifecycle in Python and the usual stack: PyTorch, scikit-learn, pandas, SQL, PySpark.
* Working knowledge of at least one cloud platform: AWS, Azure, or GCP; Snowflake, Databricks, or similar.
* Comfort with modern GenAI and agent patterns (RAG, tool-using agents), even if your core is traditional ML.
* A track record of mentoring more junior engineers or data profesionals.
* Enough business sense to hold your own in a client conversation.

**Nice to have.**
-----------------

* Experience in consulting, agency, or another client-facing setting.
* A point of view on AI ethics, governance, or the EU AI Act in practice.
* Some product or front-end instincts: enough to ship a working demo when the moment calls for it.
* Familiarity with orchestration tools like Airflow or Dagster.

**About Curamando.**
--------------------


We're part of Eidra, a collective of 1,400 specialists across 16 companies, from Stockholm to New York. We offer a steep growth trajectory, challenging projects, and a culture that values drive and results over prestige. We believe in the power of being together in person, which is why we've invested in brand-new offices in central Östermalm.

title: Platform Engineer
description:
**Om oss**  

På Techrytera AB börjar rekryteringen med dig. Vi är ett bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag med spetskompetens och ett tydligt fokus inom IT och Engineering. Med vår branschkunskap och nära dialog med både kandidater och kunder skapar vi träffsäkra matchningar där rätt kompetens möter rätt behov.


Vi tror att en riktigt bra matchning inte bara handlar om en rollbeskrivning – utan om dina erfarenheter, din potential och vad du faktiskt vill utvecklas inom. Därför utgår vi alltid från individen. Genom att förstå din bakgrund, dina drivkrafter och dina ambitioner kan vi koppla ihop dig med uppdrag och roller hos våra kunder där du får rätt förutsättningar att utvecklas och göra skillnad.


Vårt mål är att bygga långsiktiga och meningsfulla samarbeten – både för dig som kandidat och för våra kunder.  

  

**Arbetsbeskrivning**  

  

Platform Engineer


Vill du arbeta med den senaste tekniken inom IT och vara med i den moderna teknikutvecklingen?


Vår kund har som främsta fokus att skydda människor och samhälle. Här blir du en del av en prestigelös kultur tillsammans med professionella och engagerade kollegor som stöttar och lär av varandra.


Du kommer att ingå i sektionen **Data & Insight** inom **Digital Accelerator**, som ansvarar för drift och utveckling av kundens dataplattform, generativ AI och visualiseringsverktyg. Arbetet omfattar bland annat arkitektur, design, utveckling, implementation, drift, support och förvaltning av plattformar och IT-tjänster.


Teamet består idag av 12 personer som arbetar tvärfunktionellt med organisationens plattformar och lösningar.


Uppdraget kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt gällande säkerhetsskyddsbestämmelser. För vissa uppdrag med säkerhetsklassning kan krav på särskilt medborgarskap förekomma.

**Dina ansvarsområden**
-----------------------

* Ta emot, analysera och omsätta tekniska krav för on-prem-lösningar
* Bygga, granska och hantera container images
* Arbeta med systemadministration, exempelvis:


	+ administration av lagring
	+ konfigurering av användare, grupper och roller
	+ felsökning och incidenthantering
* Konfigurera och hantera virtuella nätverk
* Automatisera processer och arbetsflöden, exempelvis med Python
* Samarbeta nära Scrum Masters, Data Engineers, Data Scientists och BI-konsulter

**Din profil**
--------------


För att trivas i rollen har du ett genuint intresse för teknik och informationssäkerhet samt erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling och/eller systemadministration.


Eftersom support och användarkontakt är en viktig del av uppdraget är du kommunikativ, lösningsorienterad och bekväm med att arbeta självständigt med felsökning och problemlösning.

### **Krav**

* Mycket goda kunskaper inom mjukvarukontainrar
* Mycket goda kunskaper inom systemadministration
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Kubernetes
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Linux/Unix
* Goda kunskaper inom configuration management
* God förståelse för systemarkitektur
* Goda kunskaper i ett eller flera scriptspråk
* Mycket god förmåga att kommunicera på svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift

### **Meriterande**

* Erfarenhet av eller förståelse för Cloud Native-teknologier
* Erfarenhet av eller förståelse för ETL-processer
* Erfarenhet av eller förståelse för molnbaserade dataplattformar såsom Azure Fabric och Databricks  

  

**Ansökan**  

När du söker via Techrytera AB söker du inte bara ett jobb – du påbörjar en dialog om din fortsatta karriär. Vi vill lära känna dig, din erfarenhet och dina ambitioner för att kunna matcha dig med rätt möjligheter hos våra kunder.


Låter det intressant? Skicka in din ansökan eller hör av dig till oss så berättar vi mer. Vi ser fram emot att hitta nästa steg i din karriär tillsammans med dig.

title: Technical Service Owner
description:
**Join our Microsoft Cloud team within Managed Services as a Technical Services Owner**, where you will take end-to-end responsibility for delivering secure, scalable Microsoft Cloud services while guiding and supporting a team of skilled engineers. With a strong customer focus, you will ensure our services consistently meet business needs and drive real value.

**This is what makes the position as** **Technical Service Owner** **unique**

* Own and evolve high-impact Microsoft Cloud services, shaping both service quality and customer experience
* Combine technical leadership with hands-on expertise, designing, improving, and ensuring the reliability of our Managed Services
* Drive continuous improvement and innovation while influencing strategic decisions in a collaborative, growth-oriented environment


In the role, you will stay hands-on in the design, implementation, and optimization of Microsoft Cloud services, acting as the central point of accountability for your services, you will define technical direction, drive continuous improvement, and ensure operational excellence. At the same time, you will evaluate priorities through a business lens, balancing cost, risk, and value while identifying opportunities to enhance service offerings and support organizational strategy.


In this role, you will work closely with customers, architects, and stakeholders to translate business requirements into reliable and robust cloud services. You will proactively manage service performance, address challenges, and identify opportunities for optimization and innovation.  

  

The Hiring Manager for the role is **Heidi Storm, Head of Microsoft Cloud Services**. As a leader, she is committed to creating a welcoming, supportive, and solution-oriented environment where individuals can grow, collaborate, and make a meaningful impact. She believes that successful outcomes are driven by initiative, engagement, and high standards, where the team can share ideas and have open and transparent communication.

**Your role & influence as** **Technical Service Owner**

*Responsibility*: You hold end-to-end ownership of Digital Workplace Services, ensuring they are secure, scalable, and aligned with both customer needs and business objectives. You are accountable for service quality, performance, and continuous improvement across the full lifecycle, balancing technical excellence with cost, risk, and value. You also lead and support a team of engineers, driving high standards, fostering growth, and ensuring consistent, high-quality delivery.  

  

*Collaboration*: You act as a key bridge between engineering teams, customers, architects, and business stakeholders. By building strong relationships and maintaining open communication, you translate business requirements into robust technical solutions, align priorities, and ensure shared ownership of outcomes. You create a collaborative environment where knowledge sharing, innovation, and customer focus are central to how the team works.  

  

*Core activities:*

* **Own and manage the full lifecycle of Digital Workplace Services**, from design and implementation to operation and continuous improvement
* **Define and drive the technical roadmap for your services**, aligning with business strategy and customer needs
* **Ensure service reliability, performance, security, and compliance** through proactive monitoring and optimization
* **Lead, mentor, and support a team of engineers**, fostering a high-performing and collaborative team culture
* **Balance cost, risk, and performance** considerations to support informed decision-making and business outcomes
* **Contribute to strategic planning, influencing service development**, priorities, and long-term direction

**Benefits of joining Dustin**


We believe there's more to Dustin than just the benefits listed here. You'll fully understand this once you're with us. Curious? Our Life at Dustin page has you covered.

**You can find more of our Swedish benefits below in the vacancy.**

**This is what we imagine you bring**

**We envision you as a curious and driven professional who carries an ownership driven mindset and takes accountability for end-to-end delivery and engineering excellence. You combine strong analytical, problem solving skills and deep technical expertise with strategic business oriented thinking.**

* 8–10 years of experience in senior engineering and technical leadership roles, combined with a bachelor’s degree or equivalent structured academic foundation
* Deep expertise in Microsoft 365, identity management, and the Microsoft Defender suite, with both operational and architectural experience
* Holds at least two Microsoft certifications: one in Workplace and one in Security
* Proven ability to mentor and develop teams, establish clear ways of working, and foster a strong culture of best practices and collaboration
* Full proficiency in English and the local language (Swedish/ Norwegian) is required

**What can you expect next?**


To ensure a fair recruitment process free from unconscious bias, we handle your application anonymously and do not accept cover letters. Please refrain from sending one so that the selection is based solely on professional competencies. We expect the following steps in the recruitment process:

* Telephone screening with TA Partner, Karishma
* First interview with Manager Digital Workplace Services, Marcus
* Cognitive and Personality Assessment Tests via Assessio
* Second Interview containing Case Study & a Technical Interview with Marcus & the Hiring Manager, Heidi
* Final Interview with the Hiring Manager, Heidi

***Please note that for this specific job, we don´t provide any relocation or work permit sponsorship support***  

  

Read more about how to become a Dustineer
