title: Artificial Intelligence Engineer
description:
**About us:** 




 At Dabster, we are your one-stop destination for talent acquisition and digital innovation. Our customized, scalable talent solutions empower organizations to concentrate on their core business while we expertly match the right talent to the right roles.
 



  





**Who will you work with:** 




 A global IT services and consulting organization driving digital, cloud, data, automation, and AI transformation for large enterprises across industries. Our teams work on complex, outcome‑driven projects in domains such as banking, manufacturing, retail, healthcare, and telecom, within a collaborative, learning‑focused culture.
 



  





**Job Description:** 




 We are looking for a hands-on AI backend engineer who can design, build and operate production-grade systems around LLMs, AI agents and enterprise data. You will work across cloud infrastructure, data layers and agent logic to deliver reliable, scalable AI capabilities for real-world business use cases.
 



  





**What you will do:** 



* Build and maintain production-grade backend services using
 **Python** 
 or
 **TypeScript** 
 .
* Design, containerize and deploy services on AWS using Docker, ECS Fargate, S3, RDS and Cognito.
* Manage infrastructure as code with
 **Terraform** 
 and own CI/CD pipelines (GitLab).
* Design and operate LLM- and agent-based systems, including how AI agents interact with tools, APIs and enterprise data sources.
* Implement and optimize RAG pipelines, vector search and SQL-based enterprise data querying.
* Focus on accuracy, performance, cost and reliability when designing and running AI agents in production.
* Work comfortably across the stack – from cloud infrastructure and data layers to agent logic, orchestration and workflows.



  





**Nice to have:** 



* Experience with agent prompt engineering and governance-focused AI development (guardrails, policies, evaluation).
* Background integrating enterprise systems (ERP, finance platforms, identity/SSO).
* Exposure to analytics, query federation or finance domain use cases.
* Awareness of AI governance, compliance and observability for production AI systems.



  





**How to apply:** 




 If your expertise meets the above job, we would love to hear back from you, kindly share your resume to swaroop.swain@dabster.net

title: Chief Technology Officer, Cloud9
description:
**About us @Symphony**
 Secure. Connected. Intelligent.
   

  

 Symphony is an AI-powered communication and technology company fueled by interconnected platforms: messaging, voice, directory and analytics.
   

  

 Our end-to-end encrypted technologies enable over 1,400 institutions to accelerate AI impact, prioritize data security, navigate complex regulatory compliance and optimize business interactions.
   

  

**Role Description**
 The Chief Technology Officer, Cloud9 (CTO) is a highly strategic and technical leader responsible for defining and executing the technology vision, product architecture, engineering strategy, security framework, and innovation roadmap for Cloud9 Trader Voice. Cloud9 Trader Voice is Symphony's cloud-native, full-featured turret replacement that delivers secure, resilient voice and collaboration solutions for the global trading community connecting 20k users across 900 firms.
   

  

 This critical leadership role leads a global team of highly skilled employees and is accountable for building and scaling a world-class technology organization that delivers secure, resilient, low-latency, and highly available voice and collaboration solutions for financial markets participants. The CTO will align technology investments with commercial goals, product roadmap, regulatory requirements, and customer needs, acting as a bridge between technical execution, commercial strategy and clients. Serving as a key member of the operating leadership team, the CTO will be a trusted advisor to Symphony’s CEO, COO, CIO, and executive team on technology strategy, cyber risk, infrastructure resilience, and investment planning.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Leadership & Strategy
   

  

* Define and communicate the long-term technology vision and roadmap for the Cloud9 platform, aligned with company strategy and growth objectives.
* Partner with the Cloud9 Head of Product and Cloud9 Head of Sales to align technical goals and execution with business objectives.
* Identify and direct technical innovations that create new market opportunities.


 Technical Transformation
   

  

* Lead the overall technical strategy towards modern user interface design and deployment technologies
* Provide strong technical guidance to meet stringent availability and security requirements
* Own and evolve the technical roadmap in tight collaboration with the architecture and infrastructure teams
* Mandate and execute an AI-centric augmented engineering strategy to modernize aging code, automate quality assurance, and minimize technical debt.


 Engineering & Delivery Excellence
   

  

* Lead global software engineering, architecture, DevOps, QA, and technical operations teams.
* Provide technical guidance to maintain high system availability and functionality for this mission critical product.
* Implement AI-powered automated test systems to guarantee the accuracy and reliability of mission-critical voice trading interactions.
* Maintain and enhance modern software development practices (CI/CD, agile delivery, observability, and release governance)
* Monitor, measure and improve engineering velocity, quality, predictability, and time-to-market.


 Reliability, Security & Risk Management
   

  

* In close partnership with CISO, own Cloud9 cybersecurity strategy, secure development lifecycle, and incident response readiness.
* Ensure platform resilience, disaster recovery, business continuity, and high-availability architecture.
* Maintain compliance with applicable regulatory, privacy, and data retention obligations relevant to financial markets customers.
* Own leadership response during major incidents and customer-impacting events.


 Engineering Leadership & Talent
   

  

* Act as the bridge across global engineering sites
* Recruit, mentor, and lead high-performing engineering teams while implementing scalable development practices.
* Lead organizational design, succession planning, and talent development across technology functions.


 Customer & Market Leadership
   

  

* Engage directly with strategic customers, regulators, partners, and prospects as the senior technology representative.
* Monitor competitor capabilities and market trends to inform roadmap priorities.


**Required Qualifications**
* 20+ years experience in technology/engineering, including 10+ years in engineering management leading multiple global functions.
* Proven success as a CTO, VP Engineering, or senior technology leader in a B2B SaaS, fintech, communications, or regulated technology environment.
* Must have trading floor systems experience, demonstrated deployments, and global experience in capital markets.
* Proven success in leading large-scale architectural transformations.
* Strong track record delivering mission-critical, high-availability platforms with demanding uptime and performance requirements.
* Experience with complex systems spanning cloud based operations, deployed hardware and remote management.
* Extensive experience with Linux/Windows production workloads and deep knowledge of cloud technology.
* Strong commercial acumen with experience aligning product and technology investments to revenue growth.
* Exceptional communication skills and experience presenting to Boards, investors, enterprise customers, and senior stakeholders.


 Education
   

  

* Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Computer Science or related engineering field.


**Preferred Experience**
* Knowledge of realtime communications, media and voice systems, recording, surveillance, or unified communications platforms.
* Experience with acquisitions, post-merger integration, or international expansion.
* Familiarity with AI/ML use cases in workflow automation, analytics, or customer experience.


**Compensation**
* Competitive salary
* Bonus Plan


**Benefits And Perks**
* Regional specific competitive benefits
* Build your own Benefits (BYOB) perk
* Local events, team building, and development opportunities


 We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment.

title: Chief Architect – Data Migration & Planon Transformation
description:
Role Overview:
 



 We are looking for an experienced Chief Architect with strong expertise in enterprise data migration, cloud architecture, ETL frameworks, and CAFM-to-Planon transformation programs.
 



 Key Skills Required:
 



 • Data Migration Strategy
 



 • Planon / CAFM Migration
 



 • Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
 



 • BigQuery / Dataflow / Cloud Storage
 



 • ETL & Data Transformation
 



 • Data Modeling & Mapping
 



 • Data Governance & Validation
 



 • SAP Cloud Architecture
 



 • Migration Reconciliation & Cutover Planning
 



 • Agile Delivery Model
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




 • Lead end-to-end data migration strategy from legacy CAFM systems to Planon
 



 • Ensure data integrity, consistency, and completeness across assets, maintenance, contracts, and space domains
 



 • Define data models, mapping rules, transformation logic, and validation frameworks
 



 • Collaborate with business stakeholders, SMEs, and technical teams for migration planning and execution
 



 • Design and oversee ETL pipelines, migration tooling, reconciliation, and cutover processes
 



 • Ensure compliance with governance, security, audit, and reporting standards
 



 • Build scalable and automated migration solutions using GCP services such as BigQuery, Dataflow, and Cloud Storage
 



 • Support post-migration stabilization and operational continuity

title: ServiceNow Senior Technical Consultant
description:
Är du en erfaren ServiceNow-specialist som vill vara med på en spännande resa?
   

  

 B3 Now är ett av B3 Consulting Groups nyare specialistbolag, med fokus på ServiceNow. Hos oss blir den del av en start up–miljö där energi, nyfikenhet och innovation präglar vardagen. Du får möjlighet att leda komplexa implementationer, designa smarta lösningar och leverera affärsvärde på riktigt hos våra kunder.
   

  

 Som
 **Senior Technical Consultant** 
 hos B3 Now blir du en del av ett engagerat team av ServiceNow specialister. Du arbetar i projekt och uppdrag med stor påverkan hos nationella och internationella kunder inom bland annat tillverknings industrin, retail, finans, energi, telekom och offentlig sektor.
   

  

 Din roll handlar om att skapa värde, från design och konfiguration/utveckling till implementation och rådgivning. Du tar ansvar för att bygga robusta lösningar på ServiceNow-plattformen som hjälper våra kunder att automatisera processer och driva digital transformation.
   

  

 Du kommer bland annat att:
   

  

* Översätta funktionella krav till tekniska lösningar med fokus på prestanda, skalbarhet och långsiktig hållbarhet.
* Designa och implementera lösningar enligt ServiceNows best practices.
* Bidra till vidareutveckling av våra interna metoder, kompetenser och leveransmodeller.
* Arbeta nära kundens verksamhet för att skapa lösningar som kopplar ihop teknik och affärsvärde.
* Vara en del av ett kompetent och stödjande team som gärna delar kunskap och hjälper dig utvecklas.
* Arbeta med rådgivning.


 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du är både tekniskt erfaren och affärsmässig, som kan bygga broar mellan teknik och verksamhet.
   

  

**Vidare ser vi att du har följande kvalifikationer:**
* Relevant akademisk examen eller motsvarande.
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av att konfigurera, utveckla och implementera lösningar på ServiceNow-plattformen.
* Relevanta certifieringar inom ServiceNow.
* God kunskap om webbtjänster (REST, SOAP), XML och JSON.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska.
* Kommunikativ, problemlösande och resultatorienterad.
* Kreativ och förmågan att analysera och lösa komplexa utmaningar.


**Vi erbjuder:**
* Attraktiv och flexibel lönemodell.
* Möjlighet att påverka dina arbetstider och arbetsplats.
* Utbildning för din professionella utveckling.
* En stark wellness-satsning genom Team B3, som främjar både hälsa och arbetsglädje.
* Kollegor med höga ambitioner och olika bakgrunder, ett inkluderande och internationellt mindset.
* En utmanande roll med stora möjligheter att växa tekniskt och professionellt.
* En kultur där vi både levererar värde till våra kunder och har roligt tillsammans.
* Möjlighet att påverka, bidra och vara med och forma framtiden för B3 Now.


**Om B3 Now**
 På B3 Now tror vi på att kombinera yrkesstolthet med glädje. Vi drivs av att göra skillnad, både för våra kunder och våra kollegor. Vi bygger en miljö där lärande, samarbete och utveckling står i centrum, och där du får utrymme att växa i den riktning du vill.
   

  

 Vi investerar i din kompetens genom utbildningar, mentorprogram och kontinuerlig coaching. Vi tror att när du utvecklas, utvecklas även vi.
   

  

 B3 Now är en del av B3 Consulting Group, ett av Sveriges snabbast växande konsultbolag. Med kontor i Sverige, Norge, Polen och internationella samarbeten hjälper vi organisationer att maximera värdet av ServiceNow genom smarta, skalbara och effektiva lösningar.
   

  

 Vi är över 1000 specialister globalt i koncernen – och växer snabbt. Hos oss får du både tryggheten av en stor aktör och närheten i ett mindre bolag där du har stort inflytande.
   

  

**Kontakt**
 Är du redo att ta nästa steg i din karriär? Ansök nu! Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta Stefan Saarnak.
   

  

 +46 76 725 7059

title: Pre-Sales Solution Manager
description:
**VX Fiber is looking for a hands-on Pre-Sales Solution Manager to help design and shape the future of our global SaaS platform and telecom solutions.** 




  





 Do you enjoy turning complex customer needs into scalable, real-world solutions? Do you want to work at the intersection of technology, business, and telecom infrastructure in an international environment? Then you might be the one we’re looking for. 
 



  





**About the Role** 




 As a Pre-Sales Solution Manager at VX Fiber, you will play a key role in helping customers understand how VX Fiber’s products, platform, and services can solve their business and operational challenges. 
 



 This is a customer-facing role where you will work closely with Sales, Product, and Delivery teams to understand customer pain points, guide technical and commercial discussions, and translate customer needs into clear, practical, and value-driven solutions based on VX Fibers product and related services. 
 



 You will be involved early in the sales process, supporting customer meetings, workshops, RFx responses, solution scoping, and handover into delivery. The role requires a good understanding of telecom, L2/L3 networks, OSS/BSS, digital platforms, and network operations, the focus is about connecting customer needs with the right VX Fiber solution. 
 



 You’ll be part of a cross-functional, international team where collaboration, curiosity, and a practical problem-solving mindset are part of everyday work. 
 



  





**What you'll do** 



* Work closely with Sales in customer meetings, discovery sessions, and pre-sales workshops
* Understand customer challenges, business goals, and operational pain points
* Translate customer needs into relevant VX Fiber solutions, based on VX Suite, our managed platform, and our service offering
* Explain how VX Fiber’s products and value proposition can support customer outcomes such as faster rollout, lower operational complexity, improved automation, and scalable network operations
* Support RFx processes, including RFI, RFP, and RFQ responses
* Prepare solution descriptions, scope, assumptions, and customer-facing material
* Create high-level solution proposals together with Product, Delivery, and Technical teams
* Help identify gaps between customer requirements and current product capabilities
* Support commercial discussions by clarifying solution value, delivery approach, dependencies, and risks
* Ensure a smooth handover from pre-sales into delivery once opportunities move forward
* Contribute to improving sales tools, templates, demo material, and ways of working within Solution Sales
* Bring customer feedback into Product and Delivery teams to help shape future improvements



  





**What we offer you** 



* **Meaningful work** 
 – contribute to digital infrastructure that enables connectivity and societal growth
* **Customer impact** 
 – help customers solve real operational and business challenges
* **Growth culture** 
 – take ownership, drive ideas, and grow in a role that combines technology, telecom, and business
* **Global context** 
 – collaborate with colleagues and customers across different markets
* **Real** 
**collaboration** 
 – we design, solve, and succeed together



  





**What you Bring** 




**Education** 




 Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Telecommunications, Computer Science, Software Engineering, Business Technology, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience. 
 



**Experience** 



* 5–10+ years of experience from telecom, preferably within fiber, ISP, wholesale, open access networks, or digital infrastructure and understand the fiber business models and economics behind investment decisions.
* Experience from technical pre-sales, solution sales, customer-facing consulting, solution management, or similar roles
* Good understanding of OSS/BSS systems such as provisioning, inventory, CRM, billing, orchestration, or service management
* Ability to understand customer requirements and turn them into clear solution proposals
* Comfortable leading or supporting customer workshops, presentations, and technical discussions
* Experience contributing to RFx processes and commercial proposals
* Understanding of network operations, access networks, service delivery, and telecom business models is a strong advantage
* Understand the fiber business models and economics behind investment decisions.
* Familiarity with APIs, integrations, and SaaS platforms is beneficial, but this is not a software development role



**Language** 




 Fluent in English (Swedish is a strong advantage).
 



 Additional languages are a plus, especially German given VX Fiber’s international operations.
 



  





**About the employment** 




**Type:** 
 Permanent, full-time role.
 



**Location:** 
 Hybrid/remote flexibility, but living in Sweden or Germany.
 



**Location office:** 
 Stockholm, Umeå or Germany.
 



 Note! You must have the right to work within the European Union / Schengen area
 



 We are looking to fill the position as soon as possible.
 



  





**Why VX Fiber?** 




 VX Fiber is a Swedish technology company with over 20 years of global experience in fiber-to-the-home (FTTH) and open access networks. Our goal is to create digital freedom for individuals, businesses, and communities by offering reliable, scalable, and sustainable network solutions.
 



 We offer a managed platform that simplifies fiber network operations—from full-stack OSS/BSS to active equipment and field deployment. Our platform is modular, scalable by design, and made to transform.
 



 We connect network owners, service providers, and end-users through an open access model that accelerates time to market, reduces cost, and automates complexity. With proven flexibility and fast onboarding, our technology supports sustainable, future-ready networks.
 



  





**VX Fiber – Made to transform. Scalable by design.**

title: Backend Engineer
description:
*Kreditz is transforming how businesses assess credit and risk using real-time data and NextGen Credit Scoring solutions.*
*As one of Europe’s fastest-growing FinTech scaleups - we’ve earned a place on the* 
***Sifted 100: Nordics & Benelux***
*list in both 2024 and 2025 and most recently, we were proud to receive a* 
***double win at the Credit Management & Compliance Awards 2025***
*, being named both "* 
***Fintech Rocket of the Year***
*" and "* 
***Breakthrough of the Year***
*".*
*With strong growth across the Nordics and Europe, our clients range from leading banks and iGaming giants to fast-moving digital innovators.*
**About The Position**
 Kreditz is looking for a
 **Backend Engineer** 
 to join our Tech team.
   

  

 In this role, you will design, develop, and evolve scalable backend services as we modernize our infrastructure. You will play an important role in shaping backend architecture, defining clear APIs between services, and ensuring our platform remains robust, secure, and efficient in a high-growth FinTech environment.
   

  

 We're looking for someone who wants to help transform a high-performing fintech platform into a billion-dollar business.
   

  

**What Can Kreditz Offer**
* A once-in-a-lifetime growth journey, from startup to Global scaleup
* A journey where everyone in the team plays a crucial role for our company’s success
* Fun-loving, driven, and passionate colleagues who support each other’s success
* A culture that celebrates progress, humility, and teamwork
* We win together
* 24/7 access to gym, sauna and sports facilities at our office, plus additional wellness allowance
* Competitive base salary


**RESPONSIBILITES**
**Some Of The Main Responsibilities You Will Cover**
* Design, develop, and maintain backend services and APIs
* Define and evolve backend architecture, including service boundaries and API contracts between microservices
* Build and deploy services on AWS using ECS, Fargate, and Service Connect.
* Collaborate closely with product and engineering teams to design scalable, maintainable solutions.
* Implement and maintain automated tests and CI/CD pipelines.
* Work with serverless technologies (AWS Lambda) for event processing.
* Perform code reviews and contribute hands-on to projects.
* Leverage AI agents and tools to enhance development workflows and productivity.
* Document system architecture, development processes, and integrations.


**WE ARE LOOKING FOR**
 A motivated and skilled Backend Engineer who enjoys solving complex problems and is comfortable working in a fast-paced, evolving environment. You have strong backend fundamentals and architectural thinking, and you enjoy designing systems that scale.
   

  

**We Believe That You Have**
* A Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5+ years of experience in backend development.
* Experience with Go (or willingness to pick it up quickly)
* Experience with cloud platforms, preferably AWS (ECS, Fargate, Service Connect)
* Strong experience in API design (REST and/or gRPC) and defining service contracts (OpenAPI)
* Experience designing backend architectures in microservice-based systems
* Experience with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Familiarity with containerization (Docker/Podman).
* Familiarity with messaging and event-driven systems (SQS, SNS)
* Experience with databases like PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, DynamoDB.
* Familiarity with monitoring and observability tools (CloudWatch, OpenTelemetry, X-Ray).
* Proficiency with Git and version control workflows.
* Excellent English communication skills (Swedish is a plus).
* Interest in using AI agents and tools as part of daily development work


**Nice To Have**
* Experience with Ruby on Rails and/or Python
* Experience working in FinTech or other regulated environments


**WHY JOIN NOW?**
 At Kreditz, you'll have the opportunity to work in a cutting-edge, fast-growing FinTech company that's redefining the credit scoring industry. With the backing of major investors and a clear vision for the future, your work will make a real impact on financial inclusion worldwide. Join us and be a part of something truly transformative!
   

  

**APPOINTMENT OF ROLE**
 Q1 2026
   

  

**SCOPE**
 Full-time, permanent employment (tillsvidareanställning)
   

  

**SALARY**
 Competitive salary
   

  

**REPORTING**
 You will be reporting to the company’s VP Engineering
   

  

**WORKPLACE**
 Danderyd, Stockholm
   

  

**RECRUITMENT PROCESS**
 Ongoing selection, we review candidates continuously.
   

  

*Last day for applications 31st March 2026*
**CRIMINAL RECORDS EXTRACT**
 As part of our recruitment process we will ask you to present a clean criminal records extract
   

  

**CONTACT**
 Lorenzo Puccio, VP Strategic Operations, Lorenzo@kreditz.com
   

  

 For more information about the role feel free to reach out to our Co-founder/CTO, arlen@kreditz.com
   

  

 Intelligent credit- & risk decisions made easy with open banking & AI-technology

title: Commercial Account Executive - Acquisition
description:
At Snowflake, we are powering the era of the agentic enterprise. To usher in this new era, we seek AI-native thinkers across every function who are energized by the opportunity to reinvent how they work. You don’t just use tools; you possess an innate curiosity, treating AI as a high-trust collaborator that is core to how you solve problems and accelerate your impact. We look for low-ego individuals who thrive in dynamic and fast-moving environments and move with an experimental mindset — who rapidly test emerging capabilities to discover simpler, more powerful ways to deliver results. At Snowflake, your role isn't just to execute a function, but to help redefine the future of how work gets done.
   

  

**YOUR DAY-TO-DAY:**
* Research, identify, and generate new opportunities on a weekly basis via the phone and web (this is an Inside Sales role)
* Methodically qualify, build, and manage an accurate sales funnel and pipeline
* Strategically, build and navigate your book to close new business and grow existing accounts
* Sell our solutions with a consultative approach in a high energy environment
* Maintain a high volume of activity including outbound calls, emails, & social selling
* Skillfully deliver web based presentations using inside sales best practices
* Comfortably sell to VP & C-Suite executives, navigating through multiple decision makers in large complex orgs
* Consistently exceed your quarterly and annual sales quota and be well-compensated for doing so
* Thrive on change while remaining highly organized, optimistic, and coachable
* Learn and embrace the Command of the Message sales strategies
* Drive to individually compete (and win!) while still being a team player
* Earn additional prizes, perks and promotions by working hard and having fun!


**OUR IDEAL COMMERCIAL ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE WILL HAVE:**
* 2+ year experience in full cycle sales. Must have prior experience closing deals.
* Ideally experience working in a high-paced tech industry
* Strong in-person, phone, and written customer communication skills.
* The ability to make formal and informal presentations to staff and clients.
* Experience with CRM a plus.
* Demonstrated success in achieving sales goals.
* Must have excellent verbal & written communication skills.
* Must be a creative solutions thinker who can drive sales success.
* Must be detail oriented and flexible.
* Fluent in Swedish
* Fluend in Danish would be a plus


 Snowflake is growing fast, and we’re scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth. We are looking for people who share our values, challenge ordinary thinking, and push the pace of innovation while building a future for themselves and Snowflake.
   

  

 How do you want to make your impact?
   

  

 For jobs located in the United States, please visit the job posting on the Snowflake Careers Site for salary and benefits information: careers.snowflake.com

title: Enterprise-säljare / Enterprise Account Executive
description:
**Om Promote** 




 Promote hjälper stora internationella organisationer skapa lärande som faktiskt förändrar beteenden . Vi kombinerar en egen plattform, en forskningsbaserad metodik och ett nära samarbete med våra kunder. Atlas Copco, Telia och TRATON är några av dem vi jobbar med.
 



  





 Men det vi egentligen gör är inte att sälja en plattform. Vi hjälper våra kunder att förändra hur lärande fungerar hos dem på riktigt.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Det här är en roll för dig som trivs i komplexa affärer där svaret inte finns från början. Du jobbar med stora organisationer där många intressenter är involverade, behoven inte alltid är tydliga, och där lösningen växer fram tillsammans med kunden.
 



  





 Du ansvarar för affärerna, från första samtal till stängd affär och långsiktigt partnerskap. Det handlar inte om att presentera något färdigt, utan om att förstå, utmana och forma rätt lösning tillsammans. Du säljer både vår plattform och tillhörande konsulttjänster, och jobbar tätt ihop med Customer Success, konsulter och produktteam hela vägen.
 



  





**Hur vi säljer** 




 Vi tror inte på att pitcha oss fram. Vi tror på att ställa frågor som gör skillnad, lyssna på riktigt, och bygga relationer som håller över tid. I många fall börjar vi i något oklart och arbetar oss tillsammans med kunden fram till något som faktiskt fungerar. Det kräver tålamod, nyfikenhet och förmågan att hålla en affär levande utan att stressa fram ett svar.
 



  





**Vem vi tror att du är** 




 Du är en erfaren säljare med minst 5 år av komplex B2B-försäljning bakom dig — med eget quota-ansvar och dokumenterade affärer i stora organisationer. Du vet hur man navigerar långa säljcykler och komplexa beslutsprocesser, och du har stängt affärer som krävt uthållighet.
 



  





 Samtidigt är du inte den som kör på med en färdig pitch. Du är genuint nyfiken på hur organisationer fungerar, bra på att lyssna och trygg i att inte alltid ha svaret direkt. Du bygger förtroende snarare än att ta affärer — och du vet att de bästa relationerna är de som håller långt efter att kontraktet är signerat.
 



 Du trivs i ett tätt team där samarbete är en förutsättning för att lyckas.
 



  





**Erfarenhet** 



* 5+ år i en säljarroll med egen quota och ansvar för hela säljcykeln
* Dokumenterade affärer med återkommande intäkter i stora, komplexa organisationer
* Van vid att navigera flera beslutsfattare - HR, L&D, IT, inköp och C-nivå
* Förstår de krav och frågor som uppstår i enterprise-affärer och vet när du ska involvera rätt person
* Flytande svenska och engelska



 Har du erfarenhet av SaaS, konsulttjänster eller lärande/HR är det ett plus — men vi värdesätter rätt person högre än rätt bransch.
 



  





**Ansökan** 




 Vid intresse, skicka ditt CV och personligt brev till christoffer.andreasson@promoteint.com. Skriv gärna några rader om hur du bygger förtroende i en affär eller berätta om ett tillfälle där du verkligen förstod en kunds problem på djupet.
 



  




* **Plats:** 
 Stockholm (kontor + flexibilitet)
* **Anställning:** 
 Tillsvidare, 6 månaders provanställning
* **Start:** 
 Enligt överenskommelse

title: Senior Linux Engineer
description:
**Join our Team**
**About This Opportunity**
**Unlock Your Potential with Ericsson: Senior Linux Engineer Opportunity!**
 At Ericsson, we're driving innovation with a dedicated team responsible for a cutting-edge Yocto-based Linux distribution. We're on the hunt for seasoned Linux software engineers who are passionate about making a mark in the Linux ecosystem. If you have proven expertise in Yocto and a robust background in the Linux kernel, we want you to be part of our exciting mission.
   

  

 Your Impact as a Senior Linux Engineer, you'll be at the heart of delivering high-quality solutions within Ericsson and contributing to key open-source projects that shape the future.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Lead & Innovate: Drive strategic initiatives within upstream Linux kernel & Yocto communities, amplifying Ericsson's presence.
* Develop & Enhance: Implement and maintain Linux kernel extensions, from Ericsson-written modules to performance optimizations.
* Collaborate & Contribute: Work hand-in-hand with users to refine kernel performance and support technical staff using our distribution.
* Explore & Expand: Dive into other FOSS projects like U-Boot, ATF, GLIBC, and push the boundaries of embedded systems.
* Test & Perfect: Ensure our distribution is robust and reliable through rigorous testing and prototyping.


**The Skills You Bring**
 Bring your skills to a place where they’ll be appreciated and expanded. Ideal candidates will have:
   

  

* Educational Excellence: M.S. in Computer Science or Computer Engineering, or equivalent experience.
* Kernel Mastery: Proven experience in Linux kernel development with a track record of contributions (please provide patch submissions).
* Open Source Advocate: Familiarity with community norms and behaviors.
* Programming Proficiency: Expertise in C, C++, and Rust.
* Yocto Enthusiast: Experience with Yocto and its community.
* Silicon Pioneer: Experience in new silicon introduction within embedded Linux environments.
* Communication Champion: Strong skills to articulate ideas and collaborate effectively.


**Application**
 We look forward to receiving your application, including your CV/resume in English.
   

  

**Application deadline:** 
 8th of June 2026
   

  

**Location** 
 : Stockholm, Sweden
   

  

**Work setup** 
 : We aim for approximately 60% on-site presence at our office.
   

  

 Please note that we do not accept or process applications submitted via email.
   

  

**Why join Ericsson?**
 At Ericsson, you´ll have an outstanding opportunity. The chance to use your skills and imagination to push the boundaries of what´s possible. To build solutions never seen before to some of the world’s toughest problems. You´ll be challenged, but you won’t be alone. You´ll be joining a team of diverse innovators, all driven to go beyond the status quo to craft what comes next.
   

  

**What happens once you apply?**
 Click Here to find all you need to know about what our typical hiring process looks like.
   

  

 Encouraging a diverse and inclusive organization is core to our values at Ericsson, that's why we champion it in everything we do. We truly believe that by collaborating with people with different experiences we drive innovation, which is essential for our future growth. We encourage people from all backgrounds to apply and realize their full potential as part of our Ericsson team. Ericsson is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. learn more.
   

  

**Primary country and city:** 
 Sweden (SE) || Stockholm
   

  

**Req ID:** 
 777700

title: Integration Architect i Örebro
description:
Beskrivning av tjänsten
   

  

 Vill du vara med i Sveriges vassaste integrations-team? Då är du rätt person för oss!
   

  

 Nu söker vi Dig som vill jobba som Integrationsarkitekt på CGI. Vi erbjuder dig som har ett brinnande intresse för integrationsarkitektur att börja i ett team som arbetar tätt tillsammans.
   

  

 Vi arbetar med spännande kunder i alla branscher vilket gör att du ständigt får nya utmaningar och möjlighet att vidareutvecklas. På CGI strävar vi efter att skapa framgångsrika team som har roligt på jobbet och hjälper varandra att utvecklas. CGI är Sveriges ledande IT-företag och ett av världens största. Detta ger fantastiska karriärmöjligheter och möjlighet till spännande uppdrag.
   

  

 Vårt framgångsrika integrationsteam är som ett eget litet företag inom ramarna för stora CGI vilket ger en stark teamkänsla och samhörighet. Vårt integrationsteam i Örebro går för högvarv och behöver förstärkning. Här får Du möjlighet att jobba med några av de främsta integrationsspecialisterna i branschen!
   

  

 Dina framtida arbetsuppgifter
   

  

* Utveckla och vidareutveckla referens- och målarkitekturer inom integration, data, och infrastruktur, samt ta fram kvalificerade beslutsunderlag för strategiska teknikval.
* Ansvara för och driva moderniseringsinitiativ av integrationsplattformar i hybridmiljöer.
* Driva övergången från monolitiska system till en skalbar och modulär arkitektur byggd på mikrotjänster och API-first.
* Omvärldsbevakning: Analysera, utvärdera och rekommendera teknologier med fokus på långsiktig hållbarhet och kostnadseffektivitet.
* Arbeta nära kunder, utvecklingsteam och leverantörer för att skapa robusta lösningar.
* Synliggöra CGIs integrationskompetens för att bygga förtroende och skapa engagemang hos potentiella kunder.


 Kvalifikationer för att bli framgångsrik denna roll
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har:**
* 5 till 10+ års erfarenhet i rollen som integrationsarkitekt
* Kunskap om Azure PaaS, API Management, Kubernetes, Hybrid Integrations
* Erfarenhet av större moderniseringsprojekt i komplexa IT-miljöer med molnlösningar.
* Förståelse för informations- och dataarkitektur.
* Förmåga att ta fram målarkitekturer och IT-roadmaps.
* Mycket god svenska och engelska i tal och skrift
* Vana av agilt arbete med iterativa leveranser


**Meriterande om du också har:**
* Relevanta certifieringar, till exempel: IT-Arkitekt Master via Dataföreningen, Certified Software Architect Microsoft Platform, Azure Solutions Architect Expert
* Erfarenhet av olika middleware (t.ex. MuleSoft, BizTalk, Boomi)
* Erfarenhet av andra molnlösningar t.ex. AWS och GCP
* Erfarenhet av Generativ AI


**Vad du kan förvänta dig av oss:**
 Vi är en del av CGI:s Developer Center of Excellence (CoE), vilket innebär:
   

  

* Tillgång till ett starkt tekniskt nätverk med några av CGI:s främsta utvecklare
* Kunskapsutbyte, best practices och gemensam teknisk utveckling
* Små team med stort inflytande i det dagliga arbetet
* Styrkan, stabiliteten och möjligheterna i ett globalt bolag
* Tekniskt avancerade projekt med fokus på Microsoft och Azure
* Hög kvalitet i allt vi gör


 Vi kombinerar teknisk spets med en social och inkluderande kultur där vi gör mycket tillsammans:
   

  

* Teamaktiviteter
* After works
* Gemensam fika
* Tekniska workshops etc


 Här är det högt i tak, nära till skratt och stort tekniskt engagemang.
   

  

**Placeringsort:** 
 Örebro
   

  

**Låter det intressant?**
 Vi ser fram emot att höra ifrån dig! Skicka in din ansökan redan i dag då urvalet sker löpande. Har du frågor om rollen, kontakta gärna rekryterande konsultchef Giliam Oostema, giliam.oostema@cgi.com.
   

  

**Vad CGI erbjuder dig**
 CGIs kombination av global och lokal närvaro, med kontor på 30 orter i Sverige, ger nöjda kunder men innebär även att du som anställd alltid har ett kontor nära dig. Detta i kombination med flexibla arbetstider ger dig möjlighet till balans mellan privatliv och arbete, oavsett var i livet just du befinner dig.
   

  

 På CGI finns även stora möjligheter till interna karriärvägar där du kan välja att bli specialist inom ditt område, bredda dig inom nya områden eller ta en ledande befattning. Via våra interna nätverk, projekt och åtaganden i globala och nationella industrier, erbjuder vi dig kompetensutveckling och engagerade ledare som stöttar just dig i din utveckling.
   

  

**Mer information om våra förmåner:**
* Aktieprogram och delägarskap: Som delägare har du möjlighet att påverka och i vårt aktieprogram matchar CGI ditt bidrag, krona för krona upp till 3% av din månadslön.
* Friskvårdsbidrag: Vi erbjuder ett årligt friskvårdsbidrag på 4000 kr.
* Föräldralön: Vi betalar upp till cirka 90% av din lön under den första tiden hemma.
* Trygg anställning: Våra konsulter anställs med kollektivavtal och försäkringar.
* Pensionslösningar: Vi erbjuder attraktiva och förmånliga pensionslösningar.
* Personalbil: Personalbilen används som en privatbil men leasas av CGI.


 #ARCSWE
   

  

**Låt oss som ägare omvandla verklig insikt till handling – tillsammans.**
 Livet på CGI bygger på ägande, lagarbete, respekt och tillhörighet. Tillsammans med oss kommer du att kunna nå din fulla potential.
   

  

 Du är inbjuden att ta ägandeskap redan från första dagen i vårt arbete med att förverkliga vår dröm om att skapa en arbetsmiljö där vi trivs med att arbeta tillsammans och bidrar till framgången för vårt företag. Det är därför vi kallar oss CGI Partners snarare än anställda. Vi drar nytta av vår kollektiva framgång och tillsammans får vi möjlighet att aktivt forma vår företagsstrategi och inriktning.
   

  

 Ditt arbete skapar värde. Du kommer att vara med att utveckla innovativa lösningar och bygga relationer med medarbetare och kunder samtidigt som du får tillgång till globala möjligheter att skala upp dina idéer, omfamna nya möjligheter och dra nytta av gedigen bransch- och teknikexpertis.
   

  

 Du kommer att forma din karriär tillsammans med ett företag som är byggt för att växa och bestå. Du får stöd av ledare som bryr sig om din hälsa och ditt välbefinnande och ger dig möjligheter att fördjupa dina kunskaper och vidga dina vyer.
   

  

 Bli en del en av världens största leverantörer av IT- och affärskonsulttjänster.

title: Solution Designer - Software Development Web & Digital Solutions
description:
As a Solution Designer you will be part of a dedicated agile Software Development Team and your main responsibilities are:
   

  

* To guide and support the agile development team to build high quality software solutions
* To develop and design robust and sustainable IT Solutions to ensure the best user and customer experience.
* To act as a bridge between business and technical knowledge
* Be able to translate user stories into detailed solutions and integration design, following architecture guidelines.
* To team up with IT Solution Architects and Solution Designers to collaborate on technical aspects by following and improving Vattenfall IT framework and guidelines
* To refine and review business requirements to ensure the most effective use of infrastructure, IT systems and customer experience
* Your solution design and software development skills are according to best practice principles
* Contribute to agile team norms and coding standards, software design best practices, and architecture strategy
* Use, ensure and implement secure software development
* Be an ambassador for application solution best practices and application security
* Share your software development and solution design best practices with your peers within IT


**Qualifications**
 We believe you will thrive in this role if you have strong communication skills, a solid understanding of the IT business, and a collaborative mindset, along with the ability to motivate others. A deep interest in driving value-creating innovation is key. We also value experiences that have helped you develop leadership capabilities.
   

  

**Your Background Peferably Include**
* University degree in Information Technology, Engineering or other relevant education
* The tech stack: Angular 18+, C#, JavaScript, TypeScript, CSS .net core, Microsoft Azure Cloud solutions
* Experienced fullstack developer (Frontend and Backend)
* Experienced in Frontend software development
* Experienced in API development, design, integration and management
* Experienced in Solution Design and good understanding of IT architecture within end to end web and cloud solutions
* Have used Azure DevOps, Visual Studio, Git, Tailwind, Bootstrap, SAST and DAST tools in your daily work
* A deep interest in driving value-creating innovation and of using AI software development tools (like Cursor, Github CoPilot and Lovable)
* Knowledge of  Optimizely (EpiServer CMS) development is a beneficial
* Experience in Agile frameworks and agile software development
* English fluently both oral and written
* It is beneficial if you also speak Swedish fluently both oral and written


 Additional Information
   

  

*We offer a challenging and international work environment and the possibility to work with some of the best in the field. You will be working in interdisciplinary teams and you can always count on support from committed colleagues as ‘Ask and Share’ concept is essential for the way we work. We offer attractive employment conditions (smart working, flexible working hours and a good-work-life balance) and opportunities for personal and professional development. Click here for further information.*
**Location**
 Stockholm, Solna
   

  

 Umeå
   

  

**For more information** 
 about the position you are welcome to contact hiring manager Theresa Jonsson Albertsson, theresa.albertson@vattenfall.com. For more information about the recruitment process you are welcome to contact our recruiter Julia Norberg, julia.norberg@vattenfall.com
   

  

 Trade Union representatives in Sweden via Vattenfall´s switchboard +46 8 739 50 00. Sofi Wadström (Akademikerna), Patricia Ek (Unionen), Christer Gustafsson (Ledarna), Juha Siipilehto (SEKO)
   

  

**We welcome your application no later than 2026-06-07** 
 . We kindly request that you do not send applications by any means other than via our website and that you refrain from submitting a cover letter with your application. You apply quickly and easily by answering screening questions and attaching your CV.
   

  

 At Vattenfall we are convinced that diversity contributes to build a more profitable and attractive company and we strive to be a good role model regarding diversity. Vattenfall works actively for all employees to have the same opportunities and rights regardless of gender, ethnicity, age, transgender identity or expression, religion or other belief, disability or sexual orientation. Click here for further information.
   

  

 The security of Vattenfall and its employees is essential. For that reason, a pre-employment screening will be part of your recruitment process. The screening is based on the role you will fulfill within Vattenfall.
   

  

 Since Vattenfall is a part of the Swedish critical infrastructure, many of our services are security classed. If this position is security classed the final candidates might be subjected to a security vetting process, according to the Swedish legislation.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application!
   

  

**Company Description**
 Vattenfall is one of Europe’s largest producers and retailers of electricity and heat. Our main markets are Sweden, Germany, the Netherlands, Denmark, and the UK. The Vattenfall Group has approximately 21 000 employees. We have been electrifying industries, powering homes and transforming life through innovation for more than 100 years.

title: Software Architect - Mobile
description:
**About Air Apps**
 At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger- and moving faster. We’re a family-founded company on a mission to create the world’s first AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal, in 2018 - and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco - we’ve remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide.
   

  

 Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe.
   

  

 Join us on this journey to redefine resource management - and change lives along the way.
   

  

* This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts.


**The Role**
 As a
 **Mobile Software Architect** 
 at Air Apps, you will take the lead in designing scalable and performant mobile architecture for our suite of applications - primarily focused on iOS, with cross-functional knowledge of Android development considered a plus.
   

  

 You will collaborate with product, design, and engineering teams to craft elegant and efficient solutions that support millions of users globally. This is a strategic and technical leadership role where your decisions will influence the long-term evolution of our mobile ecosystem.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Define and lead the mobile architecture strategy, ensuring a scalable and maintainable foundation across projects.
* Focus primarily on iOS architecture, libraries, and platform-specific patterns, while maintaining an understanding of Android frameworks.
* Collaborate with engineers, designers, and product managers to ensure architectural decisions align with product goals and user experience.
* Establish and enforce coding standards, design patterns, and performance guidelines.
* Lead architectural reviews and provide guidance on refactoring and scaling existing mobile applications.
* Design APIs, SDKs, and modular components that can be reused across teams.
* Guide decisions around third-party libraries, mobile tooling, and build/deployment pipelines.
* Partner with backend and cloud teams to ensure seamless integration between mobile apps and services.
* Stay current with the latest trends and best practices in mobile architecture, performance, and security.
* Mentor mobile engineers and help elevate the team’s technical proficiency.


**Requirements**
* Around 6+ years of experience in mobile development with a strong architectural mindset.
* Deep expertise in iOS development using Swift (Objective-C knowledge is a plus).
* Solid understanding of UIKit, SwiftUI, Combine, and other modern iOS frameworks.
* Experience with app performance optimization, modularization, and offline-first strategies.
* Familiarity with Android development (Kotlin/Java) is a strong plus.
* Experience integrating with APIs, handling mobile data storage, caching, and background tasks.
* Strong knowledge of App Store submission, mobile security, and compliance guidelines.
* Experience with mobile CI/CD pipelines, testing frameworks, and deployment automation.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to explain architectural concepts to both technical and non-technical team members.
* Passion for clean code, design patterns (MVVM, VIPER, etc.), and scalable architecture.


**What benefits do we offer?**
* Apple hardware ecosystem for work.
* Annual Bonus
* Top-tier Health and Life Insurance for peace of mind.
* Transportation Budget to support your commute needs.
* Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
* Childcare support.
* Air Conference - an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.
* Pension Fund to support your long-term financial planning.
* Urban Sports Club membership to keep you active.
* Meals 100% free at the hub.


**Diversity & Inclusion**
 At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.
   

  

**Application Disclaimer**
 At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.

title: Senior .NET Developer
description:
**Avarda Group** 
 simplifies how customers across Europe manage their personal finances. Listed on Nasdaq Stockholm since 2016, we combine a pragmatic business mindset with cutting‑edge technology to deliver scalable, efficient payment, savings and lending solutions.
   

  

 At
 **Avarda Group** 
 , you will have the opportunity to be part of an exciting journey as we build a state-of-the-art platform that transforms how e-commerce merchants handle payments. As a Senior .NET Developer, you will play a key role in designing and developing our backend systems, focusing on scalability and performance.
   

  

****Why should you join us?****
 We offer more than just a technical challenge – you will become part of a team building the future of payment solutions with modern, unified technology. With us, you can grow both technically and personally, as we shape stronger work processes and develop innovative solutions for future products. We are building a modern platform that supports current and future products, and you will help create a stronger company culture and more efficient ways of working.
   

  

 Our backend platform is based on the .NET stack and microservices architecture, mainly deployed in Azure.
   

  

 We have a distributed tech team with employees in Borås, Stockholm, Gdansk, Malaga, and a partner in the Czech Republic. Our payment and card services are used in 13 European markets, and travel may be required.
   

  

****The essential requirements:****
* At least 5 years of software development experience, particularly in C#, .NET Core, and Azure.
* Deep knowledge of system architecture, with experience designing and maintaining microservices.
* Coach junior developers and actively participate in technical and architectural decisions.


****It would be a plus if you also have:****
* Experience with integration, delivery, and deployment with Kubernetes, Docker, and Azure Pipelines.
* Experience with optimizing systems and applications for high performance and reliability.
* Experience with implementing logging and observability using OpenTelemetry.
* Experience in e-commerce, payment solutions, or finance.

title: AI-native Fullstack Engineer - Conversational Analytics
description:
**About The Team**
 Team Slayer is a squad in the
 **Analytics Platform Product Area (APPA)** 
 within our clients
 **Learning Infrastructure** 
 studio. It builds
 **Vedder** 
 : Our clients conversational analytics platform that lets any employee ask natural-language questions of data and get back SQL-backed answers or full agentic insights, without writing a single line of SQL.
   

  

 Vedder has grown explosively: the conversational analytics agent adoption went from 0 to 970 MAU in its first 3 months. Combined Vedder MAU reached 1,181 in March 2026, up from :254 six months earlier. The platform runs across multiple surfaces: Web UI, Slack, and MCP endpoints used by the employees internal AI agents.
   

  

 Slayer is a small, fast-moving team with a lot of ownership and a genuine mandate to build AI-first products. The engineer we're looking for will spend their time working on production-grade conversational agents with evaluation pipelines, data corpora, MCP tooling, and meaningful user feedback loops.
   

  

 What will the person do?
   

  

* Build and evolve the text2insights conversational agent: a stateful, multi-turn Claude Agent SDK-powered backend that synthesizes quantitative BigQuery data with qualitative signals to deliver analytical insights to the employees.
* Own and advance the evaluation and monitoring framework for agentic responses: LLM-judges, regression suites, confidence scoring, and systematic prompt improvement loops.
* Contribute to the corpus health and governance layer: context staleness detection, programmatic curation, curator nudges, and quality signals that determine the ceiling of agent accuracy.
* Build and refine MCP server surfaces (text2sql-mcp, text-to-insights) that expose Vedder's capabilities to our agent ecosystem.
* Ship iteratively using coding agents as a multiplier: the team expects engineers to use AI tooling actively, not occasionally.


 A successful candidate
   

  

 Must-haves
   

  

* Fluent in Java or Python and comfortable with TypeScript.
* Has production systems experience: observability, error handling, sensible API design, graceful degradation, and test discipline.
* Has a proven record of problem decomposition under ambiguity into small, shippable, learnable increments.
* Has strong code review and technical writing habits.
* Has a track record of ramping fast on a new domain with a real timeline.
* Uses coding agents (Cursor, Claude Code, or similar) as a daily multiplier: and has a working sense of when to trust their output and when to push back.


 Strongly desired AI engineering skills
   

  

* Has shipped production AI/LLM-backed solutions: agent architectures, conversational systems, or data-grounded AI applications using a modern agent SDK (Claude Agent SDK, OpenAI Agents SDK, LangGraph, or similar). We weigh evidence of production LLM work highly: shipped systems, public eval harnesses, write-ups of prompt iteration.
* Hands-on experience with tool-use / function-calling patterns: building or consuming tool-equipped agents. MCP experience is a strong plus.
* Treats prompt engineering as engineering: versioned, tested, iterated.
* Familiar with agentic evaluation frameworks: LLM-as-a-judge / regression evals.


 Nice to have
   

  

* Experience with BigQuery or similar cloud data warehouses and SQL-based data pipelines.
* Familiarity with agent orchestration frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, or custom).
* Background in analytics, business intelligence, or data tooling.


 Team fit
   

  

* Bias for action: high delivery pace, comfortable shipping incrementally and learning from real users.
* Self-starter in ambiguous environments: this team shapes direction, it doesn't just execute tickets. Ability to break down a vague problem into actionable milestones is expected.
* Excellent async communication: we are distributed and move fast; writing clearly and keeping the team informed without meetings is a core skill.
* Genuinely excited about building AI systems: not just using AI to be faster, but interested in the hard problems of evaluation, trust, and reliability in agentic products. If reading about LLM-judge pipelines and corpus governance sounds interesting rather than boring, this is the right role.


 How to show fit
   

  

* An agent, or MCP tool you've built: GitHub, gist, HuggingFace, screenshot, anything.
* A write-up: comparing prompt versions, debugging a hallucination, iterating on agent behavior, or a postmortem on something that broke.
* A side-project agent with a real feedback loop: even small.
* A short note on what you'd want to learn, change, or push on at Vedder based on what's in this ad


**Period: Jun – Nov 2026**
 Workplace: Sweden.

title: Senior Mechanical Analysis Engineer
description:
OHB Sweden is a leading Swedish supplier of space systems. We develop, build, test and commission satellites and subsystems for space missions in, for example, communication, earth observation and space research for institutional and commercial customers within and outside Europe.
  
Building a satellite requires a broad range of expertise, involving the analysis, design, manufacturing, and testing of both hardware and software. At OHB Sweden, we offer engineers an exceptional opportunity to expand their technical skills across all domains.
  
We are seeking a skilled Senior Mechanical Analysis Engineer with space experience of the complete chain in FEM analysis, and follow-on testing of the manufactured product and satellite systems.
  
Collaborating with external partners (customers, payload suppliers, etc.) to define and implement different analysis models and interfaces will be an integral part of your daily responsibilities.
  
Why Join Us?
  
  

**Dynamic Work Environment:** Engage in a vibrant, international setting with numerous collaboration partners, primarily in Europe.
  
  

**Comprehensive Skill Development:** Enhance your expertise in various technical domains, from Mechanical design to System engineering.
  
  

**Team Collaboration:** Work closely with system, electrical, thermal, and AIT engineers in the development of cutting-edge satellites.
  
  

**Project orientation:** Take lead on discussions with customers and suppliers, managing relations in- and outside of OHB Sweden.
  
  

**What We’re Looking For:**  

A structured, motivated, mechanical analysis engineer with proven leadership abilities.
  
  

Ability to work independently while meeting agreed delivery schedules.
  
  

Strong collaboration skills to work effectively with diverse teams.
  
  

Ability to plan and drive the success of our projects.
  
  

**Task Description:**  

Having a lead role on mechanical, structural, and dynamic components using FEM, focusing on stress, shock, and random vibration analyses.
  
  

Lead technical discussions with customers and suppliers.
  
  

Supervise off-site testing of parts and inspect delivered items.
  
  

Support on-site assembly of end products, such as spacecraft structures.
  
  

Define and design test specifications, procedures, and setups for subsystem qualification (structures, mechanisms, units, components, actuators).
  
  

Correlate FE models (e.g., fundamental frequencies, damping coefficients) with actual test results.
  
  

Assist in planning and budgeting for future programs and projects.
  
  

Design, assemble, and test mechanical ground support equipment (MGSE) for integration and test activities.
  
  

Mentor junior engineers and provide technical guidance within the team.
  
  

**Required Qualifications:**  

Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Space Engineering, or related disciplines.
  
  

Minimum of 10 years of experience in design and testing environments related to CAD, mechanical FEM analysis, and design.
  
  

Proven ability to lead and inspire teams and/or groups, driving projects forward.
  
  

Experience within ESA projects.
  
  

Good knowledge of the ECSS.
  
  

Expertise with NASTRAN,Altair, Hypermesh, Optistruct
  
  

Proficiency in FEM analysis, particularly in random vibration response, shock, and loads analysis.
  
  

Ability to generate, read, and understand mechanical design/analysis reports and Interface Control Documents (ICDs).
  
  

Clear and coherent reporting and presentation skills in English.
  
  

Experience in design-to-manufacture processes.
  
  

Fluent in English, both spoken and written.
  
  

Located in or willing to relocate to Stockholm, Sweden.
  
  

**Added Advantageous Qualifications:**  

Experience in writing test procedures for vibration and shock.
  
  

Experience in requirements management and verification.
  
  

Experience with CREO and/or NX (CAD) and Windchill PLM.
  
  

Experience working closely with production/MAIT.
  
  

Experience in GPS (Geometric Product Specifications) drawing production.
  
  

Knowledge of the European Cooperation for Space Standardization (ECSS) and experience in the space industry.
  
  

If you are passionate about pushing the boundaries of space technology and eager to contribute to innovative satellite projects, we would love to hear from you!
  
If you wish to have an active role in the development of future space systems, feel confident that your experience and qualifications match the above requirements and want to find yourself in a dynamic and inspiring work environment, then we very much look forward to hearing from you! ️

title: Software Update Engineer
description:
**Ready to drive innovation in automotive software updates?**


ALTEN is partnering with a leading company in Gothenburg to strengthen their team in Complete Vehicle Engineering. As a Software Update Engineer, you’ll play a key role in ensuring test objects are equipped with the latest software, supporting projects from concept to production. This is a hybrid role where collaboration and technical precision meet.

  

What do we offer?

* A dynamic work environment in a shared service team with experienced colleagues.
* The chance to work across all vehicle programs, from early development to production.
* Cutting-edge projects in sustainable and connected mobility.
* A collaborative culture where curiosity and teamwork drive innovation.

  

About the role


You’ll be responsible for software updates in test objects, ensuring they align with project requirements and the latest baselines. Your work will directly support testing phases, requiring close coordination with stakeholders.

  

Key tools and processes include DSA, PIE R&D, TEAMS, and fault tracing, with opportunities to contribute to process improvements. Whether updating to customer specifications or preparing test objects for new phases, your role is critical to maintaining seamless software integration.



Your main responsibilities

* Perform SW updates on test objects according to project baselines or customer requests.
* Download, sort, and manage software baselines during different project phases.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure timely delivery of updated test objects.
* Support fault tracing and troubleshooting when needed.
* Act as a team player, sharing knowledge and assisting colleagues.

  

Your profile


You’re a proactive problem-solver with strong technical skills and a collaborative mindset.

* Degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or equivalent.
* Background in automotive software, testing, or vehicle engineering.
* Familiarity with DSA, PIE R&D, TEAMS, and fault-tracing methods (meritorious).
* Fluent in English; Swedish is beneficial.
* Valid driver’s license (B) and strong computer skills.

  

About ALTEN


ALTEN is one of Europe’s largest technology and IT consulting companies with over 57,000 employees in nearly 30 countries. Our engineers carry out complex and highly technical projects throughout the value chain of the most prestigious companies in all sectors, such as Automotive, Defense, Energy & Environment, Industry, Public services & Government and Life Sciences. In Sweden, we are about 1300 committed employees with 9 offices in 9 cities – from Lund in the south to Skellefteå in the north.

  

For the sixth year in a row, ALTEN has been named one of Sweden’s most attractive employers by Karriärföretagen, an award for employers that offer unique career and development opportunities.

  

Welcome to read more about us at alten.se

title: Digital Design Engineer (FPGA)
description:
**Job Description:**

**Digital Design Engineer (FPGA)**

  

Location: Gothenburg, Sweden

  

ESAB is a global leader in welding and cutting technologies, with a century-long legacy of innovation and excellence. Within our Global R&D organization in Gothenburg, we develop world-leading welding solutions and take full responsibility for the entire product lifecycle — from concept development to production and continuous improvement.

  

We are now looking for an experienced **Digital Design Engineer (FPGA)** to join our Welding Process & Research team in Gothenburg. In this role, you will contribute to the development of next-generation FPGA platforms for ESAB’s welding systems, working closely with embedded software, power electronics, and system engineering teams in an international and highly collaborative environment.

 **Your responsibilities:**

  

As a Digital Design Engineer (FPGA), you will:

* Contribute to the development and maintenance of FPGA-based solutions from concept through implementation, verification, and production support
* Participate in FPGA architecture and system partitioning together with the FPGA team
* Develop VHDL designs that meet functional and real-time requirements and are suitable for production use
* Support the development of test benches for the functions developed
* Collaborate actively within the FPGA team, including design reviews, problem solving, and knowledge sharing
* Work cross-functionally with embedded software, power electronics, and welding process teams to support system integration and performance
* Take part in verification and validation activities, including simulation, hardware bring-up, and laboratory testing
* Apply engineering best practices to support quality, reliability, and consistency in FPGA solutions
* Contribute to continuous improvement of FPGA platforms, tools, and ways of working
* Develop next-generation FPGA platforms for ESAB’s welding systems, contributing to architecture, design, and implementation

 **Your profile:**

  

We believe you have:

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Embedded Systems, Digital Design, FPGA/VHDL, or a related discipline
* Several years of experience in FPGA and embedded product development
* Strong hands-on experience with FPGA design and VHDL
* Ability to contribute to technical solutions across multiple phases of the product lifecycle
* Experience working in hardware–software co-development environments
* Familiarity with laboratory and debug equipment (oscilloscopes, logic analyzers, JTAG)
* Experience working in cross-functional, team-based development
* Knowledge of power electronics or signal processing is a merit
* Excellent English communication skills

 **Personal skills:**

* Communicative and collaborative working style
* Structured and analytical approach to problem solving
* Focus on delivering high quality, reliable solutions
* Willingness to share knowledge and learn from others
* Curiosity and proactive mindset
* Ability to work independently as well as in teams
* Strong communication and mentoring skills

 **What we offer:**

* A dynamic and innovative work environment with access to cutting-edge technology
* Opportunities to work on global projects and collaborate with talented colleagues worldwide
* Professional development and long-term career growth opportunities
* A highly skilled international R&D environment
* Opportunity to contribute to next-generation welding technologies and digital solutions

 **Apply now with your English CV and let’s SHAPE the future together!**

title: Power Electronics System Engineer
description:
ALTEN is seeking a **Power Electronics System Engineer** to join our dynamic team in Gothenburg, working on-site with a leading client in the automotive industry. In this role, you’ll drive the design and development of inverter systems, focusing on system architecture, requirement management, and safety-critical design.


As a Power Electronics System Engineer, you will be a key player in our inverter system team, focusing on system design, requirement elicitation, and safety-critical development. Your work will directly impact the performance and reliability of next-generation automotive power electronics.


You’ll collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, suppliers, and stakeholders to ensure seamless integration of hardware and software components. Using tools like MATLAB/Simulink and frameworks such as ISO 26262 and ASPICE, you’ll drive the development of robust and efficient inverter systems for electric drives.

title: Fault Tracing Engineer – Electrical Systems & Telematics
description:
Are you an experienced engineer with a passion for troubleshooting, system understanding, and improving product quality? Do you enjoy working hands-on with complex electrical and connectivity systems in vehicles? Then this could be your next opportunity. ALTEN is now looking for Fault Tracing Engineers for assignments with one of our clients within the heavy vehicle industry. In this role, you will work with systematic quality investigations and fault tracing within areas such as Electrical & Electronics, Connectivity, and Telematics.

**About the role**


As a Fault Tracing Engineer, you will be part of a cross-functional team working with quality investigations and root cause analysis of vehicle systems and connected services. You will analyze reported issues, investigate system behavior, identify root causes, and contribute to implementing robust solutions together with development teams and other stakeholders.


The role combines hands-on troubleshooting with analytical problem solving and close collaboration across several technical domains. Depending on your background and interests, the work may focus more on Electrical & Electronics systems, connectivity & telematics solutions, or a combination of both.

**Main responsibilities**

* Investigate and troubleshoot systematic quality issues within vehicle systems and connected services
* Analyze field reports, logs, technical data, and system behavior to identify root causes
* Perform fault tracing on system, component, hardware, software, and function level
* Support corrective actions and implementation of robust solutions
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams within development, testing, quality, and implementation
* Contribute to continuous improvements of products, services, and processes
* Support development of tools, methods, and proactive analysis approaches

**Your profile**


You are a structured and solution-oriented engineer with strong technical curiosity and problem-solving skills. You enjoy digging into complex technical issues while maintaining a holistic system perspective.

**We see that you have:**

* Several years of experience within the automotive industry
* Experience from fault tracing, troubleshooting, system verification, system design, or component development
* Experience within Electrical & Electronics, Connectivity, or Telematics systems
* Strong analytical and technical problem-solving skills
* Ability to work both independently and collaboratively in cross-functional teams
* Good understanding of the automotive product lifecycle
* Very good communication skills in English

**Meritorious:**

* Experience with tools such as CANoe, CANalyzer, Catia V5, Saber, IPEtronik, or similar
* Experience with Linux environments and log analysis
* Knowledge of communication protocols such as TCP/IP
* Familiarity with automotive development processes and tools
* Bus driving license (Category D)



**About ALTEN**


ALTEN is one of Europe’s largest engineering and IT consulting companies with over 57,000 employees in around 30 countries. Our engineers carry out advanced projects throughout the product development cycle for leading companies in sectors such as Automotive, Aerospace, Energy, and Life Sciences.


In Sweden, we are about 1,300 committed employees across 9 cities – from Lund in the south to Skellefteå in the north. For the fifth consecutive year, ALTEN has been recognized as one of Sweden’s most attractive employers by Karriärföretagen, thanks to our strong focus on career development, innovation, and engineering excellence.


Visit **www.alten.se** to learn more about us.

**The opportunity**

Do you want to enable green energy transition, and together with colleagues meet t he world’s needs for sustainable, flexible and insecure energy?  



We are convinced that HVDC (High Voltage Direct Current) technology, solutions for energy transfer with direct current at high voltages, is a long-term sustainable solution. The technology is used for energy transmission over long distances and to connect electricity networks with minimal losses. In addition to energy transfer, HVDC technology also alleviates electricity quality problems and can contribute to the stabilization of connected power grids. For offshore wind power or long-distance underwater transmissions, direct current is the only realistic energy transmission alternative.  



In this role as an Auxiliary systems 3D Modeler at Hitachi Energy you will be a part of a department which designs the plant auxiliary system including the climate system, HVAC, Fire detection and protection systems and etc. Our team culture is flexible and cooperative with highest regards for safety and occupational health. Living core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business. In this position we offer Hybrid work solutions, where you can work from Ludvika or Väster ås or from home considering specified required travels to the local office.

* Model coordination with Electrical and Mechanical department .
* Model coordination between Civil & MEP.
* Co-ordination with Project/Tender Team for timelines, budget, risks & opportunities pertaining to BIM aspects.

* You are living Hitachi Energy´s core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business.
* Sense of responsibility, and the capability of planning and organizing your daily work and a problem solver who takes initiatives to solve challenges.
